body:
we can stop Trump with your help...
| | Folks, there is still __one thing__ we can do to curb Trump’s power: [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/nokingsact/?source=VPP_20241130_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=6&akid=18109%2E878179%2EETfwgM) **[15,000 citizen co-sponsors needed: Add your name to DEMAND Congress pass the No Kings Act and keep Trump in check! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/nokingsact/?source=VPP_20241130_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=7&akid=18109%2E878179%2EETfwgM)** | [**ADD MY NAME: AMERICA HAS NO KINGS »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/nokingsact/?source=VPP_20241130_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=8&akid=18109%2E878179%2EETfwgM)
---
Congress is red 🔴
The Supreme Court is red 🔴
The White House is red 🔴
And the infamous SCOTUS immunity ruling effectively makes Trump a KING...

**_But we can still STOP TRUMP from having total immunity..._**

**[WE JUST NEED 15,000 DEMOCRATS TO STEP UP TODAY! ADD YOUR NAME: Demand Congress pass the “No Kings Act” BEFORE Trump takes office! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/nokingsact/?source=VPP_20241130_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=9&akid=18109%2E878179%2EETfwgM)**
[**ADD MY NAME: AMERICA HAS NO KINGS »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/nokingsact/?source=VPP_20241130_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=10&akid=18109%2E878179%2EETfwgM)
---
Thank you,

Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18109%2E878179%2EETfwgM). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18109%2E878179%2EETfwgM).**

name: Team Lateefah
subject: Investing early
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lateefah for Congress
body:
https://www.lateefahsimon.com [https://www.lateefahsimon.com]
Friend,
As the holidays bring us together with loved ones, we’re reminded of what we’re fighting for: a future built on justice, equity, and opportunity for all. But while we celebrate, Donald Trump and his allies are working overtime to push their extremist agenda — and we can’t afford to lose ground.
Lateefah is getting ready to hit the ground running on day one, standing up for our communities and rejecting Trump’s dangerous Project 2025 blueprint. And Friend: the fight ahead is massive — and we need you with us every step of the way.
Our end-of-month deadline is at midnight tonight, and we’re counting on grassroots supporters like you to keep our momentum going. Will you chip in whatever you can to help us hit our goal? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=X_113024_EOM]
This season of giving, let’s double down on our commitment to a brighter future. Together, we can reject Trump’s agenda, take back the House, and secure a better tomorrow for all.
Thank you for standing with us,
Team Lateefah
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=X_113024_EOM [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=X_113024_EOM] Lateefah Simon has spent her career fighting for justice—fighting for folks without a voice. Now, as a 25-year veteran organizer and nationally recognized advocate for civil rights and social justice, she’s running to take this fight to Congress. In Lateefah, CA-12 has a fighter.
To learn more about Lateefah, visit LateefahSimon.com [http://lateefahsimon.com/]

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: BREAKING: This Might Be President Trump's BEST Pick Yet...
body:
Tonight, President Trump made the long awaited announcement of who will be the next Director of the FBI. I am beyond thrilled that he decided to call
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17743478.9576.1.299ccaae60b6ff3702b225def2b1b53d) |
---
Tonight, **President Trump** made the long awaited announcement of who will be the next **Director of the FBI**. I am beyond thrilled that he decided to call upon **Kash Patel**!
---
|
---
So far, we have been _spoiled_ with all the cabinet picks of **President Trump** because they are all America First warriors that have been battle tested.
However, the appoint of **Kash Patel** to the position of **Director of the FBI** might be the _biggest grenade_ thrown into the swamp of DC so far.
I know **Kash** very well and I can guarantee he will carry out the job he has been asked to do
I am so happy with the _All-Star team_ that **President Trump** has assembled to **Make America Great Again**!
Thank you,
Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17743478.9577.1.c67cb31c896a68182c623074c003e8ba)
---
Recently at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17743478.9578.1.75d8a4ea0104c418ebed9dffab2e00be), I started a _mini-series_ within our _WKND series_ over the [Book of Acts](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17743478.9579.1.ff68690350c0809068b89f9f85fb8d64). In **Acts 17** , the **Apostle Paul** spent 3 weeks in Thessalonica **reasoning** , **explaining** and **proving** **Jesus** from the Old Testament Scriptures. Therefore, I took the **Book of Genesis** and _reasoned_ , _explained_ and _proved_ **Jesus as Messiah** from those 50 chapters in the 1st book of the Bible. The next Sunday, we looked at Jesus in the **Book of Exodus**. I believe these sermons will really teach you some things that maybe you have never seen before from the _*Torah_. Watch "[Jesus In The Torah | Genesis](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17743478.9580.1.1958611611018e3d281127cecef6464e)" here: [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=634OIj06ZbU](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17743478.9581.1.d4e2e4821e9dead031662760f530b374) **Upcoming Events At Sheridan.Church** -Saturday, December 7 @6pm: **Christmas Gala w/Mayor Giuliani** (6 tickets left) | RSVP: [https://www.tickettailor.com/events/sheridanchurch/1453870](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17743478.9582.1.988ddf45f21ded79b0f86f5d33014044) -Sunday, December 22 @10am: **Sheridan Christmas Concert** -Sunday, January 12 @10am: **Erick Stakelbeck** -Wednesday, February 26 @7pm: **Rabbi Jonathan Cahn** Please consider partnering with the mission of [Sheridan](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17743478.9583.1.f0c6cab5ad989c566c1731dc9972abe6): [https://sheridan.church/give](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17743478.9584.1.ec0fddb5fb1e69b0984ecfec569d185d) Thank you,
Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---
| | [ Partner w/Sheridan.Church ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17743478.9585.1.b3dfa7ec31aacafb4035877eaf6a99f2)
---
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17743478.9586.1.fd8fddef7a7bb039d8223f83340e5289)
---
The response to [Sheridan's 1st Annual Christmas Dinner Gala](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17743478.9587.1.2055c105ddf942e67053f0947eedc945) has been **HUGE**! _This event is nearly sold out_. If you have not got your ticket or reserved your table yet, now is the time. Keynote speaker: **Mayor Rudy Giuliani** Comedy Performance: **Brad Stine** Live Auction Items Include: **Signed Donald Trump Painting** and more... Silent Auction as well. I will also be sharing about **Operation 2025 at Sheridan.Church** that evening. This is a black tie event. Please join us for what will be an incredible experience to close out 2024 and to look into 2025. Kindly RSVP here: [https://www.tickettailor.com/events/sheridanchurch/1453870](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17743478.9588.1.4146bb84ecfaf10e272d35626fa61ea7) **Date** \- Saturday, December 7, 2024 **Time** \- 6:00-8:00pm **Address** \- 7901 E 41st St Tulsa, OK Thank you,
Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---
| | [ RSVP: Gala w/Mayor Rudy Giuliani ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17743478.9589.1.ca4b0e09403089d5149ec5daa5bccd42)
---
---
## 1st Guest Speaker of 2025 @Sheridan.Church
---
|
---
Over the last year at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17743478.9590.1.6607d4956b8aaa6335fa4865999d7dc4), we have been BLESSED with so many great guest speakers from preachers to politicians to athletes and beyond. Including: [Perry Stone](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17743478.9591.1.d67511be592ce95c535d79eda47c38df), **Tim Tebow** , [Donald Trump Jr](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17743478.9592.1.361aba82ed72b6d039e2d419de987e35)., [Eric Trump](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17743478.9593.1.271566f468756212a6b3f41cf903677d), [Lara Trump](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17743478.9594.1.d82b2fd275070292585af5d062feb861), [Rabbi Jonathan Cahn](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17743478.9595.1.189e3d7772276f0342b1ebae3025bd9e), [Darryl Strawberry](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17743478.9596.1.d8a39515123dedd62ac5d557065a41cf), **General Michael Flynn** , [Riley Gaines](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17743478.9597.1.25139d50a9eeb8e02e40c9379fad8910), [Mayor Rudy Giuliani](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17743478.9598.1.7c57201e5d034b9a9733c3c390b705d8), [Dr. Randy Caldwell](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17743478.9599.1.7638c2e9b21032c91588a0210f6aa358), [Roger Stone](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17743478.9600.1.ec2bb0511662d47242b8b3bbb458767b), Rodney Howard-Browne and so many others...
But our first guest speaker of 2025, I am very excited about!
Mark your calendars for **Erick Stakelbeck** at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17743478.9601.1.a0b87503ca36878a79a2b12dc04ec3c0) on Sunday, January 12 at 10am CT.
Erick's show on **TBN** is _phenomenal_ and that Sunday in January will be just as great!
---

However, the appoint of Kash Patel to the position of Director of the FBI might be the biggest grenade thrown into the swamp of DC so far. I know Kash very well and I can guarantee he will carry out the job he has been asked to do I am so happy with the All-Star team that President Trump has assembled to Make America Great Again! Thank you, Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer | Recently at , I started a mini-series within our WKND series over the . In Acts 17 , the Apostle Paul spent 3 weeks in Thessalonica reasoning , explaining and proving Jesus from the Old Testament Scriptures. Therefore, I took the Book of Genesis and reasoned , explained and proved Jesus as Messiah from those 50 chapters in the 1st book of the Bible. The next Sunday, we looked at Jesus in the Book of Exodus. I believe these sermons will really teach you some things that maybe you have never seen before from the Torah. Watch "" here: Upcoming Events At Sheridan.Church -Saturday, December 7 @6pm: Christmas Gala w/Mayor Giuliani (6 tickets left) | RSVP: -Sunday, December 22 @10am: Sheridan Christmas Concert -Sunday, January 12 @10am: Erick Stakelbeck -Wednesday, February 26 @7pm: Rabbi Jonathan Cahn Please consider partnering with the mission of : Thank you, Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer | | | The response to has been HUGE! This event is nearly sold out. If you have not got your ticket or reserved your table yet, now is the time. Keynote speaker: Mayor Rudy Giuliani Comedy Performance: Brad Stine Live Auction Items Include: Signed Donald Trump Painting and more... Silent Auction as well. I will also be sharing about Operation 2025 at Sheridan.Church that evening. This is a black tie event. Please join us for what will be an incredible experience to close out 2024 and to look into 2025. Kindly RSVP here: Date \- Saturday, December 7, 2024 Time \- 6:00-8:00pm Address \- 7901 E 41st St Tulsa, OK Thank you, Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer | | 1st Guest Speaker of 2025 @Sheridan.Church | Over the last year at , we have been BLESSED with so many great guest speakers from preachers to politicians to athletes and beyond. Including: , Tim Tebow , ., , , , , General Michael Flynn , , , , , Rodney Howard-Browne and so many others... But our first guest speaker of 2025, I am very excited about! Mark your calendars for Erick Stakelbeck at on Sunday, January 12 at 10am CT. body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=241130em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=241130em]
I won’t be sworn in as Oregon’s Secretary of State until January – but I’m not waiting until then to defend voting rights for all Oregonians.
My team is fighting back against a cynical MAGA effort to restrict Vote By Mail in Oregon because we know it’s safe and secure.
But I can’t do any of this alone. So, today, I’m reaching out to ask for your help.
Tonight marks the first end-of-month fundraising deadline since we won this race, and it would mean a lot if you could help me start this new era with a $25 contribution to help me defend democracy. $25 because Oregon has been running safe and secure all Vote by Mail elections for the past 25 years! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=241130em]

Thanks for standing up for voting rights,

name: Keith Ellison
subject: My least favorite part of the job
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Keith Ellison for Attorney General committee, PO Box 17224, Minneapolis, MN 55417
body:
Peter,

One of my least favorite parts of my job is emailing you asking for money. But I do it anyway because if we let up for even a moment, it creates an opening for our GOP opponents.

Since they’re bankrolled by special interests, giant corporations, and some of the wealthiest individuals in our country, they have the means to attack the moment they see a crack in our armor.

To stay competitive, we rely on small donations from grassroots donors like you. And right now, I’m hoping you’ll pitch in to help us make up the last $4,726 we need to reach our November budget target by midnight.

Remember: You’re still eligible for Minnesota’s Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program. You have until December 31 to donate $75 (or $150 for couples) to our campaign and receive a full refund from the state of Minnesota.

Will you make your fully refundable $75 contribution by 11:59 pm so we can continue working together to help people afford their lives and live with dignity, safety, and respect?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
CHIP IN $10 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em241130_2ke?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
CHIP IN $25 NOW [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/em241130_2ke?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]

clean_body: Peter, One of my least favorite parts of my job is emailing you asking for money. But I do it anyway because if we let up for even a moment, it creates an opening for our GOP opponents. Since they’re bankrolled by special interests, giant corporations, and some of the wealthiest individuals in our country, they have the means to attack the moment they see a crack in our armor. To stay competitive, we rely on small donations from grassroots donors like you. And right now, I’m hoping you’ll pitch in to help us make up the last $4,726 we need to reach our November budget target by midnight. Remember: You’re still eligible for Minnesota’s Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program. You have until December 31 to donate $75 (or $150 for couples) to our campaign and receive a full refund from the state of Minnesota. name: Voter Action Project
subject: "Suddenly silent" election deniers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=113024_2&amount=25]
NYT: After Trump Took the Lead, Election Deniers Went Suddenly Silent [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=113024_2&amount=25]
Team -- We all heard it.
Election deniers spent the weeks leading up to Election Day claiming -- without proof -- about widespread voter fraud that would harm the results, which is something that has never occurred in modern elections. Even Trump himself claimed “ massive CHEATING ” in Philadelphia on Election Day before the polls had even closed.
Once the results arrived the voices that had spent years shouting about election integrity suddenly faded to nothing. “ As soon as it started to look like Trump was going to win, the election denialism went very, very quiet, ” said Welton Chang, a co-founder and the chief executive of Pyrra Technologies, a company that monitors fringe social networks.
We know what this means. Once false claims of election fraud weren't needed to sow doubt about the results, they were discarded. Because they were made up all along.
We cannot abandon our fight for voting rights, Team. Fuel our work with $25 or whatever you can today and help us fight back against whichever lies opponents of voting rights come at us with next >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=113024_2&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=113024_2&amount=15]
GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=113024_2&amount=25]
GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=113024_2&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=113024_2&amount=100]
GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=113024_2&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=113024_2&amount=35]
It's clear: when denying the election’s outcome suddenly proved politically useless, the influencers and Trump allies seemed content to simply set it aside.
“ To the thousands of election integrity warriors: Thank you ,” read a post on X from Cleta Mitchell, a chief election denier and one of Trump's legal advisors.
In an interview after Election Day, Ms. Mitchell said the vigilance of her fellow activists had “ kept a lot of the serious things that happened in 2020 from happening again. ” She couldn't answer what those things were and how they might have occurred in 2024. Because she and many others won't believe any election results where they lose.
On Telegram, dozens of far-right channels monitored by The New York Times spent days leading up to the vote questioning its integrity and vowing to act with force if necessary to block what they viewed as a fraud. As the results rolled in, the tone shifted, warily at first and then gleefully.
This isn't over. The vote suppressors and election deniers are going to come at us again and again until our elections pale in comparison to what they are now. Pitch in with $25 or however much you can right today and protect our right to vote, now and for the future >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=113024_2&amount=25]
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=113024_2&amount=25 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=113024_2&amount=25]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://twitter.com/voteractionproj [https://twitter.com/voteractionproj] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=113024_2&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=113024_2&amount=25]

name: Schrier HQ
subject: Have you seen this. . . ?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:

Midnight tonight marks our very first end-of-month fundraising deadline since the election – and we need your support to hit our goal and stay on track for the fights ahead.

body:
While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/dAfRehWDrkq5GdVTndjWgA2?unsubscribedata=dOmxDxZybfv%2FdQHy7dOYMZccuJj98UN%2F66hliPx4y9QmsEadT2nKocolQXzE98T0VtK2vbo9u5IawiXvIj01CogrlFLRqCkr6UTPxAk8Hs96YVMuIYN9hHtvPijXsCzjXc2npQoE23g5NcuyluU6%2BZ0zr2pBenaOTRQKE1VDZgtm1lhfNJIxgOAlJcXXtJBzljL8VOpCrPrfRHAfhMDUIoILIAQpvCVQp2YEYi6bNikaI5RwT8Bsn%2BA8zgBww09j7kI1%2FsvR4d4GqjEjl1s2r5dYC0wuuybYI6OZA9hlfEPQWsulF46V0dBw4ffJfNcGSTiox3mUBjLQxnKGT%2Fqkk2g7usHtIVxNjDyrsmcoXE3gHOwYN335f6%2FnfaFcOm6zuCL1JUlEvpZiiWFISNMZrIrmZUDD%2Fh5o8xhdvTY9H6TfthV4zaP%2FHa0J%2F7TJHiRm]

# [#]
I hate to be reaching out so late on a Saturday, but it’s just that important.

Tonight at midnight — just 6 hours from now — is more than the first day of December.

It’s our LAST chance to send an immediate message of our movement’s strength despite the adversity of the recent Presidential election.

Can I count on you to chip in $ to help us hit our $10,500 goal before our November end-of-month deadline at midnight? » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-nov24?amount=]

DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-nov24?amount=]

With a Trump White House and MAGA Congress right around the corner, we need to build up our resources like never before to prepare for the fight to come.

Project 2025 is in full swing, and we can’t afford to back down. Now more than ever, it’s critical that we’re organizing and showing the power of our movement.

I’m counting on your support to do just that. Before our month-end fundraising deadline in just 6 hours, will you rush $ or even $ our way? » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-nov24?amount=]

DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-nov24?amount=]

Thank youSincerely,
Raul
https://www.facebook.com/DrRaulRuiz/ [https://www.facebook.com/DrRaulRuiz/] https://www.instagram.com/doctorraulruiz [https://www.instagram.com/doctorraulruiz] https://twitter.com/Dr_RaulRuiz [https://twitter.com/Dr_RaulRuiz]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer]
The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress and to flip the House blue this November.

Can I count on you to chip in $ to help us hit our $10,500 goal before our November end-of-month deadline at midnight? » [=] DONATE NOW [=] With a Trump White House and MAGA Congress right around the corner, we need to build up our resources like never before to prepare for the fight to come. Project 2025 is in full swing, and we can’t afford to back down. Now more than ever, it’s critical that we’re organizing and showing the power of our movement. I’m counting on your support to do just that. Before our month-end fundraising deadline in just 6 hours, will you rush $ or even $ our way? » [=] DONATE NOW [=] Thank youSincerely, Raul [] [] [] [] The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress and to flip the House blue this November. [] CONTRIBUTE » [] [] CONTRIBUTE MONTHLY » [] [] LEARN MORE » [] PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: unsubscribe: You can also click here to donate [] . Dr. Raul Ruiz for Congress Committee P.O. Box 1566 Indio, CA 92202 United States

name: Hillsdale College via Updates For Great Americans
subject: "Charles Dickens' A Christmas Carol" – Our free online course
body:
Charles Dickens, a very great novelist, had a special gift for revealing important truths in delightful ways

This sponsored message from Update for Great Americans is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zhectk6kk3cllcdggadua2kcufao7qrlhijup588_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c1gmeoj2clh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Charles Dickens, a very great novelist, had a special gift for revealing important truths in delightful ways through unforgettable characters.

To mark this holiday season, Hillsdale College released an online course on what is perhaps Dickens' most beloved novel: _A Christmas Carol_.

The course is taught by the excellent Dwight Lindley, an English professor here at Hillsdale who loves both reading Dickens and teaching Dickens.

In this six-lecture course, Dwight will help you understand more fully the causes of Ebenezer Scrooge's conversion in the novel and what the story teaches us about leading a happy and complete life.

You can use the secure link below to begin experiencing the wisdom and fun of _A Christmas Carol_ today.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/christmas-carol](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zbc4370673afnogr2ge5kg7u9gd152qfdnqa3i30_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c1gmeoj2clh2bs)**

Let your family and friends know of this free online course as well. We hope it will add meaning and joy to your Christmas celebrations.

Best regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

---

Updates for Great Americans
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2znahto6uo15b41vkesbpiusue1g8kb3n36of9nl0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjklo72d1hekr76dtiesp7ad1hegqracjkmoq37djjkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8pj3cdge8o7246h22sh2s8i6epj6c1gmeoj2clh2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z525mcqev5301hj6i1kqkdq7d4iil8f9q4q52cj8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c1gmeoj2clh2bs)_

[](http://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zn2m0dkqdkr63ve6279brif8pckh1nvtkg7tam9g_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c1gmeoj2clh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Hollywood groomers
body:
Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues...

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Fellow Conservative, As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want to say: **_You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children._** Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2ziksagm26gn1706mhg8j8n4ej8k1bs3aro81mpno_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c1gmeoj2clh2bs)
---
| | And the result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say......and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth. **That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** **[**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zcq4h1e3po8q9p2b4uoq5ugno0tt00n6tsc7ap4g_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c1gmeoj2clh2bs)** And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[**Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zo8mpkrhmscn01e2k38jclk18d9ekb6gh9hs0r68_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c1gmeoj2clh2bs)** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zihc7pqbe117nugrf4c73dkd1v1qr2dlps991b3g_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c1gmeoj2clh2bs) ** Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a **Founding Supporter** at the $35 and above level, we’ll send you**** all ten episodes of** _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ **for your family to enjoy**** FREE on DVD.** ** Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a **Founding Supporter. **

name: Riley Gaines
subject: I saved a copy of my book for you
body:
I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.

| |
---
| | I’m writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zd06igariluu08ikb8qsfd8obm8pu3l09476kc60_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c1gmeoj6c1h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative,
---
| | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery _slide_. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" _male_ swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me.
---
| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z10mq81qu154ad6smvg1g50j5d68783vh1ml0gi8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c1gmeoj6c1h2bs)
---
| | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. **[That's why I'm asking you to stand with me today -- before it's too late.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zl7or0536rn9e6bml383t7nrr24katqrd3i6dqco_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c1gmeoj6c1h2bs)** My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."_Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women."_ It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."_Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot."_ Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.**God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that.** Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.**Your chance is right now -- and right by my side.** **[Please stand with me against the radical transgender movement by making an urgent tax-deductible donation today -- before it's too late.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zhar87n10kq4gg3qv7239spocn417i4h0ekq89k8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c1gmeoj6c1h2bs) ** Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No."
---
>> But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations.
---
The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. **It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty.** **[And your tax-deductible gift today is going straight to help them.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zvbrt0kdq72u6i1sanbshas25nnqknovsc1ir8bg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c1gmeoj6c1h2bs)** With the help of patriots like you, the _Center for American Liberty_ fights the transgender movement _in the courts_ because that’s the only way to stop them. And the _Center for American Liberty_ is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach.
---
**#1. They're fighting radical schools**.
---
I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors _encourage_ young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The _Center for American Liberty_ is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! **[When you make your tax-deductible gift today](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zq2rk6kqobn9dc5ql5unqmsj1f1f0lu4uemmu2eo_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c1gmeoj6c1h2bs), **you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals!
---
**#2. They're fighting radical doctors.**
---
There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince _even_ _conservative_ _parents_ that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the _Center for American Liberty_ is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. **[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2znsuqjq1hsoa62cs6k376gprndupru6qb4nqhgb8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c1gmeoj6c1h2bs)** , you're helping Chloe and the _Center for American Liberty_ make sure this never happens to another child!
---
**#3. They're fighting for _your_ right to speak out against this evil.**
---
Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the _Center for American Liberty's_ specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished!**[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zrvt72imnc6o7a94opqk0bvq1p6hr39pnnv19kdg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c1gmeoj6c1h2bs)** , you're helping the _Center for American Liberty_ protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you.**[But all I'm asking you to do is make a tax-deductible gift of $30, $50, $75, $100 or even $250 or more today -- before it's too late.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zhjlej5vn6efb83is6cnnp7rv5hnv5trvuakbgqg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c1gmeoj6c1h2bs)** Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. _The Center for American Liberty_ needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... I**t will be my honor to send you my new book _Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind_ as my free gift** **[**when you donate $100 or more to the Center for American Liberty.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z7i4vvnlr3d805td2stou9877rohap0j29udbqb8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c1gmeoj6c1h2bs)** Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: _For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18_ I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Riley Gaines
---
|
---
| | P.S. **[**Please follow this link to make your tax-deductible donation and let me know if you can help the Center for American Liberty defeat the radical transgender movement.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zrnv83gl49gkcc7th7tmrpm0qgerc0hb8t5tnf8g_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c1gmeoj6c1h2bs)** God made man and God made woman. The attempts to deny those basic truths, are attempts to deny the truth of God. Your help is so critical to the _Center for American Liberty's_ work, **[when you donate $100 or more, as my personal "Thank You," I'll send you my new book,_Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind_ for free.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z6k9n8ed88bknq80iuqvdmkhqssgc1igdjq1h5i8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c1gmeoj6c1h2bs)** Please hurry. It's getting hard to hold back this evil without you. I don't want you to look back a year from now and say, "I wish I had done something when I had the chance."
---
[ **Donate**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2znnae420i9a3tlqvqs3rmk5fhmu63flvupv3r0r8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c1gmeoj6c1h2bs)
---
| |
---
| | |
---

---

name: Kari Lake
subject: I will never give up. I hope you won’t either.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Media Council
body:
I’m contacting you today because it’s so important that you help me stay in this fight.

| | |
---
| |
---
| |
---
#
---
From the Desk of
---
# **[Kari Lake](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z23htd9vgo66bon16845tu5n8topcd2g5073useg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c1gm1p32cdh2bs)**
---
|
---
| | Dear Friend, I’m contacting you today because it’s so important that you help me stay in this fight.If you feel like everything you ever considered “normal” in America has been turned upside down, you’re not alone.I’m facing an enormous fine for speaking the truth. To me, and you, I know the millions of dollars it will cost to defend our rights and the future of our families is worth it.Because nothing in this world can come between me and my family.
---
_Not_ the Lefts Lawfare._Not_ power-drunk liberal prosecutors._Not_ litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth.
---
I’ve already incurred _hundreds of thousands of dollars_ in expenses to defend myself in this defamation case.**[Will you help me by rushing an emergency “First Amendment Fund” contribution before midnight tonight?](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zu2ogvvncia16eo7amdd9grs0ma5g4ikavr33kk0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c1gm1p32cdh2bs)** American Media Council created the First Amendment Fund to help me and others threatened by lawfare.Every single dollar given to this **“First Amendment Fund”** will help me fight this fight without financially destroying my family.
---
[ **DONATE **](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zg475gdt2r2qhofuhq7f8vjjabls8nci89o9tj9o_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c1gm1p32cdh2bs)
---
Thank you for all of your support.Yours truly,
---
| |
---
---
Kari Lake
---
|
---
| |

---
Kari Lake

But I’m still taking on this fight because I want you to live in a free and prosperous America. I will never give up. I hope you won’t either.**[Please, rush your most generous, tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, or more. Thank you for your support during this difficult time.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z89jnimv0gh3rs0fo18sgj4id3ti1c4p2rrumsmg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c1gm1p32cdh2bs)**

To me, and you, I know the millions of dollars it will cost to defend our rights and the future of our families is worth it.Because nothing in this world can come between me and my family. Not the Lefts Lawfare.Not power-drunk liberal prosecutors.Not litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth. I’ve already incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself in this defamation case. American Media Council created the First Amendment Fund to help me and others threatened by lawfare.Every single dollar given to this “First Amendment Fund” will help me fight this fight without financially destroying my family. Thank you for all of your support.Yours truly, | | Kari Lake | | | Kari Lake | | P.S. I’m facing legal fees, plus an enormous sentence, all for speaking the truth and calling out election fraud. name: Hillsdale College via Updates For Great Americans
subject: Claim your Hillsdale College Calendar
body:
This calendar is a small thank-you gift for everyone who helps our efforts

This sponsored message from Updates for Great Americans is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2ztl45ddos36cqm18qvqn4f8moo9267s5uooi36u8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c1im0o72c9h2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zjiiam3057qqok5eodbokq7p7l8l60rv4492al4g_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c1im0o72c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American,

I'm reaching out to you today because I'd like to send you your **2025 Hillsdale College calendar**.

I know, I know. It's a little early to be thinking about 2025. But since you're someone who cares about liberty, I wanted to make sure you had this chance to receive your 2025 calendar.

This calendar is a small thank-you gift for everyone who helps our efforts to reach and teach Americans about our nation's great heritage of liberty.

You can make a tremendous difference for our country.

**That 's why I hope you'll claim your 2025 Hillsdale College calendar by October 31.** You can reserve your calendar by clicking on this secure link:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/2025calendar](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zcn7me0k0k1o8drl7grgm7nfnl3j5m9ghlptfls8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c1im0o72c9h2bs)**

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Updates for Great Americans
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

subject: Discover the Facts: Socialism and Capitalism Explained
body:
In recent years, there has been a noticeable shift among young Americans who increasingly favor socialism over capitalism.

| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhmlaph07f398kkb07okft6pfgehhcgrmimp1lfg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c1im0o72c1h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend, In recent years, there has been a noticeable shift among young Americans who increasingly favor socialism over capitalism. This trend raises a critical question: do they fully understand these two systems' historical contexts and real-world outcomes?
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9sencn3s6k6mqcs6nco6gia5ajiomaksqh6g6h0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c1im0o72c1h2bs)
---
| | To address this, we have created a new eBook, _**The History of Socialism and Capitalism**_ , authored by two of the most prominent voices in today's political discourse, Hoover Institution senior fellows Niall Ferguson and Victor Davis Hanson.

This new eBook offers a deep dive into the origins, development, and impacts of socialism and capitalism. Each scholar presents an in-depth analysis through two different lenses. It's hard to overstate the relevance of this eBook in today's policy debates, where radical proposals are gaining traction.

Understanding the historical and practical implications of socialism and capitalism is crucial for making informed decisions about our economic and political future. The insights provided by Ferguson and Hanson will equip you with the knowledge to critically evaluate these competing ideologies and their potential impact on society.

Don't miss this opportunity to enhance your understanding of these pivotal economic systems. [Click here to request your free copy of **The History of Socialism and Capitalism** today.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqu0s05eihelghpl9ad1u22v9f763fpv83tsnfsg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c1im0o72c1h2bs)
Greg Greg Stamps | Online Development Hoover Institution | Stanford University
---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover’s work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Hollywood has done enough
body:
Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues...

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Fellow Conservative, As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want to say: **_You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children._** Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zrs41gov6rsj1mqrl965hih2mcedcqk7s6lukav0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c1im0o72c3h2bs)
---
| | And the result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say......and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth. **That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** **[**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zpc3vhhpa3l41bois1522oojg5ce70ha5v8krl4o_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c1im0o72c3h2bs)** And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[**Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgej6cr57uopa5ce6toito5jbkhc9qr8m8lovud0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c1im0o72c3h2bs)** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zv2v3ncc891t697p6tf0tk0fhrh6rvlbcc9378fg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c1im0o72c3h2bs) ** Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a **Founding Supporter** at the $35 and above level, we’ll send you**** all ten episodes of** _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ **for your family to enjoy**** FREE on DVD.** ** Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a **Founding Supporter. **
---

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: No More Blue’s Clues Pride Parades
body:
Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues...

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Fellow Conservative, As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want to say: **_You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children._** Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4093ehoniqnqkfel697i4cvn1s7bsf6pegph5cg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c1im2ob2cph2bs)
---
| | And the result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say......and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth. **That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** **[**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zunp8qdkea3dgdt50t3carlh6im7dpf5d8qoane0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c1im2ob2cph2bs)** And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[**Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2za5emnv3lc67l9d3l5uuol5bfvgrh2m1771jmb90_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c1im2ob2cph2bs)** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdsj57te21v50i8q0v8iudhih3j96imafa2g7lj8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c1im2ob2cph2bs) ** Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a **Founding Supporter** at the $35 and above level, we’ll send you**** all ten episodes of** _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ **for your family to enjoy**** FREE on DVD.** ** Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a **Founding Supporter. **

subject: Your 2025 Hillsdale College Calendar
body:

I'm reaching out to you today because I'd like to send you your **2025 Hillsdale College calendar**.

I know, I know. It's a little early to be thinking about 2025. But since you're someone who cares about liberty, I wanted to make sure you had this chance to receive your 2025 calendar.

This calendar is a small thank-you gift for everyone who helps our efforts to reach and teach Americans about our nation's great heritage of liberty.

You can make a tremendous difference for our country.

**That 's why I hope you'll claim your 2025 Hillsdale College calendar by October 31.** You can reserve your calendar by clicking on this secure link:

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01

Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: “Charles Dickens’ A ChristmasCarol” – Our free online course
body:
Charles Dickens, a very great novelist, had a special gift for revealing important truths in delightful ways

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ze2a2viohb2vja88q19ebo1r2so9483sovve49og_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c1im6oj6cph2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Charles Dickens, a very great novelist, had a special gift for revealing important truths in delightful ways through unforgettable characters.

To mark this holiday season, Hillsdale College released an online course on what is perhaps Dickens' most beloved novel: _A Christmas Carol_.

The course is taught by the excellent Dwight Lindley, an English professor here at Hillsdale who loves both reading Dickens and teaching Dickens.

In this six-lecture course, Dwight will help you understand more fully the causes of Ebenezer Scrooge's conversion in the novel and what the story teaches us about leading a happy and complete life.

You can use the secure link below to begin experiencing the wisdom and fun of _A Christmas Carol_ today.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/christmas-carol](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp8qoeks0r21gnfvcanivu29mo7mhq8m34v01rm0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c1im6oj6cph2bs)**

Let your family and friends know of this free online course as well. We hope it will add meaning and joy to your Christmas celebrations.

Best regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

---

American Action News
---

I'm reaching out to you today because I'd like to send you your **2025 Hillsdale College calendar**.

I know, I know. It's a little early to be thinking about 2025. But since you're someone who cares about liberty, I wanted to make sure you had this chance to receive your 2025 calendar.

This calendar is a small thank-you gift for everyone who helps our efforts to reach and teach Americans about our nation's great heritage of liberty.

You can make a tremendous difference for our country.

**That 's why I hope you'll claim your 2025 Hillsdale College calendar by October 31.** You can reserve your calendar by clicking on this secure link:

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01

Hillsdale College

House of Commons voted 330 to 275 in favor of a law that allows

according to several reports.

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Stop the indoctrination of our children
body:
Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues...

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Fellow Conservative, As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want to say: **_You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children._** Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zu4coqmrhicv2ea7ucu5g757opfp92598vvk28bg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c1im1o32cdh2bs)
---
| | And the result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say......and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth. **That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** **[**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7nu1hkfje4llep57b4p6fcnlaf1p0dur45djpno_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c1im1o32cdh2bs)** And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[**Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zuqhtgi79ud074m5f08isr7ntdc304o842i258n0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c1im1o32cdh2bs)** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjk2l9og4sk3545mj596t17sk62f8p6p5ioc3b08_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c1im1o32cdh2bs) ** Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a **Founding Supporter** at the $35 and above level, we’ll send you**** all ten episodes of** _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ **for your family to enjoy**** FREE on DVD.** ** Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a **Founding Supporter. **
---
| | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zepkcl2f4mf0v163rmf9i60uca1pldragef7jkso_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c1im1o32cdh2bs)

name: Riley Gaines
subject: I saved a copy of my book for you
body:
I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.

| |
---
| | I’m writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8duc3q55nchbbj9jr1p7p36t4c4svph34ek6vco_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c1im1o32cth2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative,
---
| | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery _slide_. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" _male_ swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me.
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z39omrplmto3kjrnir2tof12d4r4rin16cquuen0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c1im1o32cth2bs)
---
| | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. **[That's why I'm asking you to stand with me today -- before it's too late.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmap0h1h1j6edv2afhjgo4451a20tqfnqhk37330_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c1im1o32cth2bs)** My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."_Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women."_ It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."_Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot."_ Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.**God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that.** Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.**Your chance is right now -- and right by my side.** **[Please stand with me against the radical transgender movement by making an urgent tax-deductible donation today -- before it's too late.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfnp6dvgrmjrhnj43s91qpnjp6vnp9ambmb3f5eo_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c1im1o32cth2bs) ** Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No."
---
>> But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations.
---
The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. **It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty.** **[And your tax-deductible gift today is going straight to help them.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhlgnusn9439uflkn4jvrnhqodo4eq6gtl23afs8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c1im1o32cth2bs)** With the help of patriots like you, the _Center for American Liberty_ fights the transgender movement _in the courts_ because that’s the only way to stop them. And the _Center for American Liberty_ is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach.
---
**#1. They're fighting radical schools**.
---
I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors _encourage_ young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The _Center for American Liberty_ is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! **[When you make your tax-deductible gift today](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbospvs9l6ujclr01pa8r4rbb30ta0fpmjpgn1ng_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c1im1o32cth2bs), **you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals!
---
**#2. They're fighting radical doctors.**
---
There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince _even_ _conservative_ _parents_ that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the _Center for American Liberty_ is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. **[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zugut0i40e89kcpffhl0i29k0v7dju42chq9ia20_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c1im1o32cth2bs)** , you're helping Chloe and the _Center for American Liberty_ make sure this never happens to another child!
---
**#3. They're fighting for _your_ right to speak out against this evil.**
---
Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the _Center for American Liberty's_ specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished!**[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zil12qtnt6ar5661r129kguu7ajhelqbp8dabh0g_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c1im1o32cth2bs)** , you're helping the _Center for American Liberty_ protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you.**[But all I'm asking you to do is make a tax-deductible gift of $30, $50, $75, $100 or even $250 or more today -- before it's too late.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z37de5jcmddl7op4jhimb8e1qkfp36u6l8jjkoj8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c1im1o32cth2bs)** Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. _The Center for American Liberty_ needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... I**t will be my honor to send you my new book _Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind_ as my free gift** **[**when you donate $100 or more to the Center for American Liberty.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8gbisc3ghq1r7dee17jggegip1u98eqkg5tj7fg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c1im1o32cth2bs)** Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: _For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18_ I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Riley Gaines
---
|
---
| | P.S. **[**Please follow this link to make your tax-deductible donation and let me know if you can help the Center for American Liberty defeat the radical transgender movement.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6kljai1tp5m4mqnt2jpf4v1q7tstarfi88gtsag_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c1im1o32cth2bs)** God made man and God made woman. The attempts to deny those basic truths, are attempts to deny the truth of God. Your help is so critical to the _Center for American Liberty's_ work, **[when you donate $100 or more, as my personal "Thank You," I'll send you my new book,_Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind_ for free.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z71pmrathfro9nsllmg792ai1iacscgh40vfobk8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c1im1o32cth2bs)** Please hurry. It's getting hard to hold back this evil without you. I don't want you to look back a year from now and say, "I wish I had done something when I had the chance."
---
[ **Donate**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zosfebn89lmm6oh1jto9ngc85jk4khqcgkmfbovo_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c1im1o32cth2bs)
---
| |
---
| | |
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvmt4pqt3lnguu4d85t1osr4ta1d9sg1bj2bk4j8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c1im1o32cth2bs)
---
The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization fighting against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends.
---
© The Center for American Liberty | [www.libertycenter.org](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4mpj2cvthg0q298ru9i74583s29rickuk6v9u00_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c1im1o32cth2bs)
---
PO Box 200942, Pittsburgh, PA 15251
---

|

The Center for American Liberty needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... It will be my honor to send you my new book Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind as my free gift Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18 I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too. Sincerely, | | Riley Gaines | | | P.S. God made man and God made woman. The attempts to deny those basic truths, are attempts to deny the truth of God. Your help is so critical to the Center for American Liberty's work, Please hurry. It's getting hard to hold back this evil without you. I don't want you to look back a year from now and say, "I wish I had done something when I had the chance." | | | | | The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization fighting against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. © The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 200942, Pittsburgh, PA 15251 | GOP Presidential PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |
