name: Kirk Cameron
subject: No More Blue’s Clues Pride Parades
body:
Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues...

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Fellow Conservative, As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want to say: **_You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children._** Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=734dd93f1d0c4f7f8dcd9a41f0ac1bda&_e=yqhlMoJlzWGsgBoFAKGlycNP4JtuICVuuSllvKgZ3a-5f5jcuwzA_UB08_Qr_eCl8IhvJx6o0uk0oeux6W7sYVkNX0cacSLKqb9amzS2UZnZEug4sHtHW5SVRGDCa6XvIVmj39kegM4y-FE4Mha7AoEMJoJXb5dMRShcqTooKXTPTTMC71paTsWYnyKXTex5ZK0jvAQ39OZ1yZZuG-W0MvIwbT-eB2LU-VSw6MEWvT7T33b_m7tIU3IWfDpHl1lllL-clo1lsCAq-9m4qHFEGH6xk1kIue0PbhUl145XxiDN_NeabNG1bdE6THcO2kyTpz9aTtDIGonCRQmFSjiDmxx7E7gIwMoJ18PNAHtnrd8Z9S61IPx6M8eveHx4Rdfy9L61RaxPJntNss8lkMl1_druKbClWbgcOJ_H6na0BkE%3D)
---
| | And the result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say......and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth. **That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** **[**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=734dd93f1d0c4f7f8dcd9a41f0ac1bda&_e=yqhlMoJlzWGsgBoFAKGlycNP4JtuICVuuSllvKgZ3a-5f5jcuwzA_UB08_Qr_eCl8IhvJx6o0uk0oeux6W7sYVkNX0cacSLKqb9amzS2UZnZEug4sHtHW5SVRGDCa6XvIVmj39kegM4y-FE4Mha7AoEMJoJXb5dMRShcqTooKXTPTTMC71paTsWYnyKXTex5ZK0jvAQ39OZ1yZZuG-W0MvIwbT-eB2LU-VSw6MEWvT7T33b_m7tIU3IWfDpHl1llWNkK4zoUfCPCwjFNQmS5x54VLPw5M96tGx4Yu6zcTs4nZ-l4wyO4Wnnk6itt59pi8ZlKZJ11hKPEIE6E7mFglyHTjwt18To3m59DbHttRnqDBKSbvQWCYV-xEwn1c8cHSKkvmptK_P9MzDpXhEOmuWpsAIwIDNPNB3ufkJHPaHU%3D)** And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[**Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=734dd93f1d0c4f7f8dcd9a41f0ac1bda&_e=yqhlMoJlzWGsgBoFAKGlycNP4JtuICVuuSllvKgZ3a-5f5jcuwzA_UB08_Qr_eCl8IhvJx6o0uk0oeux6W7sYVkNX0cacSLKqb9amzS2UZnZEug4sHtHW5SVRGDCa6XvIVmj39kegM4y-FE4Mha7AoEMJoJXb5dMRShcqTooKXTPTTMC71paTsWYnyKXTex5ZK0jvAQ39OZ1yZZuG-W0MvIwbT-eB2LU-VSw6MEWvT7T33b_m7tIU3IWfDpHl1lldJSJrrBYK3wdVh4lFNmPWj6by5siG8YAXWTDR4capsFTZQi5TCOxqkaax0S_OOaZxWICRPjBTC9ymqHYebq9uz3bMBfxSLQdbIEbDqL3bZ5EDdT6kTGjx5XNfWO9RoOFK74z9qk-gDooBgIbObx_eJH7vzF7pR5sdIvG_AxxofI%3D)** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=734dd93f1d0c4f7f8dcd9a41f0ac1bda&_e=yqhlMoJlzWGsgBoFAKGlycNP4JtuICVuuSllvKgZ3a-5f5jcuwzA_UB08_Qr_eCl8IhvJx6o0uk0oeux6W7sYVkNX0cacSLKqb9amzS2UZnZEug4sHtHW5SVRGDCa6XvIVmj39kegM4y-FE4Mha7AoEMJoJXb5dMRShcqTooKXTPTTMC71paTsWYnyKXTex5ZK0jvAQ39OZ1yZZuG-W0MvIwbT-eB2LU-VSw6MEWvT7T33b_m7tIU3IWfDpHl1llNqrTaoosX6uU6dBZQhfcJKlSTrTgtgnxh3XWpmBYIy-U6zxPxz_CC2SFnO9dyLDHH1BkeHxd6mYsPIys7JyZpfv9JdOz7Xl4EeogKluHvgG4gT3ConFSrcWngDwVOLgkfyGFTuJ7jLYU6wAXpKJFlSL7RocA8ssCRZ1yqJ4mmSk%3D) ** Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a **Founding Supporter** at the $35 and above level, we’ll send you**** all ten episodes of** _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ **for your family to enjoy**** FREE on DVD.** ** Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a **Founding Supporter. **
---

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Stop the indoctrination of our children
body:
Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues...

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Fellow Conservative, As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want to say: **_You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children._** Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z5h9bvjj2jo4jl4i63t0acbethlg8buq7ts4rgh0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c1hmcob6cth2bs)
---
| | And the result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say......and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth. **That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** **[**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zdvfrnmnc41faov9mn2ku8ipal1k6ar44fv9evqo_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c1hmcob6cth2bs)** And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[**Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zggod6am8as0atvnfbqeq4sfro5p4fqavjdkmnlo_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c1hmcob6cth2bs)** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zp5hidi210pctutv5c5g2ho3ghr51d81r1coe4h0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c1hmcob6cth2bs) ** Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a **Founding Supporter** at the $35 and above level, we’ll send you**** all ten episodes of** _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ **for your family to enjoy**** FREE on DVD.** ** Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a **Founding Supporter. **
---
| | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father
---

name: Hillsdale College via Restore Our Nation
subject: “Charles Dickens' A Christmas Carol” – Our free online course
body:
Charles Dickens, a very great novelist, had a special gift for revealing important truths in delightful ways

This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/cQXagn76AFz44ZhEfpU_Ew~~/AARclAA~~)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Charles Dickens, a very great novelist, had a special gift for revealing important truths in delightful ways through unforgettable characters.

To mark this holiday season, Hillsdale College released an online course on what is perhaps Dickens' most beloved novel: _A Christmas Carol_.

The course is taught by the excellent Dwight Lindley, an English professor here at Hillsdale who loves both reading Dickens and teaching Dickens.

In this six-lecture course, Dwight will help you understand more fully the causes of Ebenezer Scrooge's conversion in the novel and what the story teaches us about leading a happy and complete life.

You can use the secure link below to begin experiencing the wisdom and fun of _A Christmas Carol_ today.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/christmas-carol](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/cQXagn76AFz44ZhEfpU_Ew~~/AARclAA~~)**

Let your family and friends know of this free online course as well. We hope it will add meaning and joy to your Christmas celebrations.

Best regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

---

Restore Our Nation
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Peter Berkowitz on Socialism and Capitalism
body:
In recent years, there has been a noticeable shift among young Americans who increasingly favor socialism over capitalism.

| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=29995b3eb9d54ac28a105db4c6839331&_e=Svd4kWM8WvmuyjgF_9WXOa8SgCcllPegoc7CP3zDKK8zD9ikUB_uKOvz6fFGHutp-SKpCsUmm3z5zDM5qvZOoQeyu-USQC_QriZgJlTQZueoyGoJGY5617vYXmOVLg20YjlvGCXpyc-UHE6vXxdnTQh47eqhkHrcibqzCTCWoAvufE2z4Nz6kJUlLHRPSnRYSKsX7M7zA65pRpvSUzdRVDZGKIWu0M2UY11sLe-zfCfkrrZz5Rk29x6WkUhFj_tm6WqyZRGeUCFqimPRJ_ChIXEtgxi7SjcGb8HlkZdfL5eBEnhUmG43vt0XEtS2mPNzjQf2_FEoNXdlIKfydHXZCeoSlntjanORw1RIZm_dQI24m_1nB0l8D9kNvXkeqBk2JZhHftqjiTz2IcQ2QwbyFA%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Friend, In recent years, there has been a noticeable shift among young Americans who increasingly favor socialism over capitalism. This trend raises a critical question: do they fully understand these two systems' historical contexts and real-world outcomes?
---
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=29995b3eb9d54ac28a105db4c6839331&_e=Svd4kWM8WvmuyjgF_9WXOa8SgCcllPegoc7CP3zDKK8zD9ikUB_uKOvz6fFGHutp-SKpCsUmm3z5zDM5qvZOoQeyu-USQC_QriZgJlTQZueoyGoJGY5617vYXmOVLg20YjlvGCXpyc-UHE6vXxdnTQh47eqhkHrcibqzCTCWoAvufE2z4Nz6kJUlLHRPSnRYSKsX7M7zA65pRpvSUzdRVDZGKIWu0M2UY11sLe-zfCfkrrZz5Rk29x6WkUhFj_tmlAKAk51J9kj1tWG0_YXQ3Bbm6sK7b8uYLD39wRBnyDWOV3eMIXz1CNgNy3-2cGvOQY_JU1PdRmy4NcjV3Nkrn_gzekIltAMoAkM-w9d0K5mVVF2css_JpmLF0TvtrfZMDI8fTcMPy0nIcIYe6GAV_w%3D%3D)
---
| | To address this, we have created a new eBook, _**The History of Socialism and Capitalism**_ , authored by two of the most prominent voices in today's political discourse, Hoover Institution senior fellows Niall Ferguson and Victor Davis Hanson.

This new eBook offers a deep dive into the origins, development, and impacts of socialism and capitalism. Each scholar presents an in-depth analysis through two different lenses. It's hard to overstate the relevance of this eBook in today's policy debates, where radical proposals are gaining traction.

Understanding the historical and practical implications of socialism and capitalism is crucial for making informed decisions about our economic and political future. The insights provided by Ferguson and Hanson will equip you with the knowledge to critically evaluate these competing ideologies and their potential impact on society.

Don't miss this opportunity to enhance your understanding of these pivotal economic systems. [Click here to request your free copy of **The History of Socialism and Capitalism** today.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=29995b3eb9d54ac28a105db4c6839331&_e=Svd4kWM8WvmuyjgF_9WXOa8SgCcllPegoc7CP3zDKK8zD9ikUB_uKOvz6fFGHutp-SKpCsUmm3z5zDM5qvZOoQeyu-USQC_QriZgJlTQZueoyGoJGY5617vYXmOVLg20YjlvGCXpyc-UHE6vXxdnTQh47eqhkHrcibqzCTCWoAvufE2z4Nz6kJUlLHRPSnRYSKsX7M7zA65pRpvSUzdRVDZGKIWu0M2UY11sLe-zfCfkrrZz5Rk29x6WkUhFj_tmwgP3j3S5y6FTOqUAo344Y49wuUzticEisH5Qev3P0DMB4aDNHs2KJEYVWUvxnvqSdd5ebvIejE1364TT4BplnV2WtdpmRXjhmg5k8giy3RsdpTWLQQoRPPqIGI2MTyWoz3bSYgRU-5p-nFZzm2zjiA%3D%3D)
Greg Greg Stamps | Online Development Hoover Institution | Stanford University
---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover’s work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._

subject: Bah! Humbug!
body:
Charles Dickens, a very great novelist, had a special gift for revealing important truths in delightful ways

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3a01ccdcc2cf4665b119d18b09d959aa&_e=tTKJnsvgw7zHtFu53lu29qjb-Ifd88WL_LdZfIYMMgD3BCyDVQ66jbke1Vj7tIJHhPH1zruRx-jX1O5mIwCGQ3WYjQfbWl9Ww7pqh2EPQYr1VuUEw43CK1W5tnC8VQdz0Yd2-xpIGX9BOrZxvkz-3-jtMwe9p3oIQ1PfC9yVvHSOjCBIKvBO7Z-ydNAu0V6aMHQiRIBtoZU02sUfdJQq0Pq0ycZ1gsTFzANDNOeg9xQLmJusSbDSs-k4zgRMaMNsbLlKxS4lgjpq0Bg-jTojxTvv2Qs1VcZQRrY_5LHkkdvfA42ldrfkX2hZTBCyFE0BhSWYPZyr7aG-s_CXl6lQC8RmzvhvxTYdzkPhTPBsK8P4b17jt9MeU60dPL6hG1RdaNpzyLU0Ju8JKP6WSXUSNxZeuP-B9yl1Qvt6I7SXmKw%3D)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Charles Dickens, a very great novelist, had a special gift for revealing important truths in delightful ways through unforgettable characters.

To mark this holiday season, Hillsdale College released an online course on what is perhaps Dickens' most beloved novel: _A Christmas Carol_.

The course is taught by the excellent Dwight Lindley, an English professor here at Hillsdale who loves both reading Dickens and teaching Dickens.

In this six-lecture course, Dwight will help you understand more fully the causes of Ebenezer Scrooge's conversion in the novel and what the story teaches us about leading a happy and complete life.

You can use the secure link below to begin experiencing the wisdom and fun of _A Christmas Carol_ today.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/christmas-carol](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3a01ccdcc2cf4665b119d18b09d959aa&_e=tTKJnsvgw7zHtFu53lu29qjb-Ifd88WL_LdZfIYMMgD3BCyDVQ66jbke1Vj7tIJHhPH1zruRx-jX1O5mIwCGQ3WYjQfbWl9Ww7pqh2EPQYr1VuUEw43CK1W5tnC8VQdz0Yd2-xpIGX9BOrZxvkz-3-jtMwe9p3oIQ1PfC9yVvHSOjCBIKvBO7Z-ydNAu0V6aMHQiRIBtoZU02sUfdJQq0Pq0ycZ1gsTFzANDNOeg9xQLmJusSbDSs-k4zgRMaMNsKuyZoQhGkKg-ZYnZa2DgXRhANiexEw_dDbbAFDz3mAonD0fjrOYHVR82SzvqT5uRJy9N7b-rQBPHwr-VtLExwkriibUGrK2XxW8_C8-08K4C3-m8qHMnIhEh816KzNhnyYv5PmZce6kF3K9gv8s9Nb6SfCRUDdxpLCSJCNpCKEM%3D)**

Let your family and friends know of this free online course as well. We hope it will add meaning and joy to your Christmas celebrations.

Best regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

---

| Peter, Kamala Harris ran a historic campaign for president this year – and even though she didn’t win, we want to know: Would you support Kamala in 2028? [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8c642e8b-1d2f-49f2-a4e5-f8bdfcc641b5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
[[YES]](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td9fc9543-87cc-4ca7-b39f-272af599d700/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [[NO]](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td9cd9491-4d72-4560-9cd7-a640073999f5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | Peter, 2028 seems far away but it’ll be here before we know it, and Democrats need to be prepared. We need a strong leader like Kamala Harris to rally Democrats and voters across the aisle to defeat whatever Trump crony is running to replace him. We need you to take this poll so we know what Democrats are thinking is the best path forward in 2028. So please, take a quick moment to respond: Should Kamala Harris Run Again? [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8d680c9e-d51e-4544-9be5-b27d06bc4285/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
[[YES]](https://default.salsalabs.org/T534ca89e-ed32-4539-835b-3a57ea84bdf3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [[NO]](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tadc4b8ab-c90d-4e27-8877-1012ca41ed1c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Looking forward to seeing your response! \- The Blue Amp Action Team

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Peter Berkowitz on Socialism and Capitalism
body:
In recent years, there has been a noticeable shift among young Americans who increasingly favor socialism over capitalism.

| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b6a484851033441aaec98baf39b2da3b&_e=HiYoxxdMSnyNaTgbVqac9FpWCgFxw1tonaK0aaz24WEQ7KfD4mrlYY25TYlYhoSWSYhxR7PtsztXC1clnj_lSGwbdM5OrFZZ7dLZf1dDgKXnPYWrf7069W7H_LFHl9A7frgtpb0xPXfc05LAv2h7QCvI1dD_JXQ__4Rfg5XiG9s-QHDlnadvlWM1wvUi44mSh55184IGuQ_FSeU85r3-na4kgapvmdYtv7ICAePUZcjxgAn_uCRLKA2qtEXWsfXKimLzv8T09MrZYD6dr-9YjfoUBaWWU4ym6H3Q-SZZ9UR5R9a4p14_F842fUIk1eQCzfC63e14CbhXWBgk-r9LBch4pbLA9EyZUI81Xvxkywrx5jPIvnMcelPbYX7xJ0UbEgYsqjQBJgnmITZawW2E6s2ZvVEpZbIeKfUGr0Gz2Cg%3D)
---
| | Dear Friend, In recent years, there has been a noticeable shift among young Americans who increasingly favor socialism over capitalism. This trend raises a critical question: do they fully understand these two systems' historical contexts and real-world outcomes?
---
| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b6a484851033441aaec98baf39b2da3b&_e=HiYoxxdMSnyNaTgbVqac9FpWCgFxw1tonaK0aaz24WEQ7KfD4mrlYY25TYlYhoSWSYhxR7PtsztXC1clnj_lSGwbdM5OrFZZ7dLZf1dDgKXnPYWrf7069W7H_LFHl9A7frgtpb0xPXfc05LAv2h7QCvI1dD_JXQ__4Rfg5XiG9s-QHDlnadvlWM1wvUi44mSh55184IGuQ_FSeU85r3-na4kgapvmdYtv7ICAePUZcjxgAn_uCRLKA2qtEXWsfXKLf0yF8m2n3wT8fKN1H21t-KnfW26OD9yl_lb9CyXxdj1zU3dWxW8vjIfjBcfnMtVGoowuEyK0BlDCPsqbGBKf4Q9yW2k4N31w288eqEHxurUcrG9kOw0hyth0uM8lVcBVu8W6q42WsuzAFJJxC40z7RnrSNymXPuTUlloeLvGpU%3D)
---
| | To address this, we have created a new eBook, _**The History of Socialism and Capitalism**_ , authored by two of the most prominent voices in today's political discourse, Hoover Institution senior fellows Niall Ferguson and Victor Davis Hanson.

This new eBook offers a deep dive into the origins, development, and impacts of socialism and capitalism. Each scholar presents an in-depth analysis through two different lenses. It's hard to overstate the relevance of this eBook in today's policy debates, where radical proposals are gaining traction.

Understanding the historical and practical implications of socialism and capitalism is crucial for making informed decisions about our economic and political future. The insights provided by Ferguson and Hanson will equip you with the knowledge to critically evaluate these competing ideologies and their potential impact on society.

Don't miss this opportunity to enhance your understanding of these pivotal economic systems. [Click here to request your free copy of **The History of Socialism and Capitalism** today.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b6a484851033441aaec98baf39b2da3b&_e=HiYoxxdMSnyNaTgbVqac9FpWCgFxw1tonaK0aaz24WEQ7KfD4mrlYY25TYlYhoSWSYhxR7PtsztXC1clnj_lSGwbdM5OrFZZ7dLZf1dDgKXnPYWrf7069W7H_LFHl9A7frgtpb0xPXfc05LAv2h7QCvI1dD_JXQ__4Rfg5XiG9s-QHDlnadvlWM1wvUi44mSh55184IGuQ_FSeU85r3-na4kgapvmdYtv7ICAePUZcjxgAn_uCRLKA2qtEXWsfXK7RfpTzSrL5ejtpJlBVV4fO5Df36sNs5s1Y1AkmMwTABwrZMNzZpvFyZ5XtMDxCXVekjdwXwsTLH5vqNm41Sj4CK-l1QoZ_nwLmCPSX9Hwj56TevzKvuUD6UR45dfiTa_99ncyjP6eyDJBHaGdu2nZQl0ZH3Jd7R7kdrogPyCzj8%3D)
Greg Greg Stamps | Online Development Hoover Institution | Stanford University
---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover 's work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._

Hoover Institution 434 Galvez Mall Stanford University Stanford CA USA 94305
---

Reclaiming American Freedom
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

The insights provided by Ferguson and Hanson will equip you with the knowledge to critically evaluate these competing ideologies and their potential impact on society. Don't miss this opportunity to enhance your understanding of these pivotal economic systems. Greg Greg Stamps | Online Development Hoover Institution | Stanford University With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover 's work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world. I know, I know. It's a little early to be thinking about 2025. But since you're someone who cares about liberty, I wanted to make sure you had this chance to receive your 2025 calendar.

This calendar is a small thank-you gift for everyone who helps our efforts to reach and teach Americans about our nation's great heritage of liberty.

name: Hillsdale College via Inside Scoop Politics
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
Charles Dickens, a very great novelist, had a special gift for revealing important truths in delightful ways

This sponsored message from Inside Scoop Politics is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyUkTGvnDAQhH-N6UDrtTm4guIkHlKkvJdIV6RExizcSgYjr0n-fnR5l_RpZ6SZ_XZ-vI_vjgPv64fbqGORMcm4u_HBIZT-kVhy6V2KoXQjAtpSYwl61MXc1ajbpS2o040xUNu6heLRtdrbqUW4gF0MLr4F29QXnBpTG3ATFdw9czSC1lAbsNVk6brMU33VHgiaRVk4j9llqngXnkl8jMcRA2f2UsW0FqF75HyIMjeFg8Ih7oF3qp43y-wCVTSfCgcfzyQkCodEK0um9BT_MG1OPrGUGcQr04OGK34AWvyKuv_Wv73dFV7OvI0Sz-RJmf5IUQ7ymff1ZW0087kp09PmOLxE77bD8bor0__r-qx6-XHPtGdl-tv4_VZ-ud_Lvw8pUjcfvzgElkujLKzP2MrHrcj_M83PDn8HAAD___MPmE4)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Charles Dickens, a very great novelist, had a special gift for revealing important truths in delightful ways through unforgettable characters.

To mark this holiday season, Hillsdale College released an online course on what is perhaps Dickens' most beloved novel: _A Christmas Carol_.

The course is taught by the excellent Dwight Lindley, an English professor here at Hillsdale who loves both reading Dickens and teaching Dickens.

In this six-lecture course, Dwight will help you understand more fully the causes of Ebenezer Scrooge's conversion in the novel and what the story teaches us about leading a happy and complete life.

You can use the secure link below to begin experiencing the wisdom and fun of _A Christmas Carol_ today.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/christmas-carol](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyUkTGvnDAQhH-N6UDrtTm4guIkHlKkvJdIV6RExizcSgYjr0n-fnR5l_RpZ6SZ_XZ-vI_vjgPv64fbqGORMcm4u_HBIZT-kVhy6V2KoXQjAtpSYwl61MXc1ajbpS2o040xUNu6heLRtdrbqUW4gF0MLr4F29QXnBpTG3ATFdw9czSC1lAbsNVk6brMU33VHgiaRVk4j9llqngXnkl8jMcRA2f2UsW0FqF75HyIMjeFg8Ih7oF3qp43y-wCVTSfCgcfzyQkCodEK0um9BT_MG1OPrGUGcQr04OGK34AWvyKuv_Wv73dFV7OvI0Sz-RJmf5IUQ7ymff1ZW0087kp09PmOLxE77bD8bor0__r-qx6-XHPtGdl-tv4_VZ-ud_Lvw8pUjcfvzgElkujLKzP2MrHrcj_M83PDn8HAAD___MPmE4)**

Let your family and friends know of this free online course as well. We hope it will add meaning and joy to your Christmas celebrations.

Best regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

---

Inside Scoop Politics
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Sen. Ted Cruz
subject: Your continued input is critical
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Here’s a personal link, just for you

name: Defend The Constitution
subject: Peter Berkowitz on Socialism and Capitalism
body:
In recent years, there has been a noticeable shift among young Americans who increasingly favor socialism over capitalism.

| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8376c05125f040629b0a6386680eaf6f&_e=ai__ut4Jku0xqvt-fs5G27o6bQoa7VwirzcdiiebtkR_U4NY6NP85ssXWTF-SlHvU3lki_v0ceXDi-WmrEVwEp4OFm9SMdjzOFVv2sR3PdVvme1HqIdcs0N5mABqG7CJSTwVVkgH2miJUwgOUGJLcN-LfjAWtvwcwX_AyDIql83XynlU49Xm7bY6cD1BaWvKNfVgUdVrMOCqYfICS7iBbjr9qKAFwEOb13WJ9o6FM7p_dffGrxUMs7tOvFtU2kvdQ5CAqtd4kcDKTv1my92wSxj8Rh36VTrDDt3AULUkjJi1P6inRjdUWbHWH7QAEmoG9-hOgyn7PP3WXyBkFNT2E9pR53zWY70sFvzwc47z6rPUGePMfOx2eJQ1e4RQCU-wa8jUlO6vaeofYhV4cYn3Yg%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Friend, In recent years, there has been a noticeable shift among young Americans who increasingly favor socialism over capitalism. This trend raises a critical question: do they fully understand these two systems' historical contexts and real-world outcomes?
---
| [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8376c05125f040629b0a6386680eaf6f&_e=ai__ut4Jku0xqvt-fs5G27o6bQoa7VwirzcdiiebtkR_U4NY6NP85ssXWTF-SlHvU3lki_v0ceXDi-WmrEVwEp4OFm9SMdjzOFVv2sR3PdVvme1HqIdcs0N5mABqG7CJSTwVVkgH2miJUwgOUGJLcN-LfjAWtvwcwX_AyDIql83XynlU49Xm7bY6cD1BaWvKNfVgUdVrMOCqYfICS7iBbjr9qKAFwEOb13WJ9o6FM7p_dffGrxUMs7tOvFtU2kvdXEYAr35nh8N3ojhDRKSjG-TMsOuL5jOBrviZy2W4f_UzreJKlatXErWkHl7UibMFCydk5d1yVLsWMEmP612b83R5w5iQdfdVhJAr-C9l22ZKFeRVsUvMTvzMI9ybVhJXNhyDxtdq-V7yQjwOovjV_w%3D%3D)
---
| | To address this, we have created a new eBook, _**The History of Socialism and Capitalism**_ , authored by two of the most prominent voices in today's political discourse, Hoover Institution senior fellows Niall Ferguson and Victor Davis Hanson.

This new eBook offers a deep dive into the origins, development, and impacts of socialism and capitalism. Each scholar presents an in-depth analysis through two different lenses. It's hard to overstate the relevance of this eBook in today's policy debates, where radical proposals are gaining traction.

Understanding the historical and practical implications of socialism and capitalism is crucial for making informed decisions about our economic and political future. The insights provided by Ferguson and Hanson will equip you with the knowledge to critically evaluate these competing ideologies and their potential impact on society.

Don't miss this opportunity to enhance your understanding of these pivotal economic systems. [Click here to request your free copy of **The History of Socialism and Capitalism** today.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8376c05125f040629b0a6386680eaf6f&_e=ai__ut4Jku0xqvt-fs5G27o6bQoa7VwirzcdiiebtkR_U4NY6NP85ssXWTF-SlHvU3lki_v0ceXDi-WmrEVwEp4OFm9SMdjzOFVv2sR3PdVvme1HqIdcs0N5mABqG7CJSTwVVkgH2miJUwgOUGJLcN-LfjAWtvwcwX_AyDIql83XynlU49Xm7bY6cD1BaWvKNfVgUdVrMOCqYfICS7iBbjr9qKAFwEOb13WJ9o6FM7p_dffGrxUMs7tOvFtU2kvdWXqziAexebzbjh65iOqIhASQvz9VqPFEhD6V1A1TXQsQt0UTe38rp3E-aBby5C1vNX_WQgtsJS6XjkHVzc0TezdQqxyrFt6QenPzp-Zut1YR0v8yQ5i_LdMKA0wP_eOwSltsyWpHXg2o6yLYHQlkpQ%3D%3D)
Greg Greg Stamps | Online Development Hoover Institution | Stanford University
---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover’s work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._

Hoover Institution 434 Galvez Mall Stanford University Stanford CA USA 94305

Merry Christmas, Friend!

It's that time of year again, and we're FILLED with holiday cheer this year after President Trump's HISTORIC victory.

**[House GOP is putting together a BEAUTIFUL and FESTIVE Christmas card for President Trump, and we are inviting you to sign it!](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f84e1012a4ec44d99d169224f4c3b79d&_e=KDuPtN8tYkvOO-FRGuAAScPFoNcrDqr0INS0y2KbeFRKkLCTK05reHzoxmnqUvenuuodqvEBistVqxBGHVa-ESZmQELY-3J4PMCJKQDj-Ci6blw1u9CtaOR_r2yxHmuM-UvTXR1mYYAHlkJCCaJH7k6iXpfGvg74aqrK12z9LzWGGmihPbKZRmCgRZUPoEU-B0f-mppY2xUnnHzFYlHf5k25IFAaz2MAA07ItIDlfvDo8UZL5F6Ya87_CCxiEb8XBzdP-DO6uHB-qWUUUM9mQ55_uL3cU4BkHmBcSdrpsrw03O5GHVFmPbmBWhGVKPYWBUHDhbmIP3l2Oi-wqVJxSdzilG_UjyoxHyxOGlqW7jL3EfpBYFkCLBGt0SzI6POqowT8p-j4BDufn0RGTgHnyVcS7SiMk0VkI4qqFvxSC7sA-crwqTVLL4CxyitpBfpNafsnumrl6xZuosNG0_b73g%3D%3D "House GOP is putting together a BEAUTIFUL and FESTIVE Christmas card for President Trump, and we are inviting you to sign it!")**

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: How we stop the Hollywood Groomers
body:
Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues...

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Fellow Conservative, As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want to say: **_You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children._** Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1bf2606b1dc74f6c8e075f4f4e0bc39d&_e=151xiRLYAN1q_6mu-50VDJgYuL1ITpUuNtAcs1QTeE5lwgTgV4K0S_MEeClovCzFlbDElYjLM5h9M8JIYNfUF_e4RWZDUWavWkq-XcS2o4SBMk9Ngg95KkGm-azpCqYGe5iWojkKY2zvuWcIYDpu-W_xuOnZoMxGhCTHyPGP-5hTc7jJ2L9ta0lXHw-DXBWSwrpeSJPiCHhFW1RHoclqg3tCPjRHPDru2B6x5X1759x8Gr_llEV8-Mm1Vf-DjkKRWawfGcAoRePfu2DyqAePLuDlPcp6eGM_L9ITq_TniFT8e3L65fIutzJCeXdsOma7VG8KBCIHeb2WnTV6aETYl4t99JvLpXJQVQLgyYdA2MnBUGIscYDYzHPGN7VdTHfE5iXUaCgNddLRYXVTYGwfQI807rqzKHFnK7-RzTQaY0Y%3D)
---
| | And the result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. But you and I know your ideas aren't old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth. **That 's why I'm reaching out to you. body:

# Sunday, December 1, 2024
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1913, Henry Ford started the first moving assembly line in the automotive industry, churning out Ford Model Ts at the company’s Highland Park Assembly Plant and transforming manufacturing. ([See Video](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z0FrhDAUBOBfk9xW8t6LMR5yaHHtaUsplB4lmrimxM3iZhX_fbH3XmfgG-b70l1siOF2fbezN3lMHQqUJ8CTgM7ZEPdOcmdG79ET9wYqIlGiqoBPpqbejUoPNbiSbK9IEgJgjV4OSirNgzk0QAEAJLAs6tqOg0bRV5q0hopJ4V3IaSl-UrjlyY9xT6tfiiHNPJop5_uD0QvDlmG7bVuxp2d-9v7oj8TmYWLUroyat8_Xr3PjGvlx5otx9y3EGB7qmLjONsQ_Mv93cTX4GwAA__9lZ1Ca))

If you've turned your attention to Christmas shopping, you might like today's list of 30 items for all ages and interests. It's got everything from [book lights to beanies!](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LuO5CAQheGnsTMsKPAtINjEWW-6oYXtoqkVNi2oaYu3H_XkEx_p6NP_77E-HEW6nn_diZZ9WkGCEQqEVOvhKNbVtIf1iIC6RatGrWUPw6jaYA2MziGA9vustsHsez9Mvd6Ult5sk2nJft4USKWUltB38-z8PoHcxklPkxobI_EgTrn7n-jigD7W9Mbc7elsow3Mr9LoPw0sDSz3fXfVhZQ-awNLJI-Fa8QGFg4otBQbFhZ7yFT4dEU8yXMRPmWBb8w1XSjSJWr6yiKkSIerIlJhAUrOch5g7gKfsc32eN0UI5XhI3yejuKPiH8r9LbwHQAA__9_w2hn)

Today's sponsor is [Percent](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFvwyAUhH8NbIngPRuTgaFSlC1dO1oUHjYVGMvGifLvKzq0U9f7dKdP93Ef7zamuEzvNpOpoYwgoDtJOAk5ehvTa-y4N4EICDkZOSCKHtQg-WxIkFd90Nij1D1hEEF1XjvnB3VB63k0bU2CkFKigP58udjgNIjPQaPWcmCdIB9r2c5fJS51ppBe5UHb2ZXMk5lrXXeGbwxuDG4rbY6W2lgL8HbUPO7l2BwxvP6VGahGMvl4ZIbXhZ57olp_ibN5tXFaGF49uabIN-PXZ0wp7qpJTdnG9CNR_zvlYeA7AAD__5KfZEs). If you don't know much about private credit investments, this would be a great time to learn more.
|
---
## Trump Meets With Trudeau
President-elect Donald Trump [met with Canadian Prime Minister Justin Trudeau](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDGOrDAQRE9jMiO7DWMIHPyEbH66IWpwG3plAzKeQXP7FZtvVCWVVHp6X8_xiRx5W_5jIlfCPoKCRmqQSo8eOX7GpvIuEAGZipy2xqgWHlZXq7NocOqbxpteW0OtNfbR9SZMWkHr27Zid79pUFpro6Ct-x7D3IGabGe6TlvRKPJc9lx_77yVlUL87G_K9bynKrq1lOMU5p-AQcBwXVc9T-dG13nvAoa7Chhm3NCjLPnlCV93pkMWzByCLGsmLPLIPNMpMVHmGbdTJswSZcRll4mo8LYIGKrs_HFxjHw-brYlIcdflvKXm7eDnwAAAP__-PlnFA) at Mar-a-Lago on Friday evening, where they discussed tariffs, drug policy, and immigration. The meeting came after Trump signaled potential 25% tariffs on goods from Mexico and Canada until the countries stop the flow of drugs and illegal immigrants into the United States. Trudeau has cited the [United States-Mexico-Canada Agreement](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00D-r4zAQBPBPI3cy2pXjP4WKg8NdjuuuNIq0sveQoyBvEvLtH379q4cZfsy_63L1nPm-_vE7OUllQYOdBtQGlug5f5auiS4RIdmGHAzWmgv2AzSbm25h7IKN0AOYlMIwBDJmBDN1kAYaG3bnGqABAGvw0k6TT2FEcxtGO44wqM5QZCm1_V_4Lhul_Ckvqm0oe5PdJvI4lP2lcFY4-1u40_to13LGCue_JbNwOBTOUp_7Q0t9RvJPvROJ3n3V2a9F-52jFl85JS1bJS9n45BSP8rOHJX9DdBbnMx0aaqLjzfnzEd_6tbdc_7WyE_vvBx-BQAA__-hiWX2) negotiations as a sign he believes he can work with Trump on trade and avoid a trade war. Mexico and Canada are [the second and third top suppliers of goods](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOhCAURb9GOww8VJiCYhu72XZL84TnyAbBADNm_n7jbr3lzUluTs7Xfb6jDz4-PnEnU9c0A4eeCWBczA59eM9968xKBCRbMkJJyQcYlWg3oywtdlwGNS7kNN1kP4Ibeq2lVgKta7253gRwIYTkMHS3G65WA1-UlloL1fScnK8pd9_Jx7rRGt7pRbmzaW-D2Wo9SiM_GpgamM7z7OJiI53l4g1MRwq-elsamFyKGByr-bkfDUwWIzos13aET7YT1fJH2Y6ZBXwkVjH7dS2sbpmwFpZtRKEBlGyzccfpQ_BlvCQfO_rwK1X_i_Qy8BMAAP__qQRq_g) to the U.S., accounting for nearly 30% of trade volumes. Canada sends about 75% of its total exports to the U.S.
## Heavy Snow, Frigid Temperatures on the Way
The first big snowfall of the season is forecast to bring [2 to 3 feet of snow](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00D1u6zAQBODTSB0N7lI_VMHiNe782pTCklxaTNaiITE2dPtA6VMOBhh8mI_bfKMseb3_pwe7msqMGjsFqDTMkbIcc9dGl5iRTcsORmN0j8MI7eKQwNs0gmcTsfd96PqJ0oAcicxE2GZ3rgFqADAa-8s0UQoWtR-tsRbGptMccy3b5bPktS6c5Cgv3i6hPFpxS63PvTH_Grw2eKXnyu_9rM6w1RyEG7wKfbHilDhUta_lrfx3SiRF-Syyq6VIjnSoutGLRXGPg7YwaU9sEc0wGY46EQcYOtuFdnPx-c4ieR9O3v1BWX459a97Xg5_AgAA__9mm2Yv) to towns along lakes Erie and Ontario through Monday. An [Arctic outbreak of cold air](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00L1u7CAUBOCnwR0WHNZ_BcVt3O1tU1oYDuuTxbAyyMhvHzl9upFGGn2ar-fyNBQovv6bHXXxaQEBDy6BC7k4Q-FaHo3THhFQNajloJTooB9ks-lJ9VO_gkM7gRqNFx467LwHP629c74hfa9JEFJKJaBrp8l4O4JYh1GNoxzYQ6Cjko72O1EsG_pwpROP1qa9CXor5ZOZ-sdgZjDXWlu75og13z2D-Y4MZpuC42swufBKseDBK5qy4cGDeSNH79EWnmOqPGLlVzrefCe70ctE_sEY8xVOE8kwmJtDu0-lECj3N--1Gwq_nPLXPaeGnwAAAP__lQZp9A) will expand south and east and bring dangerously cold wind chills into the Northern Plains and Upper Midwest. Several locations in Michigan and Ohio have recorded [snowfall totals between 24-30 inches](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7GOrCAUxvGngW4IHBzRguImN3az7ZYG4SBsUAyyknn7jdtv-TXfL__P1_wyMcV9_TAb6urzDBy6h4AHF7MzMb3njjrtEQElRS2UlPwJvRI06KcxyoAE3vveybEblhFGa43n3C7cKRr1_SaACyEkhycbR-PtAHxRgxwGoUjH0cWaC_vKca8BfXrnCwuzeaNJh1qPk8h_BCYCU2uNNTQ1YGFrvghMZ_4uFglMtoR77rlt5mChbonI6YyOyP8pV1q0O1pMKZ79Ta6biemXqH8lXxp-AgAA__-XilgC). The Buffalo Bills called for [volunteers willing to shovel snow](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00L-O8yAQBPCnwZ2t3QX_SUHxNXT52istsJeY08ZEhouVtz8l_dUjjX4zX9f56pOk_fbf39nWmGcCMi1SCzivPslrNs1qIzOxbtjiqDX0NIzYbBa0iSEsvl-w98BxhGHUCCH0safVXJpk321IgIgaqO8uFx-XiSCMk54mHJUBXlPNR_ed0143jvLKTz66Jd8bsVutj6L0P0VOkTvPs-Py2N-hIrdHUeRKzcdLkZsVubQqcoaGSaMBRS78xOgltyGJlLbs-WzLlp8sfJT2s7OwL3lvDrs-ziSSyvAm3e4-yYdQ_7rkaek3AAD__5hxYRw) at Highmark Stadium, where more than 2 feet of snow is possible before Sunday night’s game against the San Francisco 49ers.
## **Syrian Military Confirms Rebels Enter Aleppo **
The Syrian military said on Saturday that dozens of its troops had been killed during [an insurgent attack in northwestern Syria](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00L2OtSAQxvGrwQ4Dg58FxdvYnbfd0owwHmeDYoAc491v3H7rJ_nnl-frNb-QAx_v_7iTLWucQUEjNUilZ48c7rmpvF2JgExFVvfGqBa6XlebbXsaGje6dkHovBpw6QCNHxfox2Ztx4rtU9OgtNZGQVuPI65uALX0gxkG3YtGkecSU_0d-SgbreGOH0q1i3sV7FbKmYX5J2ASMF3XVbtjcc8oYHrSAiatBUxGCZjynRgPmWihkGW-iE7JR4kSA51nlJj2W7oQM2WJnM6YisTDyxTR53ore6iS9efFIXDuHtt7Rw6_lvLXNx8LPwEAAP__X5BlqA). Rebels entered the government-held city of Aleppo led by the Islamist Hayat Tahrir al-Sham in a surprise attack that began earlier this week. name: Kirk Cameron
subject: How we stop the Hollywood Groomers
body:
Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues...

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Fellow Conservative, As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want to say: **_You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children._** Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/X0Ngm2rhkgSlI8UTWGzNiA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpLuYEP0S4aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9icmF2ZS1ib29rcy80ZWIzOWNmZS00N2U0LTQwODQtYjBiZS05OWZkYzkxMjVkYjY_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVWJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQxMTE0X0JER19CUkFWRV9JR0dZMl9FTV9SRVZfUEEtUk9OJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVJPTi0yMDI0MTIwMVcDc3BjQgpnRtJNTGcgPDeeUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
---
| | And the result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say......and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth. **That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** **[**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/X0Ngm2rhkgSlI8UTWGzNiA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpLuYEP0S4aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9icmF2ZS1ib29rcy80ZWIzOWNmZS00N2U0LTQwODQtYjBiZS05OWZkYzkxMjVkYjY_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVWJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQxMTE0X0JER19CUkFWRV9JR0dZMl9FTV9SRVZfUEEtUk9OJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVJPTi0yMDI0MTIwMVcDc3BjQgpnRtJNTGcgPDeeUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)** And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[**Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/X0Ngm2rhkgSlI8UTWGzNiA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpLuYEP0S4aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9icmF2ZS1ib29rcy80ZWIzOWNmZS00N2U0LTQwODQtYjBiZS05OWZkYzkxMjVkYjY_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVWJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQxMTE0X0JER19CUkFWRV9JR0dZMl9FTV9SRVZfUEEtUk9OJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVJPTi0yMDI0MTIwMVcDc3BjQgpnRtJNTGcgPDeeUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/X0Ngm2rhkgSlI8UTWGzNiA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpLuYEP0S4aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9icmF2ZS1ib29rcy80ZWIzOWNmZS00N2U0LTQwODQtYjBiZS05OWZkYzkxMjVkYjY_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVWJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQxMTE0X0JER19CUkFWRV9JR0dZMl9FTV9SRVZfUEEtUk9OJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVJPTi0yMDI0MTIwMVcDc3BjQgpnRtJNTGcgPDeeUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) ** Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a **Founding Supporter** at the $35 and above level, we’ll send you**** all ten episodes of** _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ **for your family to enjoy**** FREE on DVD.** ** Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a **Founding Supporter. **
---
| | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father

body:

| | Dear Fellow Conservative,
---
| | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery _slide_. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" _male_ swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me.
---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5b1619f5d8cc430d82f83df6c6bfdd01&_e=CoHugb3v0w8bm4DNj0eXgPmEYWER9tddMcM4QwgsEOTQTJ9dF2CbvqC5lQy3pAvc5HAIv_sDtwoSbPYajXf4dxMW48MrH9Fo19QcZbcu_fAeRF8PyUbku6TK-62rd_DOLYb_HdroMFOMDOEmPmKSlWUTN-iA1YLrkxokgwOo-41VWYi5RmRZu72yKxTcQ0lolSXS7538yPMVhO0JxmuScSsuSQ29qN9uwkyZjnCvbpDWauDq4xdkUT7YXwjHzovBJqqBkn1OwLL0N9vEIzWxO-agb7CIqIqxaO-HYR61GuzO04KKWdCN5_9vhlrbZLbLRAL6XlnPUg-EA0-2v0m5kYzKHUnrRnWwKbd1-F6ybYsy6a9b52LTjDZ9H4To6ucnXDdPXpYjXQ0BVcT0AvNYaw%3D%3D)
---
| | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. **[That's why I'm asking you to stand with me today -- before it's too late.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5b1619f5d8cc430d82f83df6c6bfdd01&_e=CoHugb3v0w8bm4DNj0eXgPmEYWER9tddMcM4QwgsEOTQTJ9dF2CbvqC5lQy3pAvc5HAIv_sDtwoSbPYajXf4dxMW48MrH9Fo19QcZbcu_fAeRF8PyUbku6TK-62rd_DOLYb_HdroMFOMDOEmPmKSlWUTN-iA1YLrkxokgwOo-41VWYi5RmRZu72yKxTcQ0lolSXS7538yPMVhO0JxmuScSsuSQ29qN9uwkyZjnCvbpDWauDq4xdkUT7YXwjHzovBWyV_bzZhwvYQ5rmKwQk0WIkPTVi4W5NogUMHkW5iwi5VP7h1r34BqSL-5hTK1r7EpbSSP_BQyi99zb4iWQyUU2iamu4d0xJcjqNFAZZNlhchr5qs1ZTCwT-_7cka2LFEtPjkOZQZG-hHNl4AFwzEUQ%3D%3D)** My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."_Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women."_ It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."_Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot."_ Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.**God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that.** Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.**Your chance is right now -- and right by my side.** **[Please stand with me against the radical transgender movement by making an urgent tax-deductible donation today -- before it's too late.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5b1619f5d8cc430d82f83df6c6bfdd01&_e=CoHugb3v0w8bm4DNj0eXgPmEYWER9tddMcM4QwgsEOTQTJ9dF2CbvqC5lQy3pAvc5HAIv_sDtwoSbPYajXf4dxMW48MrH9Fo19QcZbcu_fAeRF8PyUbku6TK-62rd_DOLYb_HdroMFOMDOEmPmKSlWUTN-iA1YLrkxokgwOo-41VWYi5RmRZu72yKxTcQ0lolSXS7538yPMVhO0JxmuScSsuSQ29qN9uwkyZjnCvbpDWauDq4xdkUT7YXwjHzovB4TvgUjEoFVY-GB1wnpMEuIl2GHPA7tl-pGvkEQ2Op2BwNUBVzTv27vepZB5g0PuFuYBjXKW0xQ5mUoiXKICANxCVvnF_-ZnTM22s7wwHUe3DW6rezVtOz14d5LFdLEeATW6Cnc-BcwcTmufkvUBXOQ%3D%3D) ** Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No."
---
>> But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations.
---
The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. **It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty.** **[And your tax-deductible gift today is going straight to help them.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5b1619f5d8cc430d82f83df6c6bfdd01&_e=CoHugb3v0w8bm4DNj0eXgPmEYWER9tddMcM4QwgsEOTQTJ9dF2CbvqC5lQy3pAvc5HAIv_sDtwoSbPYajXf4dxMW48MrH9Fo19QcZbcu_fAeRF8PyUbku6TK-62rd_DOLYb_HdroMFOMDOEmPmKSlWUTN-iA1YLrkxokgwOo-41VWYi5RmRZu72yKxTcQ0lolSXS7538yPMVhO0JxmuScSsuSQ29qN9uwkyZjnCvbpDWauDq4xdkUT7YXwjHzovBjU3oCaRMXRIM-r62Isd7YBmXkoSMJjj9sdYDxpcZ3fl6219Vv1O0s5qdIsNJUioUCu0mM7ynxs4VbbRxZQuZL4JCZC21fxvGeiXVnN8tGQNLIEkw4-07owABsdhMEUvQb8XzbFNW8z6PM95uHJIGxA%3D%3D)** With the help of patriots like you, the _Center for American Liberty_ fights the transgender movement _in the courts_ because that’s the only way to stop them. And the _Center for American Liberty_ is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach.
---
**#1. They're fighting radical schools**.
---
I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors _encourage_ young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The _Center for American Liberty_ is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! **[When you make your tax-deductible gift today](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5b1619f5d8cc430d82f83df6c6bfdd01&_e=CoHugb3v0w8bm4DNj0eXgPmEYWER9tddMcM4QwgsEOTQTJ9dF2CbvqC5lQy3pAvc5HAIv_sDtwoSbPYajXf4dxMW48MrH9Fo19QcZbcu_fAeRF8PyUbku6TK-62rd_DOLYb_HdroMFOMDOEmPmKSlWUTN-iA1YLrkxokgwOo-41VWYi5RmRZu72yKxTcQ0lolSXS7538yPMVhO0JxmuScSsuSQ29qN9uwkyZjnCvbpDWauDq4xdkUT7YXwjHzovBuShHjCg6mYDqcfwdBQZ20shyHLnE6unhTd7HA6C2AMkRL6VsIt55AefBBxg1h6MQ4b5qptCfcLjpM_kUckeKDtqwpUU_DLzG3spiXRADQ8vC4qLsGwyV07HMoqawUI46kMOlvDMHl_NPkg44hqTVDg%3D%3D), **you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals!
---
**#2. They're fighting radical doctors.**
---
There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince _even_ _conservative_ _parents_ that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the _Center for American Liberty_ is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. **[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5b1619f5d8cc430d82f83df6c6bfdd01&_e=CoHugb3v0w8bm4DNj0eXgPmEYWER9tddMcM4QwgsEOTQTJ9dF2CbvqC5lQy3pAvc5HAIv_sDtwoSbPYajXf4dxMW48MrH9Fo19QcZbcu_fAeRF8PyUbku6TK-62rd_DOLYb_HdroMFOMDOEmPmKSlWUTN-iA1YLrkxokgwOo-41VWYi5RmRZu72yKxTcQ0lolSXS7538yPMVhO0JxmuScSsuSQ29qN9uwkyZjnCvbpDWauDq4xdkUT7YXwjHzovB_qr0vep8hl6LgbQd7aIBmPlymVkSp60Vb_mym3CPuPbdjBeYpboZPMMD202D4Ny7AXERBNzBEOZrn8R9T0pmVDuirVVHxpNIf-xYYhaxS7vTLzEQA0KBoAUt1atXI9DlKMFsg8mPc-WPxUi0hfxxTQ%3D%3D)** , you're helping Chloe and the _Center for American Liberty_ make sure this never happens to another child!
---
**#3. They're fighting for _your_ right to speak out against this evil.**
---
Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the _Center for American Liberty's_ specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished!**[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5b1619f5d8cc430d82f83df6c6bfdd01&_e=CoHugb3v0w8bm4DNj0eXgPmEYWER9tddMcM4QwgsEOTQTJ9dF2CbvqC5lQy3pAvc5HAIv_sDtwoSbPYajXf4dxMW48MrH9Fo19QcZbcu_fAeRF8PyUbku6TK-62rd_DOLYb_HdroMFOMDOEmPmKSlWUTN-iA1YLrkxokgwOo-41VWYi5RmRZu72yKxTcQ0lolSXS7538yPMVhO0JxmuScSsuSQ29qN9uwkyZjnCvbpDWauDq4xdkUT7YXwjHzovBneEkGHPw-nrUHKJMnpBa-SWltoiAl4qJqK5RarTtoj48shcogDxxryuPaHlzKbKWMlFn1JQq1_mmRS74m7-zJeEGxyvE_sYt3AwX-TakFpGFv-AssxBos4FIzu4LpOQaJx59aqdU93vbVVAayKQG9A%3D%3D)** , you're helping the _Center for American Liberty_ protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you.**[But all I'm asking you to do is make a tax-deductible gift of $30, $50, $75, $100 or even $250 or more today -- before it's too late.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5b1619f5d8cc430d82f83df6c6bfdd01&_e=CoHugb3v0w8bm4DNj0eXgPmEYWER9tddMcM4QwgsEOTQTJ9dF2CbvqC5lQy3pAvc5HAIv_sDtwoSbPYajXf4dxMW48MrH9Fo19QcZbcu_fAeRF8PyUbku6TK-62rd_DOLYb_HdroMFOMDOEmPmKSlWUTN-iA1YLrkxokgwOo-41VWYi5RmRZu72yKxTcQ0lolSXS7538yPMVhO0JxmuScSsuSQ29qN9uwkyZjnCvbpDWauDq4xdkUT7YXwjHzovBOsH88m04c-RjpIoUi6GpzcybK2rTyrF3hQxHcrMKM8V_2fngOo_O8hmF6X4pX3_vYPXXWfzjt1l1eBtfy8zgeb6dkOYUypSJMbrz2L84TJ_YPOe9xVfj4HZXIpZqc1I9pMLmrfwttj3bp0jocNo9zg%3D%3D)** Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. _The Center for American Liberty_ needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... I**t will be my honor to send you my new book _Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind_ as my free gift** **[**when you donate $100 or more to the Center for American Liberty.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5b1619f5d8cc430d82f83df6c6bfdd01&_e=CoHugb3v0w8bm4DNj0eXgPmEYWER9tddMcM4QwgsEOTQTJ9dF2CbvqC5lQy3pAvc5HAIv_sDtwoSbPYajXf4dxMW48MrH9Fo19QcZbcu_fAeRF8PyUbku6TK-62rd_DOLYb_HdroMFOMDOEmPmKSlWUTN-iA1YLrkxokgwOo-41VWYi5RmRZu72yKxTcQ0lolSXS7538yPMVhO0JxmuScSsuSQ29qN9uwkyZjnCvbpDWauDq4xdkUT7YXwjHzovB8tCV1j8d-8hjNmBSRT-bnkQOtdLFu1p4eTNDWI05PXVBCRmu_W66JVOtLNOpK2cw3JzjlBLMtdlQpxHxpC-xznGFR6O_aw3eF_dZcHrBDV1MHsWU9ghNynip1aMaLCQomhg1ZjADJ2okOePB36xmaw%3D%3D)** Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: _For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18_ I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Riley Gaines

| | P.S. **[**Please follow this link to make your tax-deductible donation and let me know if you can help the Center for American Liberty defeat the radical transgender movement.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5b1619f5d8cc430d82f83df6c6bfdd01&_e=CoHugb3v0w8bm4DNj0eXgPmEYWER9tddMcM4QwgsEOTQTJ9dF2CbvqC5lQy3pAvc5HAIv_sDtwoSbPYajXf4dxMW48MrH9Fo19QcZbcu_fAeRF8PyUbku6TK-62rd_DOLYb_HdroMFOMDOEmPmKSlWUTN-iA1YLrkxokgwOo-41VWYi5RmRZu72yKxTcQ0lolSXS7538yPMVhO0JxmuScSsuSQ29qN9uwkyZjnCvbpDWauDq4xdkUT7YXwjHzovBkwuzHJp4cM1dAfDdODGBj88VHyjDC2Deq8wmoQRdx6IPOpmFfXMOtm500j57mKciKQACjLvZs7mer08TkTiVdzoe1_STxV0DsnE7ADJNBz_-AfyiDtb_D90YSRStn1k8HGULndjKHJbCMe3pl08V8A%3D%3D)** God made man and God made woman. clean_body: I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope. | | | | I’m writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope. | | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, | | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery slide. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" male swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me. | | | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women." It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot." Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that. Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.Your chance is right now -- and right by my side. Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No." > But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations. The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty. With the help of patriots like you, the Center for American Liberty fights the transgender movement in the courts because that’s the only way to stop them. And the Center for American Liberty is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach. #1. They're fighting radical schools. I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors encourage young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The Center for American Liberty is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! , you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals! #2. They're fighting radical doctors. There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince even conservative parents that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the Center for American Liberty is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. , you're helping Chloe and the Center for American Liberty make sure this never happens to another child! #3. They're fighting for your right to speak out against this evil. Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the Center for American Liberty's specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished! , you're helping the Center for American Liberty protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you. Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. The Center for American Liberty needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... It will be my honor to send you my new book Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind as my free gift Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18 I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too. Sincerely, | | Riley Gaines | | | P.S. God made man and God made woman. The attempts to deny those basic truths, are attempts to deny the truth of God. Your help is so critical to the Center for American Liberty's work, Please hurry. It's getting hard to hold back this evil without you. I don't want you to look back a year from now and say, "I wish I had done something when I had the chance." | | | | | The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization fighting against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. © The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 200942, Pittsburgh, PA 15251 | Conservatives Give PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: History Facts
subject: Which came first: traffic lights or stop signs?
body:
Although modern traffic lights are inextricably linked with the automobile, the world’s first traffic light existed nearly 20 years before German inventor Karl Benz patented the first modern car. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68cmqa029gups0zkl85uwqnlogk4hc960et0n7ulhxnn5afx4cxlb0l26c22hd1gnmqcj4cnd61aylsw9j11k21vfm663zo4yyxk4hasqww0i886mkhfrijyvcc1wipj2nrfqa1lxyq2v2ipf&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sntdqj&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [Traffic lights were invented before stop signs.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sntdqj&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [Science & Industry](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sntdqj&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sntdqj&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| A lthough modern traffic lights are inextricably linked with the automobile, [the world’s first traffic light](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sntdqj&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) existed nearly 20 years before German inventor Karl Benz patented the first modern car. On December 9, 1868, a 20-foot-tall traffic light was installed at the intersection of Bridge Street and Great George Street outside the Palace of Westminster in London, as a way to control the flow of carriage and pedestrian traffic. An adaptation of the signaling system used by railroads, the light used pivoting “arms” (known as semaphore arms) to communicate “stop” and “go” during the day, and gas-powered red and green lights at night. (Unfortunately, relying on gas proved to be a serious problem when the traffic light exploded less than a month later.)
---
Surprisingly, this complex signaling system predated the idea of a simple stop sign by nearly 30 years. Stop signs originated in response to appeals for some sort of safety signage to tame the chaotic streets of early 20th-century America, which lacked speed limits, directional signs, or any traffic laws. In the year 1900, New York businessman William Phelps Eno (considered the father of U.S. traffic law, though he never drove a car himself) wrote an article suggesting stop signs be placed at intersections. It took another 15 years, but the first stop signs were [installed in Detroit, Michigan](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sntdqj&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) — the heart of the U.S. automotive industry — and the idea was soon exported to the rest of the country and around the world.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sntdqj&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sntdqj&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## Stop signs were originally black-and-white squares.
Although red octagonal stop signs are a fixture of today’s roads, the stop sign has undergone a few changes over the years. Early stop signs in Detroit were [2-foot square pieces of sheet metal ](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sntdqj&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)with black lettering on a white background. The first official signs to use the iconic octagonal shape arrived years later in 1923, courtesy of the Mississippi Valley Association of State Highway Departments, which decided that the number of sides on a sign should convey the level of danger. Eight was the second-highest danger level. The highest is the circle, which technically has infinite sides, and is used for railroad crossings in the U.S.

clean_body: Although modern traffic lights are inextricably linked with the automobile, the world’s first traffic light existed nearly 20 years before German inventor Karl Benz patented the first modern car. | A lthough modern traffic lights are inextricably linked with the automobile, existed nearly 20 years before German inventor Karl Benz patented the first modern car. On December 9, 1868, a 20-foot-tall traffic light was installed at the intersection of Bridge Street and Great George Street outside the Palace of Westminster in London, as a way to control the flow of carriage and pedestrian traffic. An adaptation of the signaling system used by railroads, the light used pivoting “arms” (known as semaphore arms) to communicate “stop” and “go” during the day, and gas-powered red and green lights at night. (Unfortunately, relying on gas proved to be a serious problem when the traffic light exploded less than a month later.) Surprisingly, this complex signaling system predated the idea of a simple stop sign by nearly 30 years. Stop signs originated in response to appeals for some sort of safety signage to tame the chaotic streets of early 20th-century America, which lacked speed limits, directional signs, or any traffic laws. In the year 1900, New York businessman William Phelps Eno (considered the father of U.S. traffic law, though he never drove a car himself) wrote an article suggesting stop signs be placed at intersections. It took another 15 years, but the first stop signs were — the heart of the U.S. automotive industry — and the idea was soon exported to the rest of the country and around the world. | Thank you for supporting our advertisers! | By the Numbers | | People who cross the world’s busiest intersection every day (in Tokyo) 2.4 million | | Year inventor Garrett Morgan created a three-signal traffic light 1923 | Year inventor Garrett Morgan created a three-signal traffic light 1923 | | Days the world’s first gas-powered traffic light operated before exploding 24 | | Time (in hours) an average American spends at red lights each year 58.6 | Time (in hours) an average American spends at red lights each year 58.6 | | | Did you know? ---|---|--- Stop signs were originally black-and-white squares. Although red octagonal stop signs are a fixture of today’s roads, the stop sign has undergone a few changes over the years. Early stop signs in Detroit were black lettering on a white background. The first official signs to use the iconic octagonal shape arrived years later in 1923, courtesy of the Mississippi Valley Association of State Highway Departments, which decided that the number of sides on a sign should convey the level of danger. Eight was the second-highest danger level. The highest is the circle, which technically has infinite sides, and is used for railroad crossings in the U.S. Thank you for supporting our advertisers! | Recommended Reading | | | ---|---|--- | | | ---|---|--- | | | ---|--- | ---|--- A daily digest of history's most fascinating happenings. | Want to unsubscribe? | | ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|--- Copyright © 2024 History Facts. | | And the result of this constant propaganda? But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth. **That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** **[**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5117e9ef9aeb471485fbaa50df2d2a8d&_e=zrXdZY72d7zPMHj3jiiXwJMElPxXhS9BFSsJw2Roej4LZsp5_Pd_5bzS6HUENpFliL6IGExeCkiUU7l3rh3PIzTEVpxF5DXMxK2L-4bqoYGa_k8dPonQVj1j_VoUtUfRwJJgsUp5LjuwXmfFkXkTPNPmMmwZWTJGihq2v-_kAiI6_8E33D3rOVEP2l7TriAmY57PRxcFvtBEWPIvJ6AqglA7vq8Ovdfl9Nt_p2syB0ncQ5gaQ6V4criA8vkn2H6Q-6paKZMT11TU3CsaHD-gvU43VXlITf5NQIsqE6o4GQkj1pCapCg29NfUm4Em4pbTk-_OmvqZSfQ99tb8UK_hNHIrIywgtZP9TPtvD2IohgknndqRrXXEgbzwf7OAW6gmPQtfc7UdXHLldKnYyDN1unrx7m26E7-GwQB_1Ox6W_I%3D)** And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[**Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5117e9ef9aeb471485fbaa50df2d2a8d&_e=zrXdZY72d7zPMHj3jiiXwJMElPxXhS9BFSsJw2Roej4LZsp5_Pd_5bzS6HUENpFliL6IGExeCkiUU7l3rh3PIzTEVpxF5DXMxK2L-4bqoYGa_k8dPonQVj1j_VoUtUfRwJJgsUp5LjuwXmfFkXkTPNPmMmwZWTJGihq2v-_kAiI6_8E33D3rOVEP2l7TriAmY57PRxcFvtBEWPIvJ6AqglA7vq8Ovdfl9Nt_p2syB0ncQ5gaQ6V4criA8vkn2H6QbPe2vSRoanOnX3p48QE3ViB0E7nEdJBuFN_reKHVKY6wXTE1nDcahOm6smHY3D7RmXb20m6Mxfs-J9StVzdsbfDrOYF1jUOOVZ_JVqWMGzW6T4Ek3iV7iiNmQxpB8USwKT0a6A-acZBGH6LZ57RV5sZj4vW93X-kjkV0Kd3bcIY%3D)** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a **Founding Supporter** at the $35 and above level, we’ll send you**** all ten episodes of** _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ **for your family to enjoy**** FREE on DVD.** ** Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture.
