clean_body: Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues... | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. | | | | Fellow Conservative, As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want to say: You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues... | | And the result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say......and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth. That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Season One of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a Founding Supporter at the $35 and above level, we’ll send you** all ten episodes of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk for your family to enjoy FREE on DVD. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a Founding Supporter. | | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father | | | Kirk Cameron**Actor, Author, and Father | | | | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304 | Defend the Constitution PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: They’ve seized all my money
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
But even so, I will never surrender the fight for freedom and justice.

[https://secure.winred.com/rudy-giuliani-freedom-fund-79a3adfa/497966903baa536c/?utm_campaign=20241119&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=WAMA&utm_term=vbout]

Friend,

Imagine being asked to give up your home, your car, your credit card,
and your checking account.

Imagine all of your money being seized.

_That’s what the Communist Democrats have done to me._

I am being politically persecuted all because I dared to ask
questions... I dared to speak the TRUTH...

As I continue to fight for my freedom and justice, I need the greatest
legal team in history to win against the Marxist Deep State —
especially since my own law licenses have been _taken away_ from me!

But there’s one thing I want to make clear...

...The media claims that I am “begging” for donations to my Legal
Defense Trust.

_THAT’S A LIE. _

The truth is: when I ask for contributions to my Legal Defense Trust,
I tell Americans NOT to donate if they can’t afford it. But of
course the media and the Democrats will never report that.

And I’ll say it again loud and clear. If you can’t afford to
contribute, please don’t. End of story.

But, if you can, please know that your support could be the key to my
freedom – and not just _my own_ freedom, but the freedom, justice,
and rights of every U.S. citizen.

PLEASE MAKE A CONTRIBUTION TO THE RUDY GIULIANI FREEDOM FUND, BECAUSE
EVEN AFTER EVERYTHING THE LEFT HAS DONE TO ME, I WILL _NEVER_
SURRENDER THE FIGHT FOR FREEDOM AND JUSTICE.

name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: 28% Tax Increase Proposed in Delco
body:
News + editorial to start your week | Broad + Liberty Weekly Reads | | | |
---
| | | Good morning and welcome to _Broad + Liberty_ 's Weekly Reads. Hope your Thanksgiving was happy and peaceful.

[Subscribe to our daily email list](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=d25dca21d9&e=b7b3eddce2) and get the best of _Broad + Liberty_ delivered straight to your inbox.
---
|
---
|
### **1.[Delaware County facing $76 million budget deficit — 28 percent tax increase proposed](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=ce7808f17b&e=b7b3eddce2)**
_By Todd Shepherd_
The first draft of Delaware County’s 2025 budget shows the county operating with a $76 million deficit, according to a Broad + Liberty analysis of county budget documents.

In order to pay for $52 million of that gap, taxpayers are facing a 28 percent real estate tax increase. To fill the remainder, the draft budget spends $10 million in non-renewable funding from the federal government, and also dips into the county’s “fund balance” — essentially the reserve fund — for another $14 million.

The five-member county council, which flipped from a Republican to Democratic majority in 2020, will have the final say on any adjustments or changes to what Executive Director Barbara O’Malley has proposed. Yet the executive director’s draft budget is usually a reasonable predictor of the basic outline of the county’s anticipated spending and revenues.

The proposed 28 percent tax increase would come on the heels of a five percent increase already levied on county residents in 2024.

**Why It Matters**. The Democrats, who came to power in 2020 and many of whom still remain on the all-Democratic county council today, campaigned on promises to launch ambitious projects like the creation of a county-run health department and the deprivatization of the county prison.
Republicans warned some of those projects would be more costly than Democrats imagined — predictions that seem to be coming true.

**Quotable**. “I am pleased that council Democrats have finally come clean and admitted what most of us have known for years. Out of control spending by the Biden-Harris Administration in DC and this council have resulted in crushing inflation and massive tax increases at a time when most Delco families can least afford it,” Delaware County GOP Chairman Frank Agovino said.

[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=956a186977&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
---
|
### **2.[The plight of men](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=c382c0db8e&e=b7b3eddce2)**

_By Thom Nickels_
While having a drink with a friend in a neighborhood bar a few years ago, a distraught-looking woman approached us and started chatting.

We engaged in typical barroom banter until she introduced herself as the mother of a guy I had met in the same bar almost two years before. The guy in question, Mitch, introduced himself to me then because he recognized me from a photograph that accompanied my column in a local newspaper. Our conversation lasted only a few minutes but I remembered the encounter because Mitch seemed to be a troubled guy.
While talking about her son, Mitch’s mother told me her son described his meeting me then with the words, “I talked with the guy from the newspaper.”

She also described Mitch’s suicide note to her. At this she became very emotional and shed tears.
By the end of the night I had promised Mitch’s mom that I would check out a Suicide Prevention event she was organizing in another part of the neighborhood. After that I thought about the suicides that had affected my life in some way.

**Why It Matters**. Studies show men are less likely than women to say that they would tell anyone they were considering suicide. Here we have the reworking of that old stereotype: men hold things inside and are less likely to reveal their feelings. Isolation makes young men feel inadequate and angry. This can sometimes lead to thoughts of self-directed violence.

An essential side note to the topic is the current role of men and boys in American society. Since the rise of certain strands of militant feminism (with or without shaved heads), this role has been devalued, even though a certain devaluation of men and boys has always been present in our culture.

[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=26594beb73&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
---
|
# **3\. Lightning Round**
* **[Guy Ciarrocchi: Why Americans are called to give thanks](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=b4314dfe80&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Andy Bloom: Digging into the post-election data – and the pollster who got it right](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=9805ef4324&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Christine Flowers: Born in the U.S.A.](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=b5ccdec988&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Richard F. Kosich: The American people have chosen](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=87dac8f7fd&e=b7b3eddce2)**

---
|
---
|
# **4\. What we're reading**
As the election post-mortems continue to roll in, we particularly enjoyed this one [by Christine Rosen at _National Review_](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=e52cebc239&e=b7b3eddce2). The Harris campaign expected women to carry her across the finish line. In the end, though, she fared worse with women than Joe Biden did four years earlier. “In addition to her general lack of skill as a retail politician,” Rosen writes, “Harris’s campaign neglected to consider how its messaging would sound to women outside the world in which Harris lives, with its wealthy, well-educated, decidedly left-leaning Democratic voters.”********
---
|
---

Thank you, dear reader, for your steadfast support of our independent, broad-minded brand of local journalism. We could not do this without you.

With gratitude,

— The Editors at _Broad + Liberty_

# FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW
---
| | Reader,**I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns.

I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism.

**But there's also far more to what the Sun is building.

As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be.

I've been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust.

The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored.

The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That's the American way.

**The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun.** A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That's 18 years before the New York Times published its first number.**My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly.**

I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths.

They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as a penny a day. I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts.

subject: A Personal and Urgent Message

body:
The Left wanted to force me to pay a multi-million-dollar legal judgment because I told the truth and called out election fraud.| | |

| |

#
---
From the Desk of
---
# **[Kari Lake](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=a559172ae2d045979fdf7f265add421c&_e=xBIaoshlep0FvB3pnRTmfdwKHWcPmAJWmKaPO93ZWGkoSppF7Qumm8U1CGIcVGfFjmaRlW9HpBVVU2hKVanbfbASMWg28vByoTVUoT5pbexaYyYqLiKw-0JXs0A9_XBh3SNXV2tr-g6pnbnrmUKBu8ysYMQXnt7fBtyZdA48d9kG10qnn_XhUQCpD-cE7mmyYfYT-XN5VP3SDJTVVI5AdxgRlonBgZ44UUXnqKQhIHCePBy3wgjsoQOPEWEdt6H0d4I7OO-4S1npruZkBqKtxGOk6AjDfKKwAGtQi_MgAb5O8OStbeKAOHenYwo1a1ApTNig1lHzy47IaFOJyprdtOCPZn3kvQlied0-OVR9lPiWRE2KcvuwNc-YlsOivgahpo2VzsJSIcUSBSUhyITKd98b3FjL5TtczTxqbMfdRr0%3D)**
---
|
---
| | Dear Friend, Today I need your help to defend myself against the Left’s “lawfare” before they can financially destroy my family.All I ask is that you **[Rush a “FIRST AMENDMENT FUND” Emergency contribution before midnight tonight.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=a559172ae2d045979fdf7f265add421c&_e=xBIaoshlep0FvB3pnRTmfdwKHWcPmAJWmKaPO93ZWGkoSppF7Qumm8U1CGIcVGfFjmaRlW9HpBVVU2hKVanbfbASMWg28vByoTVUoT5pbexaYyYqLiKw-0JXs0A9_XBh3SNXV2tr-g6pnbnrmUKBu8ysYMQXnt7fBtyZdA48d9kG10qnn_XhUQCpD-cE7mmyYfYT-XN5VP3SDJTVVI5AdxgRlonBgZ44UUXnqKQhIHCePBy3wgjsoQOPEWEdt6H0cYlEhUzbHSyC8W7-yd0Tnpu3F4GdWrAty2H_BzfnLqtLbbVsroLrPaTgeWD5fwHHY8-Xp8hrgMR4ba-OrxOtAllxejsp5mhwh5e_aBO4SMGHlhfZ0gkmvFb0O0Q6pGHHAo0Uz5_J6IHU49djhI_7ZB4hktcE18NeKs7PBtE05RE%3D)** When an Arizona Election Official went on the record promising to _“Make life hell”_ for me, I could have never imagined it would have been this bad...I incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself in this defamation case – and I'm afraid this battle is only getting started. Think about it. The Left wanted to force me to pay a multi-million-dollar legal judgment because I told the truth and called out election fraud.Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity.Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American. It’s a national embarrassment. We have to change it.But if standing up and demanding change means you’re going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections.That’s what happened to me. Each day that the weight of this lawfare feels too much to bear, I think about President Trump and how he takes every attack head-on and never once thinks about backing down.Just think about what’s happening to him.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors and judges threatened to take everything away from him -- his businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom. **And he fights on.** So, if the Left thinks that some liberal-packed court threatening me with a hundred-million-dollar fine will get me to back down from this fight, **then they know _nothing_ about me.**And they know nothing about _you_ , too.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.This is about protecting their rights, giving them a prosperous America to live in, and defending our family name.To me, that was worth the millions of dollars this could have cost.Because nothing in this world can come between me and my family.Not the Left’s lawfare. Not power-drunk liberal prosecutors.Not litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth.Thankfully, a generous group has stepped up and is willing to help me cover my legal expenses.So today, I must ask you to contribute to this new**“First Amendment Fund”** to help me defeat the Left’s sham lawfare. [**My friend, could you rush back a generous, tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, $250, or more to help me cover the court fees, lawyers, expert witnesses, counsels, and so much more?**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=a559172ae2d045979fdf7f265add421c&_e=xBIaoshlep0FvB3pnRTmfdwKHWcPmAJWmKaPO93ZWGkoSppF7Qumm8U1CGIcVGfFjmaRlW9HpBVVU2hKVanbfbASMWg28vByoTVUoT5pbexaYyYqLiKw-0JXs0A9_XBh3SNXV2tr-g6pnbnrmUKBu8ysYMQXnt7fBtyZdA48d9kG10qnn_XhUQCpD-cE7mmyYfYT-XN5VP3SDJTVVI5AdxgRlonBgZ44UUXnqKQhIHCePBy3wgjsoQOPEWEdt6H0L65bmPMt8Aiqv2uqIwg8bk5d9bXeGN6HConbRIucZVufk3WvOjEfbK1itK0axf7HNdH8bShYGml77tOnC3zZ33CNZKTSW-z9JHCvTYJDrrX2490E_1jBVdpPel3Mbj1CSKG7r7rO3-y9g_fS2h3Zjweip2pW10DVoqzlEqBVcCg%3D) The Left wanted this case to destroy my name and credibility. They also wanted to force me and my family into bankruptcy.
---
[ **DONATE **](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=a559172ae2d045979fdf7f265add421c&_e=xBIaoshlep0FvB3pnRTmfdwKHWcPmAJWmKaPO93ZWGkoSppF7Qumm8U1CGIcVGfFjmaRlW9HpBVVU2hKVanbfbASMWg28vByoTVUoT5pbexaYyYqLiKw-0JXs0A9_XBh3SNXV2tr-g6pnbnrmUKBu8ysYMQXnt7fBtyZdA48d9kG10qnn_XhUQCpD-cE7mmyYfYT-XN5VP3SDJTVVI5AdxgRlonBgZ44UUXnqKQhIHCePBy3wgjsoQOPEWEdt6H0CBbDIKra912GpXVuG0QZaYpJgsWSyacK4VDYs-g_Ve-XkczFRMz5ns9gN6Wtq-fQmmISi3WJAewzeUUUpMFn8JNDBgz-XjWrrslVnB9rDD9gtrQOzbZnoQ0Nta_aFQ55FZwgCiyN0fvUpZeRd7ZO3Dt5M4uaTEzYWTTF4CPtpUg%3D)
---
Every dollar given to this **“First Amendment Fund”** will help me finish this fight – without financially destroying my family.Together, we can win this battle in court. And we can send the message that the Left’s lawfare will not crush us.Thank you for always being there for me. Please know that I’m still fighting because I want _you_ to live in a free and prosperous America.Yours Truly,
---
| |
---
---
Kari Lake

Kari Lake

Arrested Pro-Life protestors. **And sued me for defamation.** Now, I’m facing hundreds of thousands of dollars in legal fees all for speaking the truth and calling out election fraud.The Left’s goal? Financially destroy me and my family.Today I’m asking you to join me and build the **“First Amendment Fund”** that will help me win my case. With enough grassroots firepower, we will end this lawfare and take back our country. **[Please, rush your most generous, tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, or more. Thank you for your support during this difficult time.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=a559172ae2d045979fdf7f265add421c&_e=xBIaoshlep0FvB3pnRTmfdwKHWcPmAJWmKaPO93ZWGkoSppF7Qumm8U1CGIcVGfFjmaRlW9HpBVVU2hKVanbfbASMWg28vByoTVUoT5pbexaYyYqLiKw-0JXs0A9_XBh3SNXV2tr-g6pnbnrmUKBu8ysYMQXnt7fBtyZdA48d9kG10qnn_XhUQCpD-cE7mmyYfYT-XN5VP3SDJTVVI5AdxgRlonBgZ44UUXnqKQhIHCePBy3wgjsoQOPEWEdt6H0Lz872Kz--xR4tWUH4NzenO5Pu2KK9fpv9oKvr5EaEucrtEVkNTlQQnLIA3P8-oRNhRWx_pz6Et8SoZ2c4zzeKXg3D3-yMH30LTmfbLB9VYIPszJ_gqe-AhoKEMin4gIy3HTTh1ZpfVYBDG_k-Lqn_Foy3vDBKLpL4v_BKGnu0Fk%3D)**

name: DLCC Newsletter
subject: Democrats face a critical recount while Republicans try to reinstate their supermajority … and everything else you need to know in the states.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee, dlcc
body:
Here's the latest edition of the DLCC's newsletter for Sunday, December 1st, 2024. | | |
---
| | | [ ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hW9WL4ySifRyEQyG7D6ZDcaKmFQcO_SqeUFRkYFn0WrvHHisWiwN-mSj2nwLaaiVAndhLwjC3x9MI2KUAa0DnJViqSOAPtdfRJrzMKtRCwblA1wFYf51-Kl6skNzN-ZkmLnCzm1njP7mDgQUl-ONwMGYyxifrYvdUantzZg9otNuT9PyKnCQbrXcFhWjBS3qIfzl-xsAWg-TPDEozdPYX_wMnVhmFFm1hozgDWhVe_gN0h6C2h0kkx1svLWJ4A5H8zK3Aum37TFuuxabBUFEkU9kqsaZmjXHKr45X9Dol2cZfnZ-dWkORvttivc6ogrItdJYnRuMV-iAKxJSvCDxnyTbu1iTfPanxcKaVJ_uQD-qGXFcvzAx_iSyXAW5eEI5cY_PCtQU_20rFi8xCJ_tPeChmyjzo5roVJ5aNbkIWE79PZO7oflo9l4DP7-uunB0GSk4IIe0jz-bI1he6lHbC6_ADVfCQNfnj4CSdNGv8Vgg3vG3dXvJ8GjtrNUMusSXb0mOxPH6lLKYWkA7SGpPXthabfYbAYKhc3zdAIipF9aiE/4bx/yky7MY9bR6q4RN3NIrNaNQ/h0/h001.tImba6xsn-YloPBLSPoq8IdPNkp7nGRYfPdp8a7t_rI)
---
1️⃣ **_North Carolina:_ Democrats face a recount with ultra-thin margins **
Democrats narrowly broke the Republican supermajority in the North Carolina House – and now, we’re facing a recount in a race that was decided by just 233 votes. The holiday season can be the hardest time of year for military families. One U.S. Air Force Airman 1st Class shared, "I have never really missed a holiday without being with my personal close friends and family. So, I think it's going to be challenging not having the typical things that we do as a family and friends, and our traditions."
That's why the USO works tirelessly to bring holiday programs, connections and support that service members all over the world need and deserve. This month, we'll be delivering holiday care packages, providing warm meals for service members deployed to remote areas and connecting our heroes with their loved ones so they can be together even when they're thousands of miles apart.
**[But the USO is not a government agency, and we can't do any of this without your help. We can't afford to waste this match opportunity. Will you give $29 now while the value of every gift will be DOUBLED to support our heroes and help us start Giving Tuesday off strong?](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/E89~)**
Important: This Giving Tuesday preview match is ONLY available until midnight tomorrow. **[So, please: Rush a matched gift now.](https://links.e.uso.)**
Thank you for ensuring American heroes aren't forgotten this holiday season.
--The USO

## The Woke Movement Isn’t Dead, the Battle Is Just Beginning
Donald Trump, the once and future president, won not just the Electoral College but likely the popular vote. In doing so, he defeated the Democrats’ DEI hire candidate, the great intersectional hope Kamala Harris, in part by running on a platform of rooting woke ideology out of the federal government. Trump’s triumph comes after a [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=90dba8150124441ba1d22abc4e926ac4&_e=rACZWtJJA95FQBQNECBa2LbaTiWbYdf6OckKOI9zwJ_VR0mzWT6t0D40ZpqfWAHaJnjXJ5nYeh9cwTYpBx5a6ksX8A01xhNSdTxjvlHM2JtpI2RJfSbOwKvBSTVBXBlek3hJHJkabehxscqYAiRoBhZXup7JdPqLdBTBSveY1waRbuQmkPPiKiLIuWhANSq9eD2H8b532dcopEjdZRyj4VzRidIdjHKJefHa1PGo0eYauwd04__Mm1gXur1te0XWy7X5Jp2c6qyXy6qcvavy--txuMpsZ8ZXvDIAdNlpdaY%3D)

## US Navy Using Questionable Stealth Warship to Test New, High-Tech Weapon System – RedState
The USS Zumwalt was the first in a class of what was supposed to be stealth destroyers for the United States Navy, having the radar cross-section of a fishing boat. That warship was not entirely successful, having been plagued with problems in the propulsion, and was, in the end, something of an expensive and [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=90dba8150124441ba1d22abc4e926ac4&_e=rACZWtJJA95FQBQNECBa2LbaTiWbYdf6OckKOI9zwJ8AErhC0gANkL7YFwsdt0mCxu7A7Mhtuly9Dd2UZqJFEpEF4XQCEauc9Z8XJX0eG0MI75FNQJB9RiZdLJvuaKT8DF3HBYWVe_n7ND8lLOYzJSIcpUclruE7EsoNdEcst6IhQynWQP0Z_w4Di7PzONfigjrIKEDLiy1Q9ChR9Y1vNZEFv--wokcS5gr5Ol7CXSiBa787mOLtNCjP0ONUJL4nrzsMWMztElDPRn8ZVBARKE8geZadtiqxob79xev8_4nz94_wB6G2iDq-AdUN00-R2w9xY3r6SKQ1BhU8-MCsQQ%3D%3D)

## Andrew McCabe Throws a Fit on CNN Over Trump Nomination of Kash Patel – RedState
As we reported, President-elect Donald Trump has now nominated Kash Patel for the spot of FBI Director. Patel is a big favorite of Trump supporters and it’s also going to be hard to argue that he isn’t qualified. He’s an attorney who has handled many trials, and served as Chief of Staff at the [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=90dba8150124441ba1d22abc4e926ac4&_e=rACZWtJJA95FQBQNECBa2LbaTiWbYdf6OckKOI9zwJ_xKnbIRpp-mO52Roo1rmur7mhpLCNGKWS93cLIahyAZc7Fav8iVceoPI2bsB5jfHixRoBgzxzSWcAUM6Q0vna2d7FQElzXU9XYnpbkppv3Gj7bRQBh0ok-krZ40wFCGjK3ACd39VYmL8Vg1WrPLU1rQfXAJ8I8xHgPp9Vvl4bnMaw2ZxNhVFsBvYdODtqMMAw6IqtA5Yh55b-aJ4P2_QUokiG54MIKcq_Zt2M8dny9HebdnXgM2BaNVxPHgC5PNftHH6HA9EV53f4UVOml-VBz)

## Clooney Reportedly ‘Fuming’ at Obama After Being ‘Seduced’ Into Helping Boot Biden – RedState
When the Democrats booted Joe Biden and swapped in Kamala Harris in a truly anti-democratic move, it was a truly unprecedented move. It was putting aside the primary choice of the Democratic voters for someone who ended up losing spectacularly. . But one of the people who factored into [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=90dba8150124441ba1d22abc4e926ac4&_e=rACZWtJJA95FQBQNECBa2LbaTiWbYdf6OckKOI9zwJ-1OpER-nA67yNkICS9qqNynBSjQ4lFeXz3_sF852e8ThtTy-klf1NjsHqL8LkyxhC0MiEXc7hLlxmknO56Q-F4LVc_u7MqW-pJU-ZawnvznrEzQkOFjpjdWsbAs3-YdfEAyR9whkgk9ZQntjGFvQTffvLjBX4skCBX94EcKqXxlqlNURPAhKutB5VgFep3MLshMndqsdJSGvWfWcxphsFLT0dPImPFf7p5NKO9Iau2mag3wuMZTHuBx1HpW8QwQQBc68Nn6nDPIbNmHXGEMRr4Z2cn01C1tCwi1wILczJHUw%3D%3D)

Kash Patel As a congressional staffer, Kash Patel helped expose FBI misconduct. Now, he’s President-elect Donald Trump’s nominee to replace Christopher Wray as the bureau’s director. In another major announcement of house cleaning, Trump announced Saturday on Truth Social that the former Pentagon senior official, influential congressional staffer, White House aide and former terrorism prosecutor, [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=90dba8150124441ba1d22abc4e926ac4&_e=rACZWtJJA95FQBQNECBa2LbaTiWbYdf6OckKOI9zwJ-OI4vB1DwqxY_5etmydogbieWNrd37glsNHAwfQE74mFW2ks-QfBlbXDyzBqf_gtvx3M8TLJG5BDVB9zje9Y0fmtLwEDcko9F6WwWGjj-PvlPZCsuEalPtKD_zAFSpP61wLCtLviF3HlQMLI-ygsbn2hUQiEPuHHDidAsfjlTVQzzm_-3V3JHARrPlt5CP7e2rB64vvNG4Sx6bTyCFBMK_41vUDDpEelrfx92rcjP_CxfqUMXV_ev2iKyHjtZua7_W9Rd5ZCEXAuKsdhCNnySgPQCOwr3MKrpaPyTxdbujcQ%3D%3D)

name: Jeremiah Regan
subject: Learn from Victor Davis Hanson
body:
The greatest armed conflict in human history

_**A message from our sponsor...**_ | | | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=dd140e449e2b48be9886c52f4edb0ff5&_e=qnLMKCnPQBtkXTkIy13wQl9kOIlEt2aSuZXxNEZdxG0Q9Cj8Io-A3nW7o0j5b5oqoZpRwrUqZ7w4SmmT7f77ZvtMHLZqtPJ3IQyRGEIeZXtaXADi1dDmEiiifZEwNedJkf4tvESrQnb-qcRY9Lli763alceNJGdREsaC-tYuF_f36_BYLiWEQ3mwaBTo343gI_dWrcTadqHww-7pjC_D907gTp91mmDiWb5TLZ4lqEkOl2g8AY-n4aAlMwQA0kwD7EqGOm9fasRcEq92WiiKSKuH5VUmDwOPE1m-kk5E1J75Y0Mo4hY6H1iQwiL-ZcpU4PeBTTYJd1sbkbWWRAtgKecTXlkexd_wJd_ANulhYOm6d6uGtBxoUapYl0S1dGeORva0DH8eVDT6eF5uXDvgfkSfFk3lN583uHg0dL0_R5k%3D)

| | Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. We must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=dd140e449e2b48be9886c52f4edb0ff5&_e=qnLMKCnPQBtkXTkIy13wQl9kOIlEt2aSuZXxNEZdxG0Q9Cj8Io-A3nW7o0j5b5oqoZpRwrUqZ7w4SmmT7f77ZvtMHLZqtPJ3IQyRGEIeZXtaXADi1dDmEiiifZEwNedJkf4tvESrQnb-qcRY9Lli763alceNJGdREsaC-tYuF_f36_BYLiWEQ3mwaBTo343gI_dWrcTadqHww-7pjC_D907gTp91mmDiWb5TLZ4lqEkOl2g8AY-n4aAlMwQA0kwD7EqGOm9fasRcEq92WiiKSP2qx7XC5lAGmFp87zk4u3KAwx7Cad-2nWGLFSyvPA_NKHBfw0Jnkgxl-nebp7g3OZWWDh0PTe882hm7a4EPAMNzbOpLhFXQTTFHaluQC_VLpK6hsYKYbEu8RWl_fN9oGAGFESJiAFdx24I-pxshyRo%3D)**[The Second World Wars.”](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=dd140e449e2b48be9886c52f4edb0ff5&_e=qnLMKCnPQBtkXTkIy13wQl9kOIlEt2aSuZXxNEZdxG0Q9Cj8Io-A3nW7o0j5b5oqoZpRwrUqZ7w4SmmT7f77ZvtMHLZqtPJ3IQyRGEIeZXtaXADi1dDmEiiifZEwNedJkf4tvESrQnb-qcRY9Lli763alceNJGdREsaC-tYuF_f36_BYLiWEQ3mwaBTo343gI_dWrcTadqHww-7pjC_D907gTp91mmDiWb5TLZ4lqEkOl2g8AY-n4aAlMwQA0kwD7EqGOm9fasRcEq92WiiKSMEMjUD1H2fJY_oTa_APoRa228qFGKPLN_6T9KyvDXBnqHKd9H5HhShzUp-gA_YO4qozceos5_SgXzqKnnfkmP7Lpb4vfOyeYZ4L9As-F0DDNimlsSNYsvtfmO4WfaIv9CIP7XBZeFlCi0BBzZyXWGY%3D) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.

name: Bernie Moreno
subject: Your support was vital
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Because of YOU, we have a new Republican majority. That’s why I want to hear your top priorities in 2025. [](http://links.teamnrsc.co/u/click?_t=aff6d619248e4524b6f468bb9c83f15c&_m=5b41262639834438a7a6d7b9082dc11e&_e=D_dU4ERIxBGqRRVfQm-1s14T00o08kbYfq9ho9y0XBV08iuPzFNyAShJdSxn6gUHKHCgKAiKgLE0eh9S0IVO-2CDmqHoyrHwdN2HDaWu9gmdVisTxIWClh1b2cNPhE19O9IVLH64fAuPplnwu4N_l4V7zpKyPWmMN9a19af6P2FsW05DFnmp3Yg2AnPOnP4ew92cuCIOXDJ9SkIWX63hKX-K4n9K8Dy7QdGSdfhV0Pcud-7Zfm37na-g78JNb_uvFV96crGEz0ARBWBUPUXY5Sv3uhDbM5KjDl-xuRzT3niCEbQdvzahcBiEcXMsgX2LJkCZ0ePnosfFTaSfSPydsLBc3rHUyQgQncVqR8DtIMq8hY2PB73pmNfpXIkbuwYpOANjhFoKgbKZ6kd6Pt5SC68NTrzHogZhVhBNOM_Ox5Y9hKE4xVqopRpu8O782NYAUPwA9_Lsx0smPvDp7uSWXw%3D%3D)

Fellow Patriot - Let me introduce myself.

My name is Bernie Moreno. My win in Ohio officially clinched the Senate majority for Republicans!

_First, I want to thank you for everything you did to support my campaign for the U.S. Senate and for standing with my fellow Senate Republicans in taking back the Senate!_

We have built a majority that even the liberal media are admitting it would take Democrats [**at least two election cycles to defeat.**](http://links.teamnrsc.co/u/click?_t=aff6d619248e4524b6f468bb9c83f15c&_m=5b41262639834438a7a6d7b9082dc11e&_e=D_dU4ERIxBGqRRVfQm-1s14T00o08kbYfq9ho9y0XBV08iuPzFNyAShJdSxn6gUHKHCgKAiKgLE0eh9S0IVO-2CDmqHoyrHwdN2HDaWu9gmdVisTxIWClh1b2cNPhE19O9IVLH64fAuPplnwu4N_l4V7zpKyPWmMN9a19af6P2FsW05DFnmp3Yg2AnPOnP4ew92cuCIOXDJ9SkIWX63hKX-K4n9K8Dy7QdGSdfhV0Pcud-7Zfm37na-g78JNb_uvFV96crGEz0ARBWBUPUXY5Sv3uhDbM5KjDl-xuRzT3njSynbISztwqkR8sTWbQGMJmLrWKDGXH8rfJmtARuP3k73IXYn9_1FYBsgUSPvMkuHe1K2RpUZHzrFVoGboIIQPBXe_Sk8sWdqTJP34D1KhKaUcT94SGBzJxeJsq8WaS6KLyxIQEZDJACE2HB7GXtSX8sdWCfzwJEcehSLWWZhHUA%3D%3D)

I'm proud to stand alongside President-elect Trump and my Senate GOP colleagues to fight for conservative principles and American values.

We have a lot of work to do to restore our country after the damage Joe Biden and Kamala Harris inflicted during their failed administration.

So, I've worked with the NRSC Polling Team to create this [**Top Issues Survey**](http://links.teamnrsc.co/u/click?_t=aff6d619248e4524b6f468bb9c83f15c&_m=5b41262639834438a7a6d7b9082dc11e&_e=D_dU4ERIxBGqRRVfQm-1s14T00o08kbYfq9ho9y0XBV08iuPzFNyAShJdSxn6gUHKHCgKAiKgLE0eh9S0IVO-2CDmqHoyrHwdN2HDaWu9gmdVisTxIWClh1b2cNPhE19O9IVLH64fAuPplnwu4N_l4V7zpKyPWmMN9a19af6P2FsW05DFnmp3Yg2AnPOnP4ew92cuCIOXDJ9SkIWX63hKX-K4n9K8Dy7QdGSdfhV0Pcud-7Zfm37na-g78JNb_uvFV96crGEz0ARBWBUPUXY5Sv3uhDbM5KjDl-xuRzT3nix7PmXrStM5K3BSjugkBF6M159WnKCvKQxoSVfVIz51DaL3rW-E8RDQWXMC0qA9fxPgeJ11hAiDjt5U7mdmNfX_lx-S2JWQnPIl8SFuoTr3EoHd7FPt8FJcsptnH-Puc2d1pVo7DLiJqguxkcOylqb114evoFrdE_31J9pFF6BRA%3D%3D) which will only take a few moments to complete.

We hope to receive 700 survey responses to our**Top Issues Survey** before midnight tonight so that Senate Republicans can plan our agenda for this Congress.

We are making plans NOW that will impact what issues we act on FIRST when we take control of both houses of Congress and the White House in January.

[**Please take a few moments today to complete your Top Issues Survey.**](http://links.teamnrsc.co/u/click?_t=aff6d619248e4524b6f468bb9c83f15c&_m=5b41262639834438a7a6d7b9082dc11e&_e=D_dU4ERIxBGqRRVfQm-1s14T00o08kbYfq9ho9y0XBV08iuPzFNyAShJdSxn6gUHKHCgKAiKgLE0eh9S0IVO-2CDmqHoyrHwdN2HDaWu9gmdVisTxIWClh1b2cNPhE19O9IVLH64fAuPplnwu4N_l4V7zpKyPWmMN9a19af6P2FsW05DFnmp3Yg2AnPOnP4ew92cuCIOXDJ9SkIWX63hKX-K4n9K8Dy7QdGSdfhV0Pcud-7Zfm37na-g78JNb_uvFV96crGEz0ARBWBUPUXY5Sv3uhDbM5KjDl-xuRzT3njoU5STE1nGZQoT8W_fgISNToGl2Hr32fV4dMjqeM3HgXr9Z99pYlRytKNscHIN_16vueRjQOlYM84nEWEKuj2ebFLjWOUUy5AKojyEoR60niVu0DV6J0cGSrvuVYoBOBq-n6dD3t_xwnBFKpcJWn8LmPZ-O0lpHvEB9OyfVbLvjg%3D%3D) I am working with my Senate Republican colleagues to distribute this survey and others to the Republican supporters who helped us win.

[COMPLETE THE SURVEY ⇒](http://links.teamnrsc.co/u/click?_t=aff6d619248e4524b6f468bb9c83f15c&_m=5b41262639834438a7a6d7b9082dc11e&_e=D_dU4ERIxBGqRRVfQm-1s14T00o08kbYfq9ho9y0XBV08iuPzFNyAShJdSxn6gUHKHCgKAiKgLE0eh9S0IVO-2CDmqHoyrHwdN2HDaWu9gmdVisTxIWClh1b2cNPhE19O9IVLH64fAuPplnwu4N_l4V7zpKyPWmMN9a19af6P2FsW05DFnmp3Yg2AnPOnP4ew92cuCIOXDJ9SkIWX63hKX-K4n9K8Dy7QdGSdfhV0Pcud-7Zfm37na-g78JNb_uvFV96crGEz0ARBWBUPUXY5Sv3uhDbM5KjDl-xuRzT3nj8mevFe3B3RVr2uliTkfjs5a53ALZY6OE0hHBg3xyC0rDGpvR19ZThKrdWNTSGF3YcDTDdkiN-qfn12Zq0cMpBQ3wvkFGSkgvl4vhI1lp0S_VofAFJ08DYTjXXQFFu4FLxISjOFOJ9ihozYW5FHcOIyUs35D2pqlUViyJvea10JQ%3D%3D)
We need to know what you think so we know how to best fight for conservative principles and American values as we take on the far-left Democrats.

We're seeking to collect 700 SURVEY RESPONSES before midnight tonight so our polling and data analytics team can review responses in the morning to pass along to Senate Republicans.

We are ready and eager to FIGHT for liberty and the American Dream as we rebuild America following Joe Biden's failed presidency.

[**Please complete your survey before you click away from this email.**](http://links.teamnrsc.co/u/click?_t=aff6d619248e4524b6f468bb9c83f15c&_m=5b41262639834438a7a6d7b9082dc11e&_e=D_dU4ERIxBGqRRVfQm-1s14T00o08kbYfq9ho9y0XBV08iuPzFNyAShJdSxn6gUHKHCgKAiKgLE0eh9S0IVO-2CDmqHoyrHwdN2HDaWu9gmdVisTxIWClh1b2cNPhE19O9IVLH64fAuPplnwu4N_l4V7zpKyPWmMN9a19af6P2FsW05DFnmp3Yg2AnPOnP4ew92cuCIOXDJ9SkIWX63hKX-K4n9K8Dy7QdGSdfhV0Pcud-7Zfm37na-g78JNb_uvFV96crGEz0ARBWBUPUXY5Sv3uhDbM5KjDl-xuRzT3nhIYgH3lpoR-RtB6ZdqZBLEg1Aj1TK3YtxztETjZFHYxioprgNv4kAwfFCHxcet3IOh0YZnoT0ZZ9mknrtR7PegMnBc6giwyW2NBt49AbpfjTrFbhJz5Su-LvqwKXqIsbnZZQpvKvZGltyMufLuxioBzMMO0stohcO4hwJK7xjmTQ%3D%3D)

Thank you,

Bernie Moreno
Senator-elect (R-OH)

[COMPLETE THE SURVEY ⇒](http://links.teamnrsc.co/u/click?_t=aff6d619248e4524b6f468bb9c83f15c&_m=5b41262639834438a7a6d7b9082dc11e&_e=D_dU4ERIxBGqRRVfQm-1s14T00o08kbYfq9ho9y0XBV08iuPzFNyAShJdSxn6gUHKHCgKAiKgLE0eh9S0IVO-2CDmqHoyrHwdN2HDaWu9gmdVisTxIWClh1b2cNPhE19O9IVLH64fAuPplnwu4N_l4V7zpKyPWmMN9a19af6P2FsW05DFnmp3Yg2AnPOnP4ew92cuCIOXDJ9SkIWX63hKX-K4n9K8Dy7QdGSdfhV0Pcud-7Zfm37na-g78JNb_uvFV96crGEz0ARBWBUPUXY5Sv3uhDbM5KjDl-xuRzT3niaGmC-ubihzUJ6V3hUYIJ6pLC3SF8B27idXGehfocT45vcly9bRd8VrJ6a0MbGAoE71-V1EO8_curAYi6ud3jRHsYFd_gziZFoBfuLtx9TSOdRt8EBtIgrSZJ6By4eBMjXm_mFarLng2Wof2Oc6w2Yc-W7_pqcD9YWKCuA1L54oA%3D%3D)

I am working with my Senate Republican colleagues to distribute this survey and others to the Republican supporters who helped us win. We need to know what you think so we know how to best fight for conservative principles and American values as we take on the far-left Democrats. We're seeking to collect 700 SURVEY RESPONSES before midnight tonight so our polling and data analytics team can review responses in the morning to pass along to Senate Republicans. We are ready and eager to FIGHT for liberty and the American Dream as we rebuild America following Joe Biden's failed presidency. Thank you, Bernie Moreno Senator-elect (R-OH) If you want to help Republicans, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Message and data rates may apply. We hate to see you go, but . Because of YOU, we have a new Republican majority. That’s why I want to hear your top priorities in 2025.

---
Dear Peter,
---
The Democrat Deep State wants **$146 MILLION** from me – all because I dared to ask questions about the legitimacy of America’s elections.
---
To comply with such a frivolous demand, I’d have to give up **_everything_** I own – including my dignity.
---
That’s why I have **officially _APPEALED_** this outrageous ruling that would leave me on the streets.
---
_As I stand on the brink of losing everything, I remind myself that the Bible says that earthly possessions will always fade, but greater “heavenly treasures” await us._
---
Truth, justice, and the fight for freedom are worth _infinitely_ more... They are the “heavenly treasures... that cannot be stolen and will never rust, decay or lose their value.”
---
**And when I see that TWO of the rigged cases brought against President Trump have now been dismissed and “delayed indefinitely,” I have hope that I can win mine too!**
---
_But my ability to win this appeal and stay in this fight until justice is served depends entirely on the support given to me by kind souls like you, Peter._
---
Let me also say that I know we’re in the midst of the holidays, so family and friends come first. Please don’t feel pressured to give if you can’t!
---

subject: 2A Patriot Survey for Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
| | | [](https://trk.emails.troydowning.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDg4MjgxNTEsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMjg5OS1kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MzM2LWI3YWZlNWJjMjJhMzQ1M2JiNTQ2NGQ3NTk1Yjg0ZTM2IiwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMCIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdHJveS1kb3duaW5nLWZvci1jb25ncmVzcy8yYS1zdXJ2ZXk_ZXhfdGlkPTIwMjQxMjAxX05XLVZLLjExMDExN190MTU4MjU2OS0yODk5JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MTIwMV9OVy1WSy4xMTAxMTdfdDE1ODI1NjktMjg5OSJ9/wzgnTyFYElts00teK--GjA)
---
| | Peter,

America First Patriots are back in control of the White House, Senate, and House of Representatives, __**but we can’t take our foot off the gas now.**__

Our Nation still faces a series of urgent challenges, and the first 100 days of this term will be pivotal in transforming America. One critical priority is **defending the Second Amendment.** This is our opportunity to overturn anti-gun policies and reinforce the rights of the people.

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Direct
subject: The Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum
body:
American civics education, and specifically the teaching of American history, is at a crisis point. | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=42f229614c61475ab733c7119231377b&_t=mlxRb7VSpURUNBRiKHw5XdOY6dWvpXE_IAA60IKHmd7FD7-JW_dZmmQ8vUxcGCTeVxCGC_CViKcPkGdugzZZTmah5XhbFKMRql__H4WjH4wrd7U6KJtGaJvvsnk5m7vp)_
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=42f229614c61475ab733c7119231377b&_e=ZAk9sfa-9DAq5whVR5QGKrelibi7zTrJASXW-rYx9e_qqzqBTvWiVZmvR2XbcfBNlhxIDtwanMjss5SaNQegRmkCPLmOt48cIhYjsOpIsbY-QPispDHavybtpJ4X4W5lsF5FA-X54IOU0k3-MH7LCXnJDNO8D3Mxo13mR5LOub1Dhb4QBgR2SlutUa1tvthm_IIsSIbOEizlsYhlY01OSJHx-WlCb-pfiyTBCan7DH5a-gPU_ZG08_snzK9SvL1aNpc8ShFy5l1oSc0GuR-cV541LKg8xXJFXhkn8sLIW-nIIqeLNyodJDnw6TLTzZHLlfhHvP3jZBXgQ-sFmiV4gtYf3UjKR1rEA3738am3POsb7-KjKkHFqrIPlgf84jHLPoMi5ltW-1E5-EnB5Se9dVljzJJKoXpbjMrba7YJ_TQ%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, American civics education, and specifically the teaching of American history, is at a crisis point. In K-12 schools nationwide, false narratives are being constructed, and content is being cherry-picked to fit an ideological (and frankly anti-American) agenda. Maybe you've even seen this happening in your local schools. As a result, we are faced with a choice: will we allow our children to be indoctrinated using curricula developed by anti-American ideologues and promoted by Left-wing education bureaucrats? Or will we insist that our children are taught honestly, using a curriculum that presents a fair, unbiased, and comprehensive view of our nation's history? We must insist on the **latter** , both for the sake of truth and for the sake of our children and America's future. For this reason, we have produced the _**Hillsdale** **1776 Curriculum**_ --and I'm writing to ask your help in promoting this curriculum to educators, homeschool families, and concerned citizens nationwide. **What is the _Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum_? ** The**_Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum_** is a K-12 history and civics curriculum that covers the triumphs and tragedies of American history fairly and comprehensively. This curriculum has been designed not by activists or ideologues but by teachers and professors at Hillsdale College--and we are making it available **free of charge**. To be clear, the _**Hillsdale** **1776 Curriculum**_ is not a _slap-dash_ response to the efforts of anti-American ideologues to indoctrinate our children. It is a 2,000-page, 85-lesson curriculum based on decades of studying American history. Developed over 18 months of intense and focused effort, its roots extend as far back as the beginning of Hillsdale College in 1844. And we need your help to make the _**Hillsdale** **1776 Curriculum**_ available to educators, homeschool families, and concerned citizens nationwide...and to make it available **free of charge** so that it will have the greatest impact. _We have set a budget goal of $800,000 to promote the _**Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum**_ and our other outreach efforts--including _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and our classical K-12 charter school initiative_. That's an ambitious budget, and we need to get started as soon as possible. One reason why your support really matters: **Hillsdale College refuses to accept one penny in taxpayer support --not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans**. This makes our work uniquely dependent on the support of citizens like you--citizens who agree with Hillsdale's mission on behalf of liberty. We remind ourselves daily of Hillsdale's 180-year-old mission--to provide "sound learning" of the kind needed to preserve "the inestimable blessings of civil and religious liberty." With that mission in mind, we produced the _**Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum**_ --and now we need your help to promote it nationwide. Will you take this opportunity to _**support the _Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum_ and our other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty**_**?** Understanding that a proper education is vital to the preservation of liberty--and that the anti-American indoctrination now being forced on too many American children poses an existential threat to liberty--I hope you will make your most generous tax-deductible gift today. **I 've included a secure link for your convenience here: ** _**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-hillsdale-1776-curriculum](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=42f229614c61475ab733c7119231377b&_e=ZAk9sfa-9DAq5whVR5QGKrelibi7zTrJASXW-rYx9e_qqzqBTvWiVZmvR2XbcfBNlhxIDtwanMjss5SaNQegRmkCPLmOt48cIhYjsOpIsbY-QPispDHavybtpJ4X4W5lsF5FA-X54IOU0k3-MH7LCXnJDNO8D3Mxo13mR5LOub1Dhb4QBgR2SlutUa1tvthm_IIsSIbOEizlsYhlY01OSJHx-WlCb-pfiyTBCan7DH5a-gPU_ZG08_snzK9SvL1af_R7pQ8u_bsiBwyqi_jRrqT3slev4nQNz2AN9EJw_kVRnzIFFnADOB8QuZUQNYBLKVoPtH2SGyMR0CC1Brtj1la-1xvlAZz9XAIXr0NpSdQybd_FTmFX2vG-1TEb5wPqcURXqnv0-vqA3e1aIrrA7LJ2y31TNn_ulLkEL-F8zSg%3D)**_ Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to hearing from you. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

[Unsubscribe from messages sponsored by Hillsdale College.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=42f229614c61475ab733c7119231377b&_t=mlxRb7VSpURUNBRiKHw5XdOY6dWvpXE_IAA60IKHmd7FD7-JW_dZmmQ8vUxcGCTeVxCGC_CViKcPkGdugzZZTnjJhpuTlS6TzI1RBe1ECtNF0ZJuqq9bYGpRmpsg6l_zWjS7HZ-jkWrhVhEsFoxQY330S4SBFNIEH5vKaSRVPgI%3D)

[Unsubscribe from all communications](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=42f229614c61475ab733c7119231377b&_t=mlxRb7VSpURUNBRiKHw5XdOY6dWvpXE_IAA60IKHmd7FD7-JW_dZmmQ8vUxcGCTeVxCGC_CViKcPkGdugzZZTmah5XhbFKMRql__H4WjH4wrd7U6KJtGaJvvsnk5m7vp).

[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..qgKk8NGcJV4c21lT5KGMdSofPLD1FA8l_pmt33J1vE8?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=152398190)
In the Sudanese Proxy War, the world is witnessing one of the gravest--and most ignored--humanitarian catastrophes. Similarly, the escalating humanitarian crisis in the Congo is directly tied to the legacy of slavery and the decades long genocidal reign of terror and genocide by Belgium King Leopold II. Unsurprisingly, legacy media is notably absent on both to the detriment of all humanity. Below I focus on Sudan, and later this week you will see an update from me on the crisis in the Congo.
I am hopeful that you will use the information here to increase your understanding of both crises, and more play an active role in supporting victims to help end their suffering.
**Let 's Address This.**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f0f3b8d9-ef77-4bdb-8e15-0f233ff8e695?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
A Sudanese girl at a transit centre for refugees in Renk, South Sudan, earlier this year. Photograph: Luis Tato/AFP/Getty Images
**Quick Note!** I am doing everything in my power over the next four years to stave off fascism in the United States and globally, and I need your support. **Subscribe and join the movement.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..qgKk8NGcJV4c21lT5KGMdSofPLD1FA8l_pmt33J1vE8?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=152398190)
### What You Need to Know About Sudan
The current Sudan crisis ignited in April of 2023. The UN High Commission on Refugees ("UNCHR") [reports that since then the crisis has](https://substack.com/redirect/c6988ca4-e319-4019-9515-4974dbdbecbc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
* Forced 11.3 million people from their homes with more than 8 million displaced internally. In total, 25 million people, nearly half of Sudan's population, are in need of humanitarian assistance and protection services.
* As of October 2024, 3 million people had fled to the Central African Republic (CAR), Chad, Egypt, Ethiopia, Libya, South Sudan, and Uganda.
* Famine is confirmed in parts of North Darfur since August 2024.

To put it in perspective, 25 million is a population greater than the entire populations of around a 140 nations globally. Sudanese run community platform [NasAlSudan](https://substack.com/redirect/b2dfcd3b-3deb-4a40-9c26-9742d9adc518?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) is an excellent source of accurate insight on Sudan. I provide below their published content below and highly encourage you to follow them and elevate them on social media.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/860da9b3-5d0c-4a40-84ad-2fa8c6fd1167?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
### Where is The International Criminal Court?
The ICC is taking action in Sudan. Since being sworn into office in June, 2021, ICC Chief Prosecutor Karim Khan [has visited Sudan multiple times](https://substack.com/redirect/1c9d32fd-1d6a-490d-93c9-bbe727bd745f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to speak with survivors. And among his first orders of business after being sworn in was in July 2021, when the [ICC advanced charges of war crimes and crimes against humanity](https://substack.com/redirect/3fdf5b07-d026-4ec4-857b-a5fc6d0eeca2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on 31 counts against Ali Muhammad Abd-Al-Rahman and committed him to trial--all brought forth by prosecutor Karim Khan. Regarding General Hamdan, mentioned in the above graphic, the ICC is also working on advancing that case. As ICC Prosecutor Karim Khan [reported in August of 2022](https://substack.com/redirect/1c9d32fd-1d6a-490d-93c9-bbe727bd745f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> In my meetings with the Chairman of the Sovereignty Council, General Abdel Fattah Al-Burhan, and the Deputy Chairman of the Sovereignty Council, **General Mohamed Hamdan Dagalo, I was clear that full cooperation was now required from the Sudanese authorities in order to progress the cases concerning the remaining suspects in the Darfur situation** and ensure the Ali Kushayb trial marks the beginning of a process towards broader justice. [emphasis mine]
The August 2022 announcement then details the specific actions being taken against those committing war crimes, including General Dagalo, and what steps the ICC is taking to protect vulnerable communities. However, the work continues as with each passing day the conflict grows more unstable. As NPR reports citing [UNICEF](https://substack.com/redirect/2f2943a9-f28e-4263-818d-92535cecd623?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> According to UNICEF, at least 77 hospitals across Sudan have come under attack since the war began. Aid groups say that with the extreme fighting that's resulted in the displacement of more than 7 million people, Sudan has become the [largest humanitarian crisis in the world](https://substack.com/redirect/561e7097-3304-4586-970e-5227f321c5eb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and that the attacks have made it difficult for health workers to respond and provide critical medical services to millions of people.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/aec990e9-44c9-4ccb-bb33-41e87403079b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
### How can you help?
NasAlSudan created this helpful graphic on the three areas we can each support the people of Sudan. Deepen your knowledge about Sudan (by listening to Sudanese scholars [like Guardian columnist Nesrine Malik](https://substack.com/redirect/edc05551-9c71-478b-af25-cd4daab5121b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), donate to grassroots organizations on the ground like the [Sudan UN fund ](https://substack.com/redirect/9f106034-fb80-45f2-8bc4-cf0c84332d70?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)that is exclusively focused on the people of Sudan, and [write to your member of Congress ](https://substack.com/redirect/a5f42025-0e90-4436-b805-ec3e6e980748?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)to demand action and peace.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e47456c2-378f-4514-87cd-56c8dd4db5df?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Tens of millions of innocent people continue to suffer horrific atrocity in Sudan. It is critical we use our platforms to raise awareness and understanding, and most importantly, action to encourage peace and justice. Please share this content by NasAlSudan, elevate hashtags like #KeepEyesOnSudan, and continue to raise your voice for justice for the people of Sudan. And if you have the means to contribute your funds to Sudanese humanitarian causes, [please do so](https://substack.com/redirect/9f106034-fb80-45f2-8bc4-cf0c84332d70?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
**In fact, for every new subscriber from this article,**_**[free or paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2991465f-0e1d-488f-9b70-652eb49f79d5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) , **_**I will donate $10 --up to $1000--to the United Nations Sudan Humanitarian fund.** I am doing this both because I believe in leading by example, and also because I want each of you to be involved in countering this crisis. To be clear, even if you subscribe for free and spend $0 in doing so, I will donate $10. If you are _already_ a subscriber, then share this with your network and help get more thoughtful people to #KeepEyesOnSudan.

Thank you for being an awesome subscriber! When possible, I hope you'll consider upgrading to a $6/mo or $50/year subscription! Humanitarian catastrophes are increasing before our eyes--here's how you can help counter the injustice | | | Dec 1 | | | | | | | | | | | | In the Sudanese Proxy War, the world is witnessing one of the gravest--and most ignored--humanitarian catastrophes. Similarly, the escalating humanitarian crisis in the Congo is directly tied to the legacy of slavery and the decades long genocidal reign of terror and genocide by Belgium King Leopold II. Unsurprisingly, legacy media is notably absent on both to the detriment of all humanity. Below I focus on Sudan, and later this week you will see an update from me on the crisis in the Congo. I am hopeful that you will use the information here to increase your understanding of both crises, and more play an active role in supporting victims to help end their suffering. Let 's Address This. | | ---|---|--- A Sudanese girl at a transit centre for refugees in Renk, South Sudan, earlier this year. Photograph: Luis Tato/AFP/Getty Images Quick Note! I am doing everything in my power over the next four years to stave off fascism in the United States and globally, and I need your support. Subscribe and join the movement. What You Need to Know About Sudan The current Sudan crisis ignited in April of 2023. The UN High Commission on Refugees ("UNCHR") : Forced 11.3 million people from their homes with more than 8 million displaced internally. In total, 25 million people, nearly half of Sudan's population, are in need of humanitarian assistance and protection services. As of October 2024, 3 million people had fled to the Central African Republic (CAR), Chad, Egypt, Ethiopia, Libya, South Sudan, and Uganda. Famine is confirmed in parts of North Darfur since August 2024. To put it in perspective, 25 million is a population greater than the entire populations of around a 140 nations globally. Sudanese run community platform is an excellent source of accurate insight on Sudan. I provide below their published content below and highly encourage you to follow them and elevate them on social media. | | ---|---|--- Where is The International Criminal Court? The ICC is taking action in Sudan. Since being sworn into office in June, 2021, ICC Chief Prosecutor Karim Khan to speak with survivors. And among his first orders of business after being sworn in was in July 2021, when the on 31 counts against Ali Muhammad Abd-Al-Rahman and committed him to trial--all brought forth by prosecutor Karim Khan. Regarding General Hamdan, mentioned in the above graphic, the ICC is also working on advancing that case. As ICC Prosecutor Karim Khan : In my meetings with the Chairman of the Sovereignty Council, General Abdel Fattah Al-Burhan, and the Deputy Chairman of the Sovereignty Council, General Mohamed Hamdan Dagalo, I was clear that full cooperation was now required from the Sudanese authorities in order to progress the cases concerning the remaining suspects in the Darfur situation and ensure the Ali Kushayb trial marks the beginning of a process towards broader justice. [emphasis mine] The August 2022 announcement then details the specific actions being taken against those committing war crimes, including General Dagalo, and what steps the ICC is taking to protect vulnerable communities. However, the work continues as with each passing day the conflict grows more unstable. As NPR reports citing : According to UNICEF, at least 77 hospitals across Sudan have come under attack since the war began. Aid groups say that with the extreme fighting that's resulted in the displacement of more than 7 million people, Sudan has become the and that the attacks have made it difficult for health workers to respond and provide critical medical services to millions of people. | | ---|---|--- How can you help? NasAlSudan created this helpful graphic on the three areas we can each support the people of Sudan. Deepen your knowledge about Sudan (by listening to Sudanese scholars , donate to grassroots organizations on the ground like the is exclusively focused on the people of Sudan, and demand action and peace. | | ---|---|--- Tens of millions of innocent people continue to suffer horrific atrocity in Sudan. It is critical we use our platforms to raise awareness and understanding, and most importantly, action to encourage peace and justice. To be clear, even if you subscribe for free and spend $0 in doing so, I will donate $10. name: Lila Rose
subject: Defund Planned Parenthood Petition
body:
Every 80 seconds, a preborn child loses its life at the hands of Planned Parenthood

| | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.redconservatives.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_s=55ba277133594868b20a059461e62530&_t=v7bHMNjcSF5VcvmNmUF5kn0jj9pKrN2W_NsVVZnhO2R_Ux_13PC_nWRRW9PgnRw015kDjN0WktOUexoAs7sCLQ5ejuJEQn5SplCIE8tOxuJEmW6G_9JD1d6C3agTZznQ)_
---
[ ](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=55ba277133594868b20a059461e62530&_e=T68BLucP-KIAaSaZTf9vmR5O4ogWa-IVu0BD0emsiSc9kOQl9ZdXUgCpC9QGVCjQTWrE-OBE8iukmmVRDcMEDK_oohmGbfNMy7yn_KfW17HTGdzOeOiYn11gDpbmniGulxofcOD-9Ukw6qJqClL0nX_swZZXQLWrEykicIdGLDINky7XbgkEw7U8czPxFcCreZLEPAJTpoyfkE44w6LxIjG67c4IDXxJwV2YDSqT6WGlEHhvsfbUNoix-W9qe1-ldYvrYepQzmuJfjZh9cbHMtTjPkiLUS5hVopIODBfy4gmSBI_ElamkFrWnyMFQPiaxxHGjanhXO69LQkLN--F2GXPoeroyIW6t00wrcGlq6WL8Dny1uj41Iy9PibkmMYUQEFBREWtlmGtjMARs3ZleQ%3D%3D)
#
Dear Friend,

Every 80 seconds, a preborn child loses its life at the hands of Planned Parenthood. This means that by the time you finish reading this email, another innocent life will be gone.

Despite the Supreme Court ruling in the overturning of _Roe v. Wade_ , Planned Parenthood continues to receive taxpayer funding, effectively subsidizing the intentional killing of preborn children. Since 2000, nearly $10.7 billion of taxpayers' money has funded their life-ending work.

Contrast this with the nearly 3,000 Pro-life pregnancy centers nationwide dedicated to supporting expectant mothers. Planned Parenthood only operates about 600 facilities and primarily offers one service: abortion. Alarmingly, they perform 62 abortions for every prenatal care service they provide, and prenatal care services are down 80% since 2010.

As a pro-life individual, I know you don't want your hard-earned tax dollars to support an organization that prioritizes abortion.

That's why I'm urging you to join us to demand an end to this taxpayer-funded ongoing tragedy. A new Congress and president will be chosen this November, and they need to hear from us _now_ that America does NOT support funding Planned Parenthood.

Make your voice heard. Sign our petition before midnight to demand an end to this grave misuse of your taxes. **[https://www.liveaction.org/defund-planned-parenthood-petition/](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=55ba277133594868b20a059461e62530&_e=T68BLucP-KIAaSaZTf9vmR5O4ogWa-IVu0BD0emsiSc9kOQl9ZdXUgCpC9QGVCjQTWrE-OBE8iukmmVRDcMEDK_oohmGbfNMy7yn_KfW17HTGdzOeOiYn11gDpbmniGulxofcOD-9Ukw6qJqClL0nX_swZZXQLWrEykicIdGLDINky7XbgkEw7U8czPxFcCreZLEPAJTpoyfkE44w6LxIjG67c4IDXxJwV2YDSqT6WGxtTirxyhfjROdMxQ3ZbFGFQRVNKPe9x1KrfKrjlbL7-YdPt8W_jizBPFbQHH4MV59HRvzLzL_DX-jBAJRmiVWGQCBSJmoRd6JgqC8idKxJPe-eORmleni6-jdZOG6i5dJ3QG3tk2EsTdBYtNVbkgslORswHdGpeQtG7_lNAOdGw%3D%3D)**

Thank you for standing with us for the protection of future generations!

For Life,

Lila Rose
**President and Founder**

[](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=55ba277133594868b20a059461e62530&_e=T68BLucP-KIAaSaZTf9vmR5O4ogWa-IVu0BD0emsiSc9kOQl9ZdXUgCpC9QGVCjQTWrE-OBE8iukmmVRDcMEDK_oohmGbfNMy7yn_KfW17HTGdzOeOiYn11gDpbmniGulxofcOD-9Ukw6qJqClL0nX_swZZXQLWrEykicIdGLDINky7XbgkEw7U8czPxFcCreZLEPAJTpoyfkE44w6LxIjG67c4IDXxJwV2YDSqT6WHdzGxihKR18cJyDpIujcb_cMc3HUVwI8RVFCtfpsRU-rLOwwC_0WOzY0O-N7QwDBJqsAPmK2ANIYyWkj57IMtHo6ZLEmgGMw7c2SvN6mYBbBfuky7KUOcb89uM-jT75CpIlisJTQbwAMaVbho1YwTnETBQfUInn9sLtWubp3dISA%3D%3D)

2200 Wilson Blvd, Suite 102, PMB 111 Arlington, VA 22201

subject: Trump prosecuting Jack Smith?!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
please don’t ignore this!
| **🚨 URGENT 🚨
Trump Has Sights Set on Prosecuting Political Rivals — Including Jack Smith ** Friend, despite Jack Smith announcing he’s stepping down, Donald Trump is STILL out for revenge. **He’s not only plotting to DESTROY all evidence against him, but PROSECUTE Jack Smith!** [**We need 99 more Democrats in your area to sign our letter thanking Jack Smith for his work and standing with him against these vile attacks! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85210?t=6&akid=18112%2E878179%2ELyDQ0H) | [Donate $3 to sign the letter now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85210?t=7&akid=18112%2E878179%2ELyDQ0H)
---
To: Special Counsel Jack Smith
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: I stand with you. **Dear Special Counsel Jack Smith,**

**_I am FURIOUS that Trump is seeking to prosecute you!_**

Trump is running scared because he KNOWS you’re about to drop hundreds of pages of evidence detailing his treasonous crimes.

He’s even promising to be a _“dictator on day one,”_ hell-bent on avenging anyone who has held him accountable.

I know it isn’t easy fighting off Trump and the GOP’s escalating threats to take you down, so please know that Democrats across the country stand with you.

[**I can’t thank you enough for all of your amazing work over the years to bring Donald Trump to justice! So I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show my gratitude and to keep electing incredible Democrats who will save our democracy from MAGA extremism »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85210?t=8&akid=18112%2E878179%2ELyDQ0H) | [Donate $3 to sign the letter now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85210?t=9&akid=18112%2E878179%2ELyDQ0H)
---
__X A grateful Democrat__
_The Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18112%2E878179%2ELyDQ0H). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18112%2E878179%2ELyDQ0H).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=18112%2E878179%2ELyDQ0H) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=18112%2E878179%2ELyDQ0H). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=18112%2E878179%2ELyDQ0H)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=18112%2E878179%2ELyDQ0H)

subject: Are you searching for the perfect Christmas gift? I have an idea for you!
body:
To say thanks for all of your support, I’m coming to you FIRST with this exclusive offer...

| |
---
| | | Peter,

Christmas will be here before we know it!

I'm determined to get ahead on my Christmas gift shopping this year, and I bet you are too! I know it can be a lot to keep track of what to gift your loved ones, but I have an idea that I think you just might be interested in.

My team let me know that we just got a re-order of my best-selling Marsha, Marsha, Marsha Pizza Cutters delivered to our office. Peter, these Pizza Cutters make the perfect stocking stuffer for all the freedom-loving conservatives in your life - _and they have been flying off the shelves!_

_**[After all your support this year, I wanted to come to you FIRST with this exclusive gift opportunity:](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=029471df5bf141459487cbf55b5a8ade&_e=gze4i9WELI6X6mpwO8FmdWSeWfqt32go6NeguwS8TRwXT_nmBj-Ve-8qH6IV3u5xzI388fkNzB8xYtws9MUD_PbuQSKDdKMotzuRhQSb0_tWymUDyke5P9Z-sbaJpZWAJ_hQNk_5dGt4BeokYDKQIU81alM9rtuGTbpFvSBiOeY8aIvpPHcv81vv5Rq4bxfuuAAmbgDUv8KsP7ivSvWUh0E1Tnski3Q1myCpDJNqO2Lk7dBrVbQXTBTi0OakRiAZrWY4VLz3UkbxuvUB4-Qta_mzNAiqSVPQQD_wWRM1cL4fWlILiRFGRiT5LbUNcA1PoJOEGU3i0kktKru0614bJ6537gbtrGzTtsmboAZQ5sMBAHSaaatkSp4FXTSES0k6YwDIDkeAgHuWqIY9sebp_EeaLZFfqr7CkLFTtkPFb5FMOVareV0yBzWvDRJ-bZUk "After all your support this year, I wanted to come to you FIRST with this exclusive gift opportunity:")**_

---
# FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW
---
| | Reader,**I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns.

I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism.

**But there's also far more to what the Sun is building.

As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be.

I've been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust.

The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored.

The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That's the American way.

**The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun.** A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That's 18 years before the New York Times published its first number.**My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly.**

I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths.

They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as a penny a day. I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts.

clean_body: It's a voice America needs | | | | FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW | | Reader,I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns. I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism. But there's also far more to what the Sun is building. As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be. I've been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust. The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored. The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That's the American way. The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun. A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That's 18 years before the New York Times published its first number.My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly. I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths. They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as a penny a day. I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts. | | | | Please join me in the fight to restore America's journalism. This is one mission that our country desperately needs. | | | Larry Kudlow Columnist for The New York Sun | | | | | Larry Kudlow Columnist for The New York Sun | | |

Patriot,

We hope this message finds you well and filled with the same pride and optimism that we're feeling for our country today! It's a new day in America, and together, we're going to Make America Great Again!

As proud patriots who believe in the principles that make America exceptional--freedom, hard work, and faith--we have a chance to come together and show our support for our new 47th President of the United States, Donald J. Trump! President Trump has achieved something truly remarkable, and now, we want you to join us in celebrating his long-awaited success in a personal way by signing a special congratulations card.

[](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=4b0aa497917e43ee8b6c0521d6d81ee2&_e=Zb9GFAUvzAjjQ4inTzJ2xjQv9hZS-UTnILvylMR_pe0XbgRLKgR4LfbDyjTFcZDRcXysJHwHkvqneHNJVmgaf-K_IhX0BG1ZoyZIG2Ii92n_AQ0Kc6jksuZHzwCzftZlJ3ug8Ia6IAC-iDl5RYvboZEN82nF4E3dcEETYxS4oghPvkKSrGOreD77_B9KLwIKItzYM5kR9GXCpwQpv8k8MzlBciyJ8wVOvv5oI78DtHIwAZZTai6noPSDFKckG8rqRWLqOo_Hg0j3RAjWsSydqyRDf0khg5VrMRBycfhCQcJjhtZ5WtoPGWnKhKdAFUCjLnwYun8FOr1z0Ji3eTgb8A%3D%3D)

This isn't just a simple gesture; it's a statement of our shared values. It's about showing our appreciation for those who stand strong for the causes we hold dear--those who fight for limited government, individual liberty, and the preservation of the American Dream. your signature is a reflection of your commitment to those principles and your pride in our great nation!

We've seen firsthand how challenging these times can be, but moments like these remind us why we must continue to stand together. By signing this card, you're letting President Trump know that you're with him, support our MAGA movement and are helping push forward the mission that will preserve the greatness of this nation for future generations.

As conservatives, we understand the power of grassroots support, and that's exactly what this is. It's a chance for you to add your voice to a wave of support that will remind our America-First leaders--and our country--that we're not backing down.

**[Take a moment to sign our personal congratulations card today.](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=4b0aa497917e43ee8b6c0521d6d81ee2&_e=Zb9GFAUvzAjjQ4inTzJ2xjQv9hZS-UTnILvylMR_pe0XbgRLKgR4LfbDyjTFcZDRcXysJHwHkvqneHNJVmgaf-K_IhX0BG1ZoyZIG2Ii92n_AQ0Kc6jksuZHzwCzftZlJ3ug8Ia6IAC-iDl5RYvboRJ3IUsO39Yrc53MjKkAbsuDbg3air2QwMr9YcON7qgkvgJJ_-gT18y3gD_gTStyKejW3hgbidtFb2LiOs4MoUFtWKbvEg-wuexrwYYcnttQUSvilw-uON-l4sZnIctw7ivm84H78cOskiMnpxrh7G1DK4hTNb_iTs8BqJF5BO2NL_JMwb1UsDeiTc1QED67mRmDomM0ChX0x37W84btFmE%3D)**

**God bless you, and God bless America.**

_Warmly,
The Harrigan Family_

**According to reports, Trump plans on using an executive order to remove ALL transgender members from the military!**

_**We 100% agree with him!**_

**American Principles Project made a feature documentary called Culture War that BLASTED the military for FAILING American Families!**

This _**WOKE NONSENSE**_ cost American lives.

President Trump spoke to us directly about transgenders in the military saying: **"I ended it immediately, and when they got in they ended what I did immediately. **

**I'll go back to what I had because it was the right thing to do."** We are ELATED that President Trump is leading the charge to ROOT OUT this woke nonsense that is FAILING our military —

— **and putting our country IN DANGER!**

_We need**YOUR** help to make sure we KEEP on the pressure. _
