name: Patti Reilly
subject: My police officer son is going to prison for doing his job
body:
Never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be wrongfully convicted of murder – murder of a criminal my son didn’t even touch.
Dear Fellow American,

My son, Washington Metro Police Officer Terence Sutton, was just sentenced to 5 1⁄2 years in prison for doing the job he was trained to do.

And though you and I have never met, I’m praying you’ll help me save him.

Here are some photos of Terence as a little boy.

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=6db26f6e8d1140caa7431425c0ab2e3a&_e=i9druiY-9uFLxtBPvmhQnIgyjxoALnSWaePfIRwszFhrk3cdOGWa-_uPvnPpvZ46AOyOFJeKgRq2g_xI5GiaWSrwnzJsBMUfMNL-wQjuhexZdHX1tnJTZIghJV9lt_pa4tJQQYD8GPQqOHGrLd1JQeAsEp0EAP8BZb6aNBi4XMFmNQSTc0kIuCJhv1egg3cS5AXC3-sKlzJbbDV6e4qWhaS9gtJZMFNN3dGg-wiHFOM_9eBEkVlq96_KpfqOTUV-ntr-3W7IY5muC3hFfAYm6ruaqFAil8Tl55ugAbTosozSBUlVFS7f4vNc_Cta65Vbqpd9qX_tamoIyDYhT7GHqHmBrOF6ZfwdM4EKlUNKdN-GF3OLBmbwmMffbPRQFOMMUt7Z7KGostjC1PL_swphMA%3D%3D)
He always dreamed of following in his dad’s footsteps to be a police officer. I also included one of my favorites of us from the night he graduated from the Police Academy.

I was so proud that night.

Never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be _wrongfully_ _convicted_ _of_ _murder_ **– murder of a criminal my son didn’t even touch.**

[**_I’m praying you will help me save my son_**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=6db26f6e8d1140caa7431425c0ab2e3a&_e=i9druiY-9uFLxtBPvmhQnIgyjxoALnSWaePfIRwszFhrk3cdOGWa-_uPvnPpvZ46AOyOFJeKgRq2g_xI5GiaWSrwnzJsBMUfMNL-wQjuhexZdHX1tnJTZIghJV9lt_pa4tJQQYD8GPQqOHGrLd1JQeAsEp0EAP8BZb6aNBi4XMFmNQSTc0kIuCJhv1egg3cS5AXC3-sKlzJbbDV6e4qWhaS9gtJZMFNN3dGg-wiHFOM_9eBEkVlq96_KpfqOTUV-QwwZsq1EXtXdIrluJpqqxWcZqrcozMLQszvlauce681X1EfHfGGX_xrL_u-U6a5D1-Edcu6AAxR072Of8SDfO_t6Sgz9_A0QzMYd0MoqYBWBYpvbjUZiKfx5rd1lJ9JSA3_0ViZwnF7PsaG-ZNbLsg%3D%3D) – **but first, let me explain what happened.** Our nightmare started in October of 2020.

Terence was sitting in his patrol car when he received a report that a known gang member, Karon Hylton-Brown, was seen entering a rival gang’s territory.

Karon was a violent criminal with a rap sheet a mile long – including drugs, illegal gun possession, and assaults. Earlier that day, he was seen arguing with a rival gang member who owed him money. So Terence and other officers were concerned Karon was planning to get revenge.

When Terence saw Karon illegally driving a motorized scooter on the sidewalk without a helmet, he tried to pull him over to talk. Instead, Karon took off on the scooter.

Terence watched as Karon sped through traffic, weaving in and out of cars and blowing past red lights and stop signs.

My son knew Karon was putting others at risk, so for 3 minutes he slowly and carefully followed behind in his patrol car.

Then it happened.

Karon veered into an alleyway, drove out the other side without looking and slammed into a passing car.

After several days in the hospital, Karon died from his injuries. And here’s where the story takes a shocking turn...

Because Karon was black, and the incident happened just four months after George Floyd’s death, the anti-police mob went into frenzy.

They blamed Terence for the accident and smeared him as a racist.

There were protests and even riots. The mob threw rocks at officers, smashed store windows, and set fires.

Anti-police politicians piled on too. Without any evidence, they demanded my son be charged even though he did nothing to cause Karon’s death.

**The pressure campaign worked and prosecutors charged my son with Second-Degree Murder.**

**Terence was convicted in December 2022 and he was finally just sentenced – to 5 1⁄2 years in prison.**

Now you understand why I’m so heartbroken. The injustice is almost too much to bear.

My son was well-respected by the community he served. He trained many Rookies and set a good example for all of them. He was even awarded Officer of the Year!

But unless Terence’s appeal is successful, he’s going to prison – which is why I’m urgently turning to you for help today. The **Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund** (LELDF) has stepped forward to pay for Terence’s defense and is actively raising funds to pay for the appeal.

If you’ve ever heard of LELDF, you know they’re a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Terence for over 30 years. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent cops – and their families – at their lowest moments.

We expect it will cost at least $150,000 to appeal Terence’s conviction.

So I have to ask you one of the toughest questions I’ve ever asked anyone:

[**_Will you help my son Terence fight the unjust charges against him by donating to LELDF today?_**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=6db26f6e8d1140caa7431425c0ab2e3a&_e=i9druiY-9uFLxtBPvmhQnIgyjxoALnSWaePfIRwszFhrk3cdOGWa-_uPvnPpvZ46AOyOFJeKgRq2g_xI5GiaWSrwnzJsBMUfMNL-wQjuhexZdHX1tnJTZIghJV9lt_pa4tJQQYD8GPQqOHGrLd1JQeAsEp0EAP8BZb6aNBi4XMFmNQSTc0kIuCJhv1egg3cS5AXC3-sKlzJbbDV6e4qWhaS9gtJZMFNN3dGg-wiHFOM_9eBEkVlq96_KpfqOTUV-VVzwmmShyD6t7W1g_drsop6Ue5HcoqOivQF-S1XJt92X3DajN_fc_D0PyQUPJ2EaZZEsjLBImyRv9Ga7c6wCXZNzgbWf8zG5PcJokh75nmHoPUm6xaaWGTPIhjlEdhqB7DYEpKqoZ-ddm64liQ1vJQ%3D%3D)

I’m not asking you to donate the entire $150,000 yourself – though it would be a huge weight off our shoulders if you are able to help that way.

[**_But your tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, or more will help LELDF fully fund Terence’s appeal over the next 12 months._**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=6db26f6e8d1140caa7431425c0ab2e3a&_e=i9druiY-9uFLxtBPvmhQnIgyjxoALnSWaePfIRwszFhrk3cdOGWa-_uPvnPpvZ46AOyOFJeKgRq2g_xI5GiaWSrwnzJsBMUfMNL-wQjuhexZdHX1tnJTZIghJV9lt_pa4tJQQYD8GPQqOHGrLd1JQeAsEp0EAP8BZb6aNBi4XMFmNQSTc0kIuCJhv1egg3cS5AXC3-sKlzJbbDV6e4qWhaS9gtJZMFNN3dGg-wiHFOM_9eBEkVlq96_KpfqOTUV-cos-0_L6kLei-9s-mkh8f2YE9g3ip25NCopZBPtksdes3nOJBdkM1wpwQbkcu4A3V2pR5Fy6RI-SlpPU9hyx_0cCln-bKJ3UwFN8Qv1fIajC48d8lUnPDJvWQyJodcbd8T9TtotXWyYr-HvA1KQ0Vw%3D%3D) If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn’t be so bold as to ask for your help.

But I already lost my husband. He was a police officer too, and he was so proud that Terence followed in his footsteps. I simply can’t bear the thought of having another family member ripped away from me.

[**_So if you are at all able, please follow this link to make a tax-deductible donation to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund to help my Terence._**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=6db26f6e8d1140caa7431425c0ab2e3a&_e=i9druiY-9uFLxtBPvmhQnIgyjxoALnSWaePfIRwszFhrk3cdOGWa-_uPvnPpvZ46AOyOFJeKgRq2g_xI5GiaWSrwnzJsBMUfMNL-wQjuhexZdHX1tnJTZIghJV9lt_pa4tJQQYD8GPQqOHGrLd1JQeAsEp0EAP8BZb6aNBi4XMFmNQSTc0kIuCJhv1egg3cS5AXC3-sKlzJbbDV6e4qWhaS9gtJZMFNN3dGg-wiHFOM_9eBEkVlq96_KpfqOTUV-hF3wDQJI79pPwiPZefBNwADTJJjy47edGWPmgT2osK5jxcDlyR-tdfp_39Zbc439zdhN43QHYlSmiaRwVbzuNtfFdq-5pyhsr0WLDUHvxygLamcrC_sbHVnz1Ebt1uvDsP7zhv55NTHI0kIGm3IwAQ%3D%3D)

**Any amount – $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or more – will help.**

And because LELDF is a non-profit organization, your gift is completely tax-deductible. But whatever you can afford to give, I ask that you rush it back quickly.

Right now, Terence can only rely on the good nature and generosity of kind folks like you.

Thank you for taking the time to read my letter today.

And thank you in advance for helping LELDF support Terence and other wrongly accused officers.

Gratefully,
**Patti Reilly**

P.S. Don’t get me wrong, I’m thankful the judge granted Terence bond so he doesn’t have to report to prison just yet. Hopefully it never comes to that... but to get Terence’s conviction overturned, it’s going to cost at least $150,000 to fund his appeal. [**_Will you please help me save my son by making an urgent tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100 or more to LELDF today?_**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=6db26f6e8d1140caa7431425c0ab2e3a&_e=i9druiY-9uFLxtBPvmhQnIgyjxoALnSWaePfIRwszFhrk3cdOGWa-_uPvnPpvZ46AOyOFJeKgRq2g_xI5GiaWSrwnzJsBMUfMNL-wQjuhexZdHX1tnJTZIghJV9lt_pa4tJQQYD8GPQqOHGrLd1JQeAsEp0EAP8BZb6aNBi4XMFmNQSTc0kIuCJhv1egg3cS5AXC3-sKlzJbbDV6e4qWhaS9gtJZMFNN3dGg-wiHFOM_9eBEkVlq96_KpfqOTUV-E3RKgygM2NFCcVL2Jxn4UXV4JI7AwKNORPRMTHEr3x5I0zos6iFP67RGoGsyiEkcjCWaW1VBCQuwd_A3u7B2ZxOmOWXAcrTaJ_P1vd-v78f1tV_-bD9pV-jo66JV9vNIWdjkW8HR9i2PGkA7Sxe13Q%3D%3D) Thank you for standing with Terence during this nightmare.

clean_body: Never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be wrongfully convicted of murder – murder of a criminal my son didn’t even touch. Dear Fellow American, My son, Washington Metro Police Officer Terence Sutton, was just sentenced to 5 1⁄2 years in prison for doing the job he was trained to do. And though you and I have never met, I’m praying you’ll help me save him. Here are some photos of Terence as a little boy. He always dreamed of following in his dad’s footsteps to be a police officer. I also included one of my favorites of us from the night he graduated from the Police Academy. I was so proud that night. Never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be wrongfully convicted of murder – murder of a criminal my son didn’t even touch. – but first, let me explain what happened. Our nightmare started in October of 2020. Terence was sitting in his patrol car when he received a report that a known gang member, Karon Hylton-Brown, was seen entering a rival gang’s territory. Karon was a violent criminal with a rap sheet a mile long – including drugs, illegal gun possession, and assaults. Earlier that day, he was seen arguing with a rival gang member who owed him money. So Terence and other officers were concerned Karon was planning to get revenge. When Terence saw Karon illegally driving a motorized scooter on the sidewalk without a helmet, he tried to pull him over to talk. Instead, Karon took off on the scooter. Terence watched as Karon sped through traffic, weaving in and out of cars and blowing past red lights and stop signs. My son knew Karon was putting others at risk, so for 3 minutes he slowly and carefully followed behind in his patrol car. Then it happened. Karon veered into an alleyway, drove out the other side without looking and slammed into a passing car. After several days in the hospital, Karon died from his injuries. And here’s where the story takes a shocking turn... Because Karon was black, and the incident happened just four months after George Floyd’s death, the anti-police mob went into frenzy. They blamed Terence for the accident and smeared him as a racist. There were protests and even riots. The mob threw rocks at officers, smashed store windows, and set fires. Anti-police politicians piled on too. Without any evidence, they demanded my son be charged even though he did nothing to cause Karon’s death. The pressure campaign worked and prosecutors charged my son with Second-Degree Murder. Terence was convicted in December 2022 and he was finally just sentenced – to 5 1⁄2 years in prison. Now you understand why I’m so heartbroken. The injustice is almost too much to bear. My son was well-respected by the community he served. He trained many Rookies and set a good example for all of them. He was even awarded Officer of the Year! But unless Terence’s appeal is successful, he’s going to prison – which is why I’m urgently turning to you for help today. The Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF) has stepped forward to pay for Terence’s defense and is actively raising funds to pay for the appeal. If you’ve ever heard of LELDF, you know they’re a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Terence for over 30 years. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent cops – and their families – at their lowest moments. We expect it will cost at least $150,000 to appeal Terence’s conviction. So I have to ask you one of the toughest questions I’ve ever asked anyone: I’m not asking you to donate the entire $150,000 yourself – though it would be a huge weight off our shoulders if you are able to help that way. If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn’t be so bold as to ask for your help. But I already lost my husband. He was a police officer too, and he was so proud that Terence followed in his footsteps. I simply can’t bear the thought of having another family member ripped away from me. Any amount – $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or more – will help. And because LELDF is a non-profit organization, your gift is completely tax-deductible. But whatever you can afford to give, I ask that you rush it back quickly. Right now, Terence can only rely on the good nature and generosity of kind folks like you. Thank you for taking the time to read my letter today. And thank you in advance for helping LELDF support Terence and other wrongly accused officers. Gratefully, Patti Reilly P.S. Don’t get me wrong, I’m thankful the judge granted Terence bond so he doesn’t have to report to prison just yet. Hopefully it never comes to that... but to get Terence’s conviction overturned, it’s going to cost at least $150,000 to fund his appeal. Thank you for standing with Terence during this nightmare. More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visitwww.PoliceDefense.org. And remember -Blue Lives Matter! Please know that you have my full support as you continue working toward seeing the America First Agenda through to the end and reversing all the radical policies that have been imposed by the Biden-Harris Administration. Thank you for your dedication to preserving the values that make America great. Together, we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! Sincerely, X_______________ " alias="SIGN THE LETTER >>" conversion="false" data-linkto="https://">SIGN THE LETTER >> Thank you, Team Marsha Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Marsha for Senate, MARSHA PAC, and Tennessee Republican Party Federal Election Account. To ensure that you don't miss out on important messages, please add info@updates.marshablackburn.com "info@updates.marshablackburn.com" to your address book. Not Sure How? name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Do Christians Immediately Go to Heaven When They Die?
body:
I often hear the question, “What will we do in heaven?”
I often hear the question, "What will we do in heaven?"
| | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_s=9910d2b6288244cb9d59a876e4e5f04a&_t=XhZprz1H_Bg93dTS5GSU5xxmeCjSsUOAwWTumQlUsHTE1H62xuHuDUuT5z5GwsGNpARgDoMl9ID81PY9XXzQYHKNA8gWf5AQw1_VNEfftXPTMoGDjpogr4BTCjDe7tI6)_
---
[](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=9910d2b6288244cb9d59a876e4e5f04a&_e=zVdJSxK_urAlcSUVKDvo-SIPQKSY_ftEBm46rHuGFMj48nSNbX5-LwGO-8TKew6-LbEpRM5KQd3oJkNq-lqu9_U-9ZAMEZZIn8I7bZAEArm1onm0o_oH1zT1T7Pe-zd-MMt8gy1yk9nEDB9VanLSLRftXzXQdmqEtFcATwoz_5mjS1uv93_hwWD9QsJ_aOruqRrDpnWuLJXTLm-ZjuY17W5Ku4KMrAr_FbUWD0_SYnHnVxkyMtzVR7uHa3X-d3LykuJm_NKNDDilXsMU44OkI-yq2ebhjcGQVjWHjpGLx_olT7foVcoKZQmMXz2k9XLehYdSI3d_nPCVdgivXNv-EIocpNXxaWrvjy76SRloCcEiWDgXJw02BdkDIgdXyTqMfehDe54a2ywvwrYwVZV1M8ubvA3FMFkk975CG-vjKhI%3D)
Hello Friend,

I often hear the question, "What will we do in heaven?" Many imagine heaven as a place where we sit around on clouds, strumming harps. But nothing could be further from the truth.

The Bible gives us glimpses of a heaven filled with purpose and activity. Revelation 22:3 says, "His servants will serve Him." We will have meaningful work, free from the frustration we often face here on earth. There will be no more exhaustion or stress, only joy, as we serve the Lord.

Heaven will also be a place of joyful worship. Revelation 5:13 gives us a picture of all creation joining together to sing praises to the Lamb who was slain. Can you imagine what it will be like to be part of that heavenly choir?

In A Place Called Heaven, I explore 10 surprising truths about your eternal home, pointing to what the Bible tells us about our eternal home.
* What Difference Does a Future Heaven Make in My Life Today?
* Is Heaven a Real Place or Is It a State of Mind?
* Have Some People Already Visited Heaven?
* Do Christians Immediately Go to Heaven When They Die?
* What Will We Do in Heaven?
* Do People in Heaven Know What is Happening on Earth?
* Will We Know One Another in Heaven?
* Will Heaven Be the Same for Everyone?
* Who Will Be in Heaven?
* How Can I Prepare for My Journey to Heaven?

This book offers hope, direction, and clarity about what awaits those who follow Jesus Christ.

I'd love to send you a copy as a thank-you for your generous gift of $25 or more to Pathway to Victory. Your support helps us continue to pierce the darkness of this world by sharing the light of God's Word with many who desperately need hope.

Click here to donate and receive your copy: [https://secure.ptv.org/a-place-called-heaven-generous-gift-1](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=9910d2b6288244cb9d59a876e4e5f04a&_e=zVdJSxK_urAlcSUVKDvo-SIPQKSY_ftEBm46rHuGFMj48nSNbX5-LwGO-8TKew6-LbEpRM5KQd3oJkNq-lqu9_U-9ZAMEZZIn8I7bZAEArm1onm0o_oH1zT1T7Pe-zd-MMt8gy1yk9nEDB9VanLSLRftXzXQdmqEtFcATwoz_5mjS1uv93_hwWD9QsJ_aOruqRrDpnWuLJXTLm-ZjuY17W5Ku4KMrAr_FbUWD0_SYnHnVxkyMtzVR7uHa3X-d3Ly1F0sXXj-5vhMQ0RMBEFnjn9kSibJl9HmJ4XDCCiWDHTzShX76StDvY8EMEJVVOPzwIBZP7nYEZp-oMc6HtD5nn4TZ7yX6PrvZ9Iwl_YHj_FmxNckncCzySIs2ZPnKBYG6pJor-6ElWdTtO0ueUMO48Z-NqD-_BNUN_7FefwSiHk%3D)

I hope this book creates in you excitement and anticipation for the eternal joy and purpose that awaits us in heaven.

God bless you,
Dr. Robert Jeffress
---

body:
I wanted to remind you that the holiday season is the season to shop at your local small businesses.

| I just celebrated Small Business Saturday by visiting some of my favorite local spots, and I wanted to remind you that the holiday season is the season to shop at your local small businesses.
---
From your corner coffee shop to the family-owned bookstore, small businesses are the backbone of our communities and deserve our support—not just today but every day.

I’ve always advocated for our small businesses—like helping those hit hardest by the pandemic and helping them access the resources they need to thrive. I’m proud to have helped make Maryland a friendly place to grow your business.

[_**As I prepare to continue our work in Congress, I need your support. Will you chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can to help me advocate for small businesses in Maryland and beyond?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97966130/515125655/-1719677217?refcode=BLU_EM_SEFC_2024-12-01_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTIzNDg4Zi0xNGIwLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XOVkFwy9PavNppsC8bfnj-1RRywhbGPUFYE7sexoZFA=)

clean_body: I wanted to remind you that the holiday season is the season to shop at your local small businesses. | = | I just celebrated Small Business Saturday by visiting some of my favorite local spots, and I wanted to remind you that the holiday season is the season to shop at your local small businesses. From your corner coffee shop to the family-owned bookstore, small businesses are the backbone of our communities and deserve our support—not just today but every day. I’ve always advocated for our small businesses—like helping those hit hardest by the pandemic and helping them access the resources they need to thrive. I’m proud to have helped make Maryland a friendly place to grow your business. = | | = | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for supporting the small businesses that make our communities special. Together, Sarah Elfreth * | | = Paid for by Elfreth for Maryland Elfreth for Maryland PO Box 5935 Annapolis, MD 21403 United States

name: Stand with Bernie via Our Revolution
subject: Add your name: Congratulate Bernie on his role on Senate Finance Committee
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis — when Trump
takes office next year, Bernie will join the Senate Finance Committee.
Bernie is VOWING to protect the social safety net — and Our Revolution
will be working to have his back.

Bernie said, “As a member of that committee, I will prioritize protecting
Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid from Republican attacks, and
creating a fair tax system that finally forces the very wealthy to pay
their fair share.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20591?source=email-20241201&t=1011&akid=7331%2E5885482%2E46zigT ]Add your name: Congratulate Bernie on his Senate Finance Committee
role! Stand with him in the fight to protect Social Security, Medicare,
and Medicaid from the Trump admin!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20591?source=email-20241201&t=1012&akid=7331%2E5885482%2E46zigT ]ADD YOUR NAME

Trump and his administration of extreme right-wingers want nothing more
than to destroy Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid. That’s why Trump
has appointed people to critical posts in his government like Dr. Oz, who
wants to privatize Medicare so big corporations can profit, and Project
2025 leaders who want to destroy all social programs.

Bernie joining the Senate Finance Committee, along with his role on the
Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions (HELP) Committee, gives him power
to take on the ultra-wealthy and big corporations. Bernie will have our
activists on his side as he takes on the CEOs and billionaires who would
rather see their taxes lowered and the end of Social Security and Medicare
rather than pay another dime to fund public education and the social
safety net.

This is the focal point of one of our biggest fights under Trump —
protecting the wholesale takeover of our government and public services by
private industry and the ultra-rich. Alongside Bernie, we are organizing
rapid response resistance teams and supporting efforts to block the GOP’s
goals of tearing down the country’s most popular social programs.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20591?source=email-20241201&t=1013&akid=7331%2E5885482%2E46zigT ]Stand with Bernie: Congratulations on having the chance to bring our
movement’s fight to the Senate Finance Committee!

Thank you,

Our Revolution

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: Officially APPEALED
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
I will continue to fight this injustice.

[https://secure.winred.com/rudy-giuliani-freedom-fund-79a3adfa/a3323b0d2e57dabb/?utm_campaign=20241127&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=WAMA&utm_term=vbout]

Dear Friend,

The Democrat Deep State wants $146 MILLION from me – all because I
dared to ask questions about the legitimacy of America’s elections.

To comply with such a frivolous demand, I’d have to give up
_EVERYTHING_ I own – including my dignity.

That’s why I have OFFICIALLY APPEALED this outrageous ruling that
would leave me on the streets.

As I stand on the brink of losing everything, I remind myself that the
Bible says that earthly possessions will always fade, but greater
“heavenly treasures” await us.

Truth, justice, and the fight for freedom are worth _infinitely_
more... They are the “heavenly treasures... that cannot be stolen
and will never rust, decay or lose their value.”

AND WHEN I SEE THAT TWO OF THE RIGGED CASES BROUGHT AGAINST PRESIDENT
TRUMP HAVE NOW BEEN DISMISSED AND “DELAYED INDEFINITELY,” I HAVE
HOPE THAT I CAN WIN MINE TOO!

_But my ability to win this appeal and stay in this fight until
justice is served depends entirely on the support given to me by kind
souls like you, Friend._

Let me also say that I know we’re in the midst of the holidays, so
family and friends come first. Please don’t feel pressured to give
if you can’t!

BUT IF YOU CAN FUND MY BATTLE TO APPEAL THIS UNJUST RULING, PLEASE
MAKE A CONTRIBUTION OF ANY AMOUNT TO MY LEGAL DEFENSE TRUST – THE
RUDY GIULIANI FREEDOM FUND NOW THAT I’VE OFFICIALLY APPEALED THIS

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Stop the indoctrination of our children
body:
Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Fellow Conservative, As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want to say: **_You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children._** Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=fcf7835ad37a4975b61dab11a0847ac8&_e=OFCTEPOA-lRtSo-5OYQJKfwCgxUYJdBQ2TPfNvtfOTqsig3S0ndTUyAO3pLRy_fnUs9ueHjI2c3KJ694NBvu4vzmQCZvsfEo0he3YbdsMEABZ0Chb62F2cObjhzrMQEiPwH24rbnYrdwk3Uz7HPElR4rd8rsWH8DlHSHYZiYfT1fUIolXw0JcGhQP3iIao_El99Ya8cSYQSE3se22s5WH7b5mC1GShovApibkd17s_noJwyhYlnn-N9vL2oDZ1buofFh0LonD79iACEteD0kG-xrz-QGAuraW66V-9B8RKFhMJn7RbR9QzU8b9SWtO3PXVseJsoY1QLgAvLwEJBf77_y0szPqDvww3AxwSSxI-XKy-gsnbqULzoPureSIMw-W4QfajLRodY7fppCv9wgMA%3D%3D)
---
| | And the result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say......and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth. **That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** **[**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=fcf7835ad37a4975b61dab11a0847ac8&_e=OFCTEPOA-lRtSo-5OYQJKfwCgxUYJdBQ2TPfNvtfOTqsig3S0ndTUyAO3pLRy_fnUs9ueHjI2c3KJ694NBvu4vzmQCZvsfEo0he3YbdsMEABZ0Chb62F2cObjhzrMQEiPwH24rbnYrdwk3Uz7HPElR4rd8rsWH8DlHSHYZiYfT1fUIolXw0JcGhQP3iIao_El99Ya8cSYQSE3se22s5WH7b5mC1GShovApibkd17s_noJwyhYlnn-N9vL2oDZ1buAcUooAn4c4yxHjcrpy5bDiRzZ9ar-vS_OslizkARq64MyMtZi-SRO4icOFnHpavH1NlFEnsLC5er62yrVwxo0zofEuNQZ-B-fRf4__BG3aFzO05TKTVUc8NsY9-X8sGxzKq8gmlPdiyIHLDonWtniw%3D%3D)** And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[**Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=fcf7835ad37a4975b61dab11a0847ac8&_e=OFCTEPOA-lRtSo-5OYQJKfwCgxUYJdBQ2TPfNvtfOTqsig3S0ndTUyAO3pLRy_fnUs9ueHjI2c3KJ694NBvu4vzmQCZvsfEo0he3YbdsMEABZ0Chb62F2cObjhzrMQEiPwH24rbnYrdwk3Uz7HPElR4rd8rsWH8DlHSHYZiYfT1fUIolXw0JcGhQP3iIao_El99Ya8cSYQSE3se22s5WH7b5mC1GShovApibkd17s_noJwyhYlnn-N9vL2oDZ1buso8Lw_0fFm4g2vV1ujtXVGofS37cHQnyhX63dNsFNuW9likAXZSMaEQWuEwqaLx7KqCTnlkEVwC9jwyhVY2hWLV5vNKqCyGnTkcwzV88pJ5VrVwgTOAkJbYqnIegvwu5E2yl0ilSgrAYgnsAmbEWTw%3D%3D)** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=fcf7835ad37a4975b61dab11a0847ac8&_e=OFCTEPOA-lRtSo-5OYQJKfwCgxUYJdBQ2TPfNvtfOTqsig3S0ndTUyAO3pLRy_fnUs9ueHjI2c3KJ694NBvu4vzmQCZvsfEo0he3YbdsMEABZ0Chb62F2cObjhzrMQEiPwH24rbnYrdwk3Uz7HPElR4rd8rsWH8DlHSHYZiYfT1fUIolXw0JcGhQP3iIao_El99Ya8cSYQSE3se22s5WH7b5mC1GShovApibkd17s_noJwyhYlnn-N9vL2oDZ1bua5ltzyS59a7KcC3OJo5dEtGfyLad7IrD4KT6AFZt6w1hINNS8AToNUr9nq8sIVWZA4VyHy_i4jkxV3902o4QUQ1-P4rzj21jjwSHqE3oz5QkFxhN1Qw8HT4Z9ehDB2ST-Bn7ONRXTO9HVQ7LP7twgA%3D%3D) ** Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a **Founding Supporter** at the $35 and above level, we’ll send you**** all ten episodes of** _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ **for your family to enjoy**** FREE on DVD.** ** Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a **Founding Supporter. **
---

clean_body: Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. | | | | Fellow Conservative, As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want to say: You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues... | | And the result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say......and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth. That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Season One of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a Founding Supporter at the $35 and above level, we’ll send you** all ten episodes of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk for your family to enjoy FREE on DVD. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a Founding Supporter. | | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father | | | Kirk Cameron**Actor, Author, and Father | | | | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304

[**_NO BALLS IN MY STALLS._**](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=a880502cd175424ab9b2f3eb245a9103&_e=Figs3awbVyDcQjJB0TH1vk6_t2nBxU9k7HobeXVGY7pNYhj-xCiEgXjBeO0IsteY74CS3fFxYksR9O7uOEap1fAsvbFt69yQAXCIAdA8yWDdOzXnwU_MX3noxI1NEzsgFklhs6moBDHFhkuW9VGwcQHSdNzgXkzYA-0h3nhlsFM5A7B5wptsw5GN6FXk4xWiymOLLc9yUDRjYFKA3TnVyIILD53tYJo8AAdYnhwaVsWn6GGBPK829DgkOUVnFwSEIp-JLUnnIAZIjsOEycTQWWpRu1mq62joqdCS4ylADgXLHGs04i8tacEW5C-LVtVaOD0eozpAA5Bdyy0MyAMd-0E8cB5-Z6meEI96emRevOVPv-fsxHL-rUpDG7GHfslKFnsGstGIVGxp5G2wxFkQL8YZI4mvYk0nhhR3ZtVEJEk%3D)
**It 's Nancy Mace, and I'm not backing down.**
The Radical Left, led by AOC, _is**losing their minds** over something as basic as **keeping NAKED MEN out of WOMEN 'S PRIVATE SPACES.**_
They're twisting the truth --_like they ALWAYS do._
[](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=a880502cd175424ab9b2f3eb245a9103&_e=Figs3awbVyDcQjJB0TH1vk6_t2nBxU9k7HobeXVGY7pNYhj-xCiEgXjBeO0IsteY74CS3fFxYksR9O7uOEap1fAsvbFt69yQAXCIAdA8yWDdOzXnwU_MX3noxI1NEzsgFklhs6moBDHFhkuW9VGwcQHSdNzgXkzYA-0h3nhlsFM5A7B5wptsw5GN6FXk4xWiymOLLc9yUDRjYFKA3TnVyIILD53tYJo8AAdYnhwaVsWn6GGBPK829DgkOUVnFwSEIp-JLUnnIAZIjsOEycTQWerEiYcHOz8eH4rlx3EIMSomidR_JpXMI5kKE4CtACq0Q6eqxGpFX7HW_iViXXqn23qNyZM7wScFJHi-0KO7aeVSJhxDmo8DflywbWUmDDD00d75llWqv9acqeLmHwPsxFOGGLCEoJVeJfe57XuLIuQ%3D)
**AOC is RALLYING Americans AGAINST ME.**
She called my stance "GROSS" and said "EVERYONE SHOULD REJECT IT."
Let that sink in.
_**The Left thinks protecting girls is "GROSS." **_
**They want to throw open the doors of women 's bathrooms and locker rooms to men**, all in the name of their twisted agenda.
This isn't just absurd -- it's an attack on every woman and girl in America.
But I'm NOT backing down.
J.K. Rowling is with me. Speaker Mike Johnson is with me. **THOUSANDS of Americans are with me** -- men and women standing together to say ENOUGH IS ENOUGH.
**And guess what? IT 'S WORKING.**
[A school board in Wisconsin just voted to BAN males from girls' restrooms and sports. ](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=a880502cd175424ab9b2f3eb245a9103&_e=Figs3awbVyDcQjJB0TH1vk6_t2nBxU9k7HobeXVGY7pNYhj-xCiEgXjBeO0IsteY74CS3fFxYksR9O7uOEap1fAsvbFt69yQAXCIAdA8yWDdOzXnwU_MX3noxI1NEzsgFklhs6moBDHFhkuW9VGwcQHSdNzgXkzYA-0h3nhlsFM5A7B5wptsw5GN6FXk4xWiymOLLc9yUDRjYFKA3TnVyIILD53tYJo8AAdYnhwaVsWn6GGBPK829DgkOUVnFwSEIp-JLUnnIAZIjsOEycTQWcyI5vB0ElFxmQCa7Q2bSSkZDe8q8RMnErsPdP-rJI0MnWdwbXlSdszOjZnxHOEGHeMkbeRFNfwg4McplMzRyr60BlB_Euy1f16YYp52rTHr8ZGW54X7ydGFeOLJ2H98_sb-ZKZ-8NB8CNDTEBc3jcE%3D)
**This is just the beginning.** America is waking up, and we're taking back our common sense.
But I need YOU with me to keep up this fight.
_**Peter, will you stand with me and[PROVE we have more Americans rallying behind us than AOC and her Radical Left mob?](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=a880502cd175424ab9b2f3eb245a9103&_e=Figs3awbVyDcQjJB0TH1vk6_t2nBxU9k7HobeXVGY7pNYhj-xCiEgXjBeO0IsteY74CS3fFxYksR9O7uOEap1fAsvbFt69yQAXCIAdA8yWDdOzXnwU_MX3noxI1NEzsgFklhs6moBDHFhkuW9VGwcQHSdNzgXkzYA-0h3nhlsFM5A7B5wptsw5GN6FXk4xWiymOLLc9yUDRjYFKA3TnVyIILD53tYJo8AAdYnhwaVsWn6GGBPK829DgkOUVnFwSEIp-JLUnnIAZIjsOEycTQWWJn6UqqQWK_iaDoHNOAWy9BWgLGDpRj28Yhoq505JjZHShGPNOsW5IcPfe15sVhl2cFvOqRuiLx42Ynj_SuWqoqGH9DFWQHS2kjKgFyDOvi0scTWi5a5Mdo7UcDGClr4rjFguFIYK9XmMN5yL71luI%3D)**_
Join the fight. America's daughters are depending on us.
**Sign your name and chip in!**

clean_body: It 's Nancy Mace, and I'm not backing down. The Radical Left, led by AOC, islosing their minds over something as basic as keeping NAKED MEN out of WOMEN 'S PRIVATE SPACES. They're twisting the truth --like they ALWAYS do. AOC is RALLYING Americans AGAINST ME. She called my stance "GROSS" and said "EVERYONE SHOULD REJECT IT." Let that sink in. The Left thinks protecting girls is "GROSS." They want to throw open the doors of women 's bathrooms and locker rooms to men, all in the name of their twisted agenda. This isn't just absurd -- it's an attack on every woman and girl in America. But I'm NOT backing down. J.K. Rowling is with me. Speaker Mike Johnson is with me. THOUSANDS of Americans are with me -- men and women standing together to say ENOUGH IS ENOUGH. And guess what? IT 'S WORKING. This is just the beginning. America is waking up, and we're taking back our common sense. But I need YOU with me to keep up this fight. Peter, will you stand with me and Join the fight. America's daughters are depending on us. #
Friend of Life,

Planned Parenthood just came out with a new video that calls virginity "made up" and a "social construct."

The "educator" in the video tells young people: "It's time to throw away the notion of losing your virginity."

Instead of seeing it as "losing something," Planned Parenthood encourages impressionable teens to experiment sexually because "all of these myths around sex and virginity can be so hurtful and overwhelming."

Planned Parenthood is grooming the next generation for abortion. Promoting risky sexual practices to young people ultimately leads them to broken relationships and more children killed in the womb.

**Will you help fight back against Planned Parenthood 's anti-family, pro-death agenda? I'm asking 50 people to step forward today with a $50 gift to help us put our life-saving videos into classrooms nationwide**. **[https://give.liveaction.org/stop-planned-parenthood-mms/](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=5416691dd99c4ca7b60035bfa06db609&_e=T3oBvM2tUxK-UoQCu9AiM3xJKfZbLkYoh-FqqkevHqbK2ijQvahcEztwHhpLT3-Tr6ngt91wFy9TR7oLnl907WajL44d-FxNi-Bx2R3zD61cV-uleRvVkKRmQfg4sE1v1XTL3JljPFnxVcIAuqwxHkKpM7lpIYL8iICnlhGcAMiOobsLyeYYYfn6CMovNQgxLBaBhkEHG0Qmlg-zXgacTlRNhhxpgUxw60MA7c7bHW_GopG5j3ydapH_lcvJRsIQE3CiasxlvzN0sk0zZQNUgGhyafLkpuGlJb_Pkeb6g3YAQSdxyqS77ow_HkxvK4P_2dFXU-DcKgOhdhC6uvfbKMB57oQfRzRgxLNkCHw9UTM%3D)**

Planned Parenthood has continuously pushed egregious and pornographic materials in schools to young kids and teens -- and what do they "teach" these impressionable kids about sex? That disturbing practices are "normal" and "healthy."

In classic Planned Parenthood fashion, irrefutable definitions are warped, and morality is thrown out the window.

Planned Parenthood is the largest provider of sex education in America -- and they teach kids that gender is fluid, deviant sexual practices are normal and healthy, and anything goes, as long as it's consensual.

**We need to protect our children against Planned Parenthood 's deception. This deadly organization should not be the educator of our children. **

Friend of Life, this is why we at Live Action have been creating - and are about to release! - wholesome sex-ed video series for schools across the country to use instead of Planned Parenthood's damaging materials.

We need to spread the truth about loving relationships between men and women and the beauty of procreation before the next generation of parents is convinced by Planned Parenthood's disturbing agenda that leads to abortion.

**But we can 't complete this critical initiative without your support. Your gift of $50 will help us complete the videos and get them into schools across the country. Use this secure link to make your gift and kick Planned Parenthood out of the classroom! [https://give.liveaction.org/stop-planned-parenthood-mms/](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=5416691dd99c4ca7b60035bfa06db609&_e=T3oBvM2tUxK-UoQCu9AiM3xJKfZbLkYoh-FqqkevHqbK2ijQvahcEztwHhpLT3-Tr6ngt91wFy9TR7oLnl907WajL44d-FxNi-Bx2R3zD61cV-uleRvVkKRmQfg4sE1v1XTL3JljPFnxVcIAuqwxHkKpM7lpIYL8iICnlhGcAMiOobsLyeYYYfn6CMovNQgxLBaBhkEHG0Qmlg-zXgacTofcqzupRnUsfGp5efVQr_fLzFH7PXk2w4Yy0FBgQUWiyI4rvoN9dxvGtHfaravbNjfuja2Z-OSr_XE_Q4m8IavuEFcj4shawf7icE3Z2vsDhpvziFCKup9inTpliaa9BvGfuYCh0LKhZ-fFBqbTUt4%3D)
**
Your partnership gives me so much hope. I can't wait to share the impact your activism will have in months to come. Our children - and grandchildren - depend on it.

For Life,

Lila Rose
**President and Founder**

[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=5416691dd99c4ca7b60035bfa06db609&_e=T3oBvM2tUxK-UoQCu9AiM3xJKfZbLkYoh-FqqkevHqbK2ijQvahcEztwHhpLT3-Tr6ngt91wFy9TR7oLnl907WajL44d-FxNi-Bx2R3zD61cV-uleRvVkKRmQfg4sE1v1XTL3JljPFnxVcIAuqwxHkKpM7lpIYL8iICnlhGcAMiOobsLyeYYYfn6CMovNQgxLBaBhkEHG0Qmlg-zXgacTq17e74bw-WbSbCrm2yvSKmyDJHFdB-Mp0uZwEbmrT8_Lvs94gDoZVW7vu4rhOTtJfE1eRtLezJChRQDxqexIBmddohgfvaRyGbsTAXKZEUVYO73u-CfpIUNXmOqCPsyP5pRJ3awwpa42NNxZmN_sug%3D)

name: Senator-elect Bernie Moreno
subject: Thank you for standing with me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
I’m excited to serve as our next U.S. senator and fight for conservative principles and Ohio values, but I need your help to determine what issues you most want me to fight for. [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ef5c2af86b3f4c5dac6ddc23fe8556f7&_e=Ab-pJhMHA0yoATy5hVr0585NOcGSpUNMvtE7rCDzzWclGCWai2xtEyYaW5SKC5KPo1EarGiQZBPx67SsjgJWzBcpXa5QvstXAkyatwonE6CMeYo6qwZLlgIf7M0gLaruQfnXOprLAhjeWOIgJ_lLiCjoRalAGLjKv7ExlqH1jg4EdDSHUvJXcnBIxza5igNWuK5L7PtOR4EQRBHrQ-lcySHo-RQyEQwZv5LKcyaAUmzG4VgItwODj9bEX5XHJ4yqwWqNzDE4CT-NglbP_-80ZEUTC_dtn5pv9aIrY6qUAqQxP_l2vi9u7ZDGucu57Tg4yQI5VnyI4o6yByq1F1QxGQRo2WWZMYBZ72Pa1ncDTFzpo3shjSed0opCXQjdsKpfJNvcXWJObqYZAfxrW79sO-yfBl65jJnX-ahuZfwKVB-B8WdcJY9IuKxW9psmu4fi8vGoh6z9RvXWJWs-cVhjpbDT93-JIUCE-Kbcufv7M34%3D)

Peter - Let me introduce myself.

My name is Bernie Moreno. My win in Ohio officially clinched the Senate majority for Republicans!

_First, I want to thank you for everything you did to support my campaign for the U.S. Senate and for standing with my fellow Senate Republicans in taking back the Senate!_

We have built a majority that even the liberal media are admitting it would take Democrats [**at least two election cycles to defeat.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ef5c2af86b3f4c5dac6ddc23fe8556f7&_e=Ab-pJhMHA0yoATy5hVr0585NOcGSpUNMvtE7rCDzzWclGCWai2xtEyYaW5SKC5KPo1EarGiQZBPx67SsjgJWzBcpXa5QvstXAkyatwonE6CMeYo6qwZLlgIf7M0gLaruQfnXOprLAhjeWOIgJ_lLiCjoRalAGLjKv7ExlqH1jg4EdDSHUvJXcnBIxza5igNWuK5L7PtOR4EQRBHrQ-lcySHo-RQyEQwZv5LKcyaAUmzG4VgItwODj9bEX5XHJ4yqwWqNzDE4CT-NglbP_-80ZEUTC_dtn5pv9aIrY6qUAqQxP_l2vi9u7ZDGucu57Tg4yQI5VnyI4o6yByq1F1QxGbFErtI493YzIsYjD3BM1y7UA6MY5YU067mXj2XgwKrCD6FFtcfFsmtQtixZlW0J_zh6CAtpSnvmXOEZg9i3eVtRN3DOyOXzs-Qp0Ap9Nkbq1IBEz59zP-ojU5F2gEwQoNhGyUZY8zTrColebivVBvk%3D)

I'm proud to stand alongside President-elect Trump and my Senate GOP colleagues to fight for conservative principles and American values.

We have a lot of work to do to restore our country after the damage Joe Biden and Kamala Harris inflicted during their failed administration.

So, I've worked with the NRSC Polling Team to create this [**Top Issues Survey**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ef5c2af86b3f4c5dac6ddc23fe8556f7&_e=Ab-pJhMHA0yoATy5hVr0585NOcGSpUNMvtE7rCDzzWclGCWai2xtEyYaW5SKC5KPo1EarGiQZBPx67SsjgJWzBcpXa5QvstXAkyatwonE6CMeYo6qwZLlgIf7M0gLaruQfnXOprLAhjeWOIgJ_lLiCjoRalAGLjKv7ExlqH1jg4EdDSHUvJXcnBIxza5igNWuK5L7PtOR4EQRBHrQ-lcySHo-RQyEQwZv5LKcyaAUmzG4VgItwODj9bEX5XHJ4yqwWqNzDE4CT-NglbP_-80ZEUTC_dtn5pv9aIrY6qUAqQxP_l2vi9u7ZDGucu57Tg4yQI5VnyI4o6yByq1F1QxGX7ZixzFWLP7lrbsA4c4BofbjZcHamK-vHmbuY1T2brFZTGAh7sQVb-Sw9aB__QcefK0xLZ6dWT3vlaMU6kB3-Bfdxn_t2Xu13LEYD5bkOMpqESW9Ha-zeZTVCxdSZVZXrGryFoG5DD6doijJb-B8uw%3D) which will only take a few moments to complete.

We hope to receive 700 survey responses to our**Top Issues Survey** before midnight tonight so that Senate Republicans can plan our agenda for this Congress.

We are making plans NOW that will impact what issues we act on FIRST when we take control of both houses of Congress and the White House in January.

Peter - Let me introduce myself. My name is Bernie Moreno. My win in Ohio officially clinched the Senate majority for Republicans! First, I want to thank you for everything you did to support my campaign for the U.S. Senate and for standing with my fellow Senate Republicans in taking back the Senate! We have built a majority that even the liberal media are admitting it would take Democrats I'm proud to stand alongside President-elect Trump and my Senate GOP colleagues to fight for conservative principles and American values. We have a lot of work to do to restore our country after the damage Joe Biden and Kamala Harris inflicted during their failed administration. So, I've worked with the NRSC Polling Team to create this which will only take a few moments to complete. We hope to receive 700 survey responses to ourTop Issues Survey before midnight tonight so that Senate Republicans can plan our agenda for this Congress. We are making plans NOW that will impact what issues we act on FIRST when we take control of both houses of Congress and the White House in January. I am working with my Senate Republican colleagues to distribute this survey and others to the Republican supporters who helped us win. We need to know what you think so we know how to best fight for conservative principles and American values as we take on the far-left Democrats. We're seeking to collect 700 SURVEY RESPONSES before midnight tonight so our polling and data analytics team can review responses in the morning to pass along to Senate Republicans. body:

name: Sarah DeValkenaere
subject: My husband is a hero
body:
My husband is an honest man of integrity who followed in his father’s law enforcement footsteps. Eric himself is a decorated, 21-year veteran of the Kansas City Police Department. Dear Friend,

I wish I could sit down with you face to face instead of writing this e-mail.
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=2e35b9e0e53d4277a0709df7fd6f599c&_e=FUE8KuFkDoWsVosuHr-iTWsdIFnS69wUeGnz0E3pYXUebzbxusskVhYStfd8w3zp3G597R7Udrhj66YdMcwiKC3bkMRGuepYhpt03jAkCKsa0g6NFW8ClqGO4_LcSzFkcSegcQAPXyD9q5W6Bjf9Ua7Oa0o43c6qSQ9CXzLB1LDql7UyOotzoHYOra9VegFjHtNq2zBkRD67sYWEupDq4hKyFGS98F7Y7hA3A333tRIy8xZ25IzQy9e3tFWqCwlGfBHgGeD3X8Th3X2VikPkE73BFKkM0C-Fm50mD9GCs-7h8xT81Wju-Eb7fi22tiJmdzrgweJ_zj4J_w7NJG_qwcL2sDk5Bqd4zeYwmDOXBTQ4NNMNJmKYV7rjR1YXZA3qv_Pzppjkp4zC0EUgG1v2RA%3D%3D)
That's a picture of me and my husband, Eric, so you at least know what we look like.

Eric is a Detective with the Kansas City Police Department.

I wanted to send a picture of us with our three beautiful children - but in this current political climate, I don't feel safe sharing photos of our kids on the Internet.

When I tell you what happened, I think you'll understand. **[And I pray that you'll find it in your heart to help me save my husband.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=2e35b9e0e53d4277a0709df7fd6f599c&_e=FUE8KuFkDoWsVosuHr-iTWsdIFnS69wUeGnz0E3pYXUebzbxusskVhYStfd8w3zp3G597R7Udrhj66YdMcwiKC3bkMRGuepYhpt03jAkCKsa0g6NFW8ClqGO4_LcSzFkcSegcQAPXyD9q5W6Bjf9Ua7Oa0o43c6qSQ9CXzLB1LDql7UyOotzoHYOra9VegFjHtNq2zBkRD67sYWEupDq4hKyFGS98F7Y7hA3A333tRL3frQ3MgBCRgjSDRLAx47TjP8AJoFFle6G1QoGcxSBH2m4GFQbgswx9eSpgAYA7bJ-xw0rgEoY3XYqkGBfL2lx8RbEeJFJyVUfpdWWi7jYQttvS5HUMJhne7DSBneuLhWLJP2dPduGxu7KMDFw9i6lDWX5UQNdZmCE70tNCc0sjA%3D%3D)**

You see, it all started in early December - a few weeks before Christmas.

One of Eric's fellow detectives witnessed two vehicles speeding through the city streets - one was clearly chasing the other - and the police helicopter quickly got involved. A spotter in the helicopter was able to locate the suspect in a red pickup truck... still speeding down city streets.

The driver, 26-year-old Cameron Lamb, was chasing his ex-girlfriend in a stolen truck - weaving across lanes and running through stoplights.

My husband and his partner responded to the call and caught up with the suspect as he attempted to back the stolen truck into a garage.

Both detectives got out of their police vehicles and approached the stolen truck while repeatedly ordering the suspect to STOP and SHOW HIS HANDS.

That's when it happened.

**As Eric 's partner approached the driver's side, the suspect reached into his waistband and pulled out a handgun - pointing it directly at the detective.**

**My husband 's police training kicked in.**

He fired four rounds in the direction of the suspect through the truck's front windshield. The truck continued traveling into the garage where it finally came to a stop.

When officers entered, they found the suspect deceased - his arm hanging out the open window with a .45 semi-automatic pistol on the ground below.

That night, when Eric returned home, I hugged him and burst into tears. I was so thankful he was safe - and hopeful we could move forward and put this episode behind us.

But it didn't end there.

Several months later, the local prosecutor _charged Eric with MANSLAUGHTER and Armed Criminal Action._

I was in shock.

Then late last year, my husband finally went to trial. The judge ruled against him - and Eric was sentenced to 6 years in prison.

Now you understand why I'm asking for your help.

My husband is an honest man of integrity who followed in his father's law enforcement footsteps. Eric himself is a decorated, 21-year veteran of the Kansas City Police Department.

He's a role model in our community - a Little League baseball coach, a tireless volunteer, and a loving husband and father.

My husband is a hero.

But it didn't matter to the prosecutor that the suspect recklessly swerved a stolen truck through city streets... that he was violent toward his ex-girlfriend and endangered the lives of her two children... that he pointed a stolen gun directly at a police officer.

For serving our community for over 20 years - and risking his life - my has been shipped to an out-of-state prison.

And since the Missouri Supreme Court recently declined to take up Eric's case, that's where he'll stay for the next six years unless he receives a pardon from the Governor of Missouri. He'll miss our wedding anniversaries, our children's birthdays, their graduations(?), and our home will be left without the father and husband we love.

Even if Eric's good name is eventually cleared, just thinking about the cost of his defense and now our efforts to get him pardoned is overwhelming...

... but thank God we got a call from Jason Johnson, President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF).

If you've ever heard of LELDF you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly accused police officers like Eric.

LELDF has helped dozens of innocent cops - and their families - at their lowest moments.

And with the thought of trying to suddenly raise our three children alone - I was certainly at one of the lowest moments of my life.

Not only did the LELDF board decide to help provide Eric with the best possible legal defense, but now they're helping us launch a nationwide petition campaign urging Missouri Governor Mike Parson to pardon Eric.

But as a non-profit organization, they depend solely on generous gifts from folks like you to defend officers like Eric.

I truly believe God is using Jason and the LELDF to answer our prayers.

That's because my husband and I are not wealthy people. I'm a kindergarten teacher and Eric is a career cop.

So I must ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone.

**Will you donate[$35 or any amount to LELDF today to help save my husband?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=2e35b9e0e53d4277a0709df7fd6f599c&_e=FUE8KuFkDoWsVosuHr-iTWsdIFnS69wUeGnz0E3pYXUebzbxusskVhYStfd8w3zp3G597R7Udrhj66YdMcwiKC3bkMRGuepYhpt03jAkCKsa0g6NFW8ClqGO4_LcSzFkcSegcQAPXyD9q5W6Bjf9Ua7Oa0o43c6qSQ9CXzLB1LDql7UyOotzoHYOra9VegFjHtNq2zBkRD67sYWEupDq4hKyFGS98F7Y7hA3A333tRIv2zvN1tGVV5OSrbYIa_T1UhWAF2BCss1AOYhylCT2GTtpsIum1BFZ72v8VefwbDBfFVmwOej3OmY2XQ2n86yv3droPK3TM-7hPpTao-rcW-xEnlP-VkC4k3OlA_t39QKX6jR8tINHd77X5Fs5529t7f_ieI9j3fPYBcud07RRSw%3D%3D)**

If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for your help.

But I am so scared for Eric and I will do whatever I can for him - and for our children.

**[So I pray you'll find it in your heart today to make a tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100 or more to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=2e35b9e0e53d4277a0709df7fd6f599c&_e=FUE8KuFkDoWsVosuHr-iTWsdIFnS69wUeGnz0E3pYXUebzbxusskVhYStfd8w3zp3G597R7Udrhj66YdMcwiKC3bkMRGuepYhpt03jAkCKsa0g6NFW8ClqGO4_LcSzFkcSegcQAPXyD9q5W6Bjf9Ua7Oa0o43c6qSQ9CXzLB1LDql7UyOotzoHYOra9VegFjHtNq2zBkRD67sYWEupDq4hKyFGS98F7Y7hA3A333tRIsa3gEBRCDSqsMmR62B_kX2ICsl8K_8Z2-9uE_LlBp3ok9kFVAn5p6UQzmpy0lXUuXC_DY29vTyPW1sEpyR9jlZXpRZWLaf1TNpnKkFr6VbYnyFOxUEnYo7TARA9FWRZ8oJ3yKkcQY2RojtWhsY-UoBnofVXA4wMdHsYwPpOgF_A%3D%3D)**

Eric and I - and our three kids - are counting on the good nature and generosity of kind neighbors like you to help bring Eric home where he belongs.

No matter what you're able to give today, please pray for us. Thank you in advance for your support.

Sincerely,

Sarah DeValkenaere

P.S. The Missouri Supreme Court has declined to take Eric's case. Now a pardon is one of the last remaining options to bring Eric home. We're feverishly trying to raise the money to pay for a massive petition drive urging the Missouri Governor Mike Parson to pardon Eric. I know my husband is innocent. But it's so hard to be a cop these days. The 'defund the police' movement has wiped out the support officers like Eric need to do their jobs.

And dozens of prosecutors across the country have made it a priority to try and lock up as many cops as they can. Even if they followed their training or defended themselves in the line of duty. The brave men and women in blue need to know that someone... anyone still has their back.

**[That's why I sincerely hope you'll help me get justice for Eric - and our entire family - by making a tax-deductible gift of any amount to the LELDF today.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=2e35b9e0e53d4277a0709df7fd6f599c&_e=FUE8KuFkDoWsVosuHr-iTWsdIFnS69wUeGnz0E3pYXUebzbxusskVhYStfd8w3zp3G597R7Udrhj66YdMcwiKC3bkMRGuepYhpt03jAkCKsa0g6NFW8ClqGO4_LcSzFkcSegcQAPXyD9q5W6Bjf9Ua7Oa0o43c6qSQ9CXzLB1LDql7UyOotzoHYOra9VegFjHtNq2zBkRD67sYWEupDq4hKyFGS98F7Y7hA3A333tRIl0aS8Eu71eBONDBFDlN2UmsL21qL-XZTDSzVxqPD3LIuV5qI5q7_T42s5j6AErKjXTlH-EiIm2ic29ZQH0BGCWG_stdaHr7eGBM54E67kUHAEm1jeqVycY00-gMcaW8LfyidnxjRX8OHrruGDfN7B33vsR4tYZM2S5MLDAk7YkQ%3D%3D)**

Thank you, and God bless!
--------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit **www.PoliceDefense.org**. And remember -Blue Lives Matter!_

_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=2e35b9e0e53d4277a0709df7fd6f599c&_e=FUE8KuFkDoWsVosuHr-iTT6yjscD6mUoUu14s2r857543GCXHIcCkeHvZ9lZPcZx7mCDHTem75FWcqWNfVT6-WSW-92DaA7lTIK-cEbB35LPv7MyV7qKZ9EIxHcImnVrU16PaX1fTDydWhb8Z1ulMKNouISmsuHuDy1SAll8p7pEx61EryJPYTdIlBdCHqhbloqPgCtd9IBUIN3k1mHwoA%3D%3D)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

[Unsubscribe](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=2e35b9e0e53d4277a0709df7fd6f599c&_t=5w8fKQ9CA_TqLQypgpsIfw2xp44oifDfwqcKr1ZerhUEEnJ2Wx-NZLNzSbV3dyLtqLcTHgB1xv4TVafeVYqxrv3nodZpxhv8k0yssiRXG-zR6fJdws0q2-vK6mdR4bIU)

Homeschool Collaboratives:

Which one is the Best Fit for YOU?

December 9, 2024

9amPT/ 10amMT/ 11amCT/ 12pmET

Does the idea of homeschooling your children by yourself just overwhelm you with feelings of inadequacy and dread? If so, you are
not alone and you are not without hope! Teamwork makes the dream work and you don't have to do it alone; you can band together as
homeschooling parents and form a collaborative! There are so many types, and so this month we welcome into the Homeschool Mom2Mom
studio three different collaboratives, each with their own unique qualities and each demonstrating not only how they did it,
but how you can do it, too.

Register - HOMESCHOOL COLLABORATIVES [http://email.mg.momsforamerica.us/c/eJxsks1u2zAQhJ9GvNkQf0RaBx76EwWFG7SJgyDwxaDJlUxLJBWSkps-fSG3KHLwcQe7O99iVh-ska_tPGCTq616e_7Rvor9vp6RkS0WhmFkglPWS9etXXCpDVE5iFar9ZQQSCwoLTd1xTkCp-xwcJCS6mDZ27zttr8Yq-_bhz78fNoZgV_-deX3EaRWblS28x-0ZYwLxgllvCy5prrUUFei2hCDwM82Bu_AZznGYCadbfDoJLnWuiYUQFeMUcqFrrBhhGNuoKUgkJWkJAyTEhPMeMnXXNcY6nqjBD62FSYFK28eOMhTzmMq6KeCNAVpBuv7tUtd8iaudXAFaa7wqxyV7q3vCtIIUrabY0vEURW00cFnpfM3U9Cvj9t82T_e_f58jpE8n_un7-8ODeEawpg9H-927uWePQg-nhl8AeQgn4KRarQoRNtZL4_T0K-ulmiMYbYGolyqbvIoSjNe7DDYxEXBym7RF0iUwhQ1yL-kNs2rS4g9RJTlYn7TOUsd3OHmZ2QJ-fA_u1mSPwEAAP__yDvDxQ]

>From our webinar archives...

Kitchen Table Lobby

with Rebekah Ricks

Think highly paid lobbyists are the only ones who can have an in with our elected representatives? Think again! You can develop a
relationship of trust with local, state, and national leaders, all from the warm and cozy comfort of your kitchen table. With the
new elected slate of representatives coming in at multiple levels, now is the time to take this kind of action!

clean_body: Register for a LIVE webinar and watch Kitchen Table Lobby from the archives! If you are having trouble viewing this email click here to view in your browser. [] [] [] [] We hope you enjoy your holiday season... take some time to enjoy a live or archived webinar this month! [] [] Homeschool Collaboratives: Which one is the Best Fit for YOU? December 9, 2024 9amPT/ 10amMT/ 11amCT/ 12pmET Does the idea of homeschooling your children by yourself just overwhelm you with feelings of inadequacy and dread? If so, you are not alone and you are not without hope! Teamwork makes the dream work and you don't have to do it alone; you can band together as homeschooling parents and form a collaborative! There are so many types, and so this month we welcome into the Homeschool Mom2Mom studio three different collaboratives, each with their own unique qualities and each demonstrating not only how they did it, but how you can do it, too. Register - HOMESCHOOL COLLABORATIVES [] From our webinar archives... Kitchen Table Lobby with Rebekah Ricks Think highly paid lobbyists are the only ones who can have an in with our elected representatives? Think again! You can develop a relationship of trust with local, state, and national leaders, all from the warm and cozy comfort of your kitchen table. With the new elected slate of representatives coming in at multiple levels, now is the time to take this kind of action! [] [] Watch KITCHEN TABLE LOBBY [] BOOKMARK THIS PAGE! 👇👇👇👇👇 [] [] LIKE WHAT WE DO? Your tax-deductible gift to Moms for America® will help support us in our mission to Empower Moms, Promote Liberty, and Raise Patriots! DONATE TODAY [] Moms for America® Empowering Moms, Promoting Liberty and Raising Patriots! PLEASE CHECK OUT MOMS FOR AMERICA'S UPCOMING EVENTS! subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE
body:
While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. # [#]
Hi there,

Last night, our campaign faced our first month-end fundraising deadline since the 2024 election, and I’m proud to announce that because of the grassroots support of people like you, we hit our goal with time to spare.

We knew the stakes. We knew that it was essential to show our strength in numbers to show Donald Trump and his MAGA administration that we’re not backing down from their hatred, division, and extremism.

We had to make it clear that we’re in this fight for the long haul, not only for us, but for all of the American people and our collective future.

We needed to act, and that’s exactly what we did. I’m incredibly grateful to have your support in a time like this, full of unknowns yet guided by a hope of a better tomorrow.

Thank you.

Sincerely,
Raul

In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress and to flip the House blue this November.

name: Sarah DeValkenaere
subject: My husband is innocent
body:
My husband is an honest man of integrity who followed in his father’s law enforcement footsteps. Eric himself is a decorated, 21-year veteran of the Kansas City Police Department. Dear Friend,

I wish I could sit down with you face to face instead of writing this e-mail.
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7ece02de2ea344f2b6addb5e6ea14a01&_e=vLENSCttfr2druRsVAxUBuouGJRVZ3QIN8seOtJe7pfEutrl-ssrbxCoyaz91hq9QCcAGDwaZ5vbQ9B56T5NTHQj8ARf9pLN8R7VPd7suhckghY1jU4hZ3z5lybLs7ktTm3-FlA6uooSQIs6kd18XqrbUS7R2CRMYGtdtmxi8hQfNZxYlbpO12TTLyMl8_7lI3ahbOw4JJ9vzh0AlScPvJPgmLwNHFGTBfGtwVdYLaRGPrnQZeBEFPkUVr7kTyCYtD7TMSBCSjj8T-jh79HJfwyP5N88pwssSWsuD-qJDNLXwmCT_HWkpdlMV7Q44_gLG0Dexzx16iOhysmYPPNqGRhPr9Lqvro0UqK4U2iegiWOd_Lq8HjfWVpH6gGkfng5)
That's a picture of me and my husband, Eric, so you at least know what we look like.

Eric is a Detective with the Kansas City Police Department.

I wanted to send a picture of us with our three beautiful children - but in this current political climate, I don't feel safe sharing photos of our kids on the Internet.

When I tell you what happened, I think you'll understand. **[And I pray that you'll find it in your heart to help me save my husband.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7ece02de2ea344f2b6addb5e6ea14a01&_e=vLENSCttfr2druRsVAxUBuouGJRVZ3QIN8seOtJe7pfEutrl-ssrbxCoyaz91hq9QCcAGDwaZ5vbQ9B56T5NTHQj8ARf9pLN8R7VPd7suhckghY1jU4hZ3z5lybLs7ktTm3-FlA6uooSQIs6kd18XqrbUS7R2CRMYGtdtmxi8hQfNZxYlbpO12TTLyMl8_7lI3ahbOw4JJ9vzh0AlScPvJPgmLwNHFGTBfGtwVdYLaQxx5HQcopOzXZyK19yl9_xpbRF3Kk0PI14vx40t1BMXMBRXE-5nn4doeiZUyPhGgl1j1_8aczDEGxE4ldmQsu1U3nhmRUMp0eCPgaNBmzWyEYLsqA090AizGbl2Gu4G6pngY3HeArMBh9gQTWMykse)**

You see, it all started in early December - a few weeks before Christmas.

One of Eric's fellow detectives witnessed two vehicles speeding through the city streets - one was clearly chasing the other - and the police helicopter quickly got involved. A spotter in the helicopter was able to locate the suspect in a red pickup truck... still speeding down city streets.

The driver, 26-year-old Cameron Lamb, was chasing his ex-girlfriend in a stolen truck - weaving across lanes and running through stoplights.

My husband and his partner responded to the call and caught up with the suspect as he attempted to back the stolen truck into a garage.

Both detectives got out of their police vehicles and approached the stolen truck while repeatedly ordering the suspect to STOP and SHOW HIS HANDS.

That's when it happened.

**As Eric 's partner approached the driver's side, the suspect reached into his waistband and pulled out a handgun - pointing it directly at the detective.**

**My husband 's police training kicked in.**

He fired four rounds in the direction of the suspect through the truck's front windshield. The truck continued traveling into the garage where it finally came to a stop.

When officers entered, they found the suspect deceased - his arm hanging out the open window with a .45 semi-automatic pistol on the ground below.

That night, when Eric returned home, I hugged him and burst into tears. I was so thankful he was safe - and hopeful we could move forward and put this episode behind us.

But it didn't end there.

Several months later, the local prosecutor _charged Eric with MANSLAUGHTER and Armed Criminal Action._

I was in shock.

Then late last year, my husband finally went to trial. The judge ruled against him - and Eric was sentenced to 6 years in prison.

Now you understand why I'm asking for your help.

My husband is an honest man of integrity who followed in his father's law enforcement footsteps. Eric himself is a decorated, 21-year veteran of the Kansas City Police Department.

He's a role model in our community - a Little League baseball coach, a tireless volunteer, and a loving husband and father.

My husband is a hero.

But it didn't matter to the prosecutor that the suspect recklessly swerved a stolen truck through city streets... that he was violent toward his ex-girlfriend and endangered the lives of her two children... that he pointed a stolen gun directly at a police officer.

For serving our community for over 20 years - and risking his life - my has been shipped to an out-of-state prison.

And since the Missouri Supreme Court recently declined to take up Eric's case, that's where he'll stay for the next six years unless he receives a pardon from the Governor of Missouri. He'll miss our wedding anniversaries, our children's birthdays, their graduations(?), and our home will be left without the father and husband we love.

Even if Eric's good name is eventually cleared, just thinking about the cost of his defense and now our efforts to get him pardoned is overwhelming...

... but thank God we got a call from Jason Johnson, President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF).

If you've ever heard of LELDF you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly accused police officers like Eric.

LELDF has helped dozens of innocent cops - and their families - at their lowest moments.

And with the thought of trying to suddenly raise our three children alone - I was certainly at one of the lowest moments of my life.

Not only did the LELDF board decide to help provide Eric with the best possible legal defense, but now they're helping us launch a nationwide petition campaign urging Missouri Governor Mike Parson to pardon Eric.

But as a non-profit organization, they depend solely on generous gifts from folks like you to defend officers like Eric.

I truly believe God is using Jason and the LELDF to answer our prayers.

That's because my husband and I are not wealthy people. I'm a kindergarten teacher and Eric is a career cop.

So I must ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone.

**Will you donate[$35 or any amount to LELDF today to help save my husband?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7ece02de2ea344f2b6addb5e6ea14a01&_e=vLENSCttfr2druRsVAxUBuouGJRVZ3QIN8seOtJe7pfEutrl-ssrbxCoyaz91hq9QCcAGDwaZ5vbQ9B56T5NTHQj8ARf9pLN8R7VPd7suhckghY1jU4hZ3z5lybLs7ktTm3-FlA6uooSQIs6kd18XqrbUS7R2CRMYGtdtmxi8hQfNZxYlbpO12TTLyMl8_7lI3ahbOw4JJ9vzh0AlScPvJPgmLwNHFGTBfGtwVdYLaSEc8CwZe2WzClySgHXb-8NhQPYcHRnKhK-J3w2wyxZZB3_CMom7_la1Z1EktA6PJzCw0vUULVmMqjuJd-axg9s_kDtyYcmv11U7hi-N72axvftep4AHAus220fjlFT4vGXl0HEyigFWbeK7mZbjA-w)**

If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for your help.

But I am so scared for Eric and I will do whatever I can for him - and for our children.

**[So I pray you'll find it in your heart today to make a tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100 or more to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7ece02de2ea344f2b6addb5e6ea14a01&_e=vLENSCttfr2druRsVAxUBuouGJRVZ3QIN8seOtJe7pfEutrl-ssrbxCoyaz91hq9QCcAGDwaZ5vbQ9B56T5NTHQj8ARf9pLN8R7VPd7suhckghY1jU4hZ3z5lybLs7ktTm3-FlA6uooSQIs6kd18XqrbUS7R2CRMYGtdtmxi8hQfNZxYlbpO12TTLyMl8_7lI3ahbOw4JJ9vzh0AlScPvJPgmLwNHFGTBfGtwVdYLaTGsE2yMRvObcIcrbkV-CphbXlftkHJZ-GmgUQisvworMCTpnCfANTi5J0rU-v5tSK6F-iTlq5PJ1tD1u00CJl-GLomfWnXDhU_qZZ79f0nkO6JvmMGcTa-SHjN0HoWhvvVv3p7u2i5TWTR4mxDVJyW)**

Eric and I - and our three kids - are counting on the good nature and generosity of kind neighbors like you to help bring Eric home where he belongs.

No matter what you're able to give today, please pray for us. Thank you in advance for your support.

Sincerely,

Sarah DeValkenaere

P.S. The Missouri Supreme Court has declined to take Eric's case. Now a pardon is one of the last remaining options to bring Eric home. We're feverishly trying to raise the money to pay for a massive petition drive urging the Missouri Governor Mike Parson to pardon Eric. I know my husband is innocent. But it's so hard to be a cop these days. The 'defund the police' movement has wiped out the support officers like Eric need to do their jobs.

And dozens of prosecutors across the country have made it a priority to try and lock up as many cops as they can. Even if they followed their training or defended themselves in the line of duty. The brave men and women in blue need to know that someone... anyone still has their back.

**[That's why I sincerely hope you'll help me get justice for Eric - and our entire family - by making a tax-deductible gift of any amount to the LELDF today.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7ece02de2ea344f2b6addb5e6ea14a01&_e=vLENSCttfr2druRsVAxUBuouGJRVZ3QIN8seOtJe7pfEutrl-ssrbxCoyaz91hq9QCcAGDwaZ5vbQ9B56T5NTHQj8ARf9pLN8R7VPd7suhckghY1jU4hZ3z5lybLs7ktTm3-FlA6uooSQIs6kd18XqrbUS7R2CRMYGtdtmxi8hQfNZxYlbpO12TTLyMl8_7lI3ahbOw4JJ9vzh0AlScPvJPgmLwNHFGTBfGtwVdYLaRcHiYjovjgUPgh9kKSLg21k1a94GmEbuTSMKH2qxQI76BlpF_byBR2HRUs04AIivL2rP1tD1cn1rZGAqxXvg5Pa1x7EF98KoAWJPSdduQEFQnkEU8uIT8Nnjr9jRE2FreyHhCoJPjEC3VS-o4qZ0c2)**

Thank you, and God bless!
--------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit **www.PoliceDefense.org**. And remember -Blue Lives Matter!_

_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7ece02de2ea344f2b6addb5e6ea14a01&_e=vLENSCttfr2druRsVAxUBi0GD9xBjTY4nAx5kiZJ0NubnaP24QG7Hbepc9NHZcr_yVh9OGajJq8GV1sYpCU3UgIaMsQZFyvxUd6zavs6dsaclfTh_3BgFok9bPuEtVAYJPZOcHboaMXTbMItjdwqmh0SkC9nmXGGk_iLgGCsfCyhAEZpWZV59NrW4dWIFn8HvQ9zibwal2r3cV2uNBNKhg%3D%3D)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

[Unsubscribe](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=7ece02de2ea344f2b6addb5e6ea14a01&_t=aaBLp6K2Dlx2rrPN7Mq_U4X128yK7Hlvl_6EHbHgYGeN1nV4ta6ohkSiWXXrfD0nkup_Z8oZ-HrZCobrvC1jg2xqcy_t4ah1Kk1sgP9AJzWa6uMf_Jj6P4h8GrSXee7H)

name: MAGA Alert
subject: Trump’s Border Czar is already cracking heads.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Overhaul PAC
body:
| | | **Wow, Trump’s new Border Czar just left the Dems _SPEECHLESS!_** It didn’t take long for Tom Homan to start cracking heads. If the Left gets in his way, he’s ready to **LOCK THEM UP!** In case you missed it the Mayor of Denver said he’s willing to go to jail just to get in Trump's way. And this is what Tom Homan had to say. _"You are absolutely breaking the law... But, look, me and the Denver mayor, we agree on one thing. He’s willing to go to jail, I’m willing to put him in jail."_ **WOW!** We finally have someone willing to do what it takes to **GET THE JOB DONE!** These sanctuary Mayors and Governors have been putting this country in danger for too long. And now we have someone willing to put them in their place. We are proud to stand behind Tom Homan and we are going to do everything we can to get him appointed. And you can help us. Trump’s appointments will have to get over one more hurdle before they can **MAGA!** And that’s the Senate. Each one will need to get confirmed before they can get to work. That might be easier said than done. We won the Senate earlier this month, but if the Democrats flip even 4 votes it could be a **DISASTER for MAGA. ** We need to remind Republicans who put them in their office. _**THE AMERICAN PEOPLE.**_ And if they get in Trump's way we just as easily vote them out. So sign our petition today and help us send them this message: If you get in our way, **YOU’RE GONE!**
---

Peter, The 2024 election is behind us, and the results were not what we hoped for or fought for in Indiana and throughout the country. It is important that we use this moment to reflect and to listen to the many voices in our party, and take stock of where we are and what we can do better. **[Please take a moment to let us know what you want to see from our party and how we can do things better by leaving your comments at this link.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97971019/515139292/212246689?refcode=241201feedback&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzdlZDJhMy0zYWIwLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9n2Lxn-Q2EPi90ugyUVfk9B5kVl4EnOM5sO_nfBYTr4=&emci=2cdbb160-0ea5-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=fc7ed2a3-3ab0-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=4925535)** Rebuilding will not be easy, and we must all work toward the same goal of holding Republicans accountable and fighting for what we believe in. body:
| [View in Web Browser](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kLuS4yAQRb8GMqugAWEFBH4sm-yG9q4nQzxGzKBHSUgu-eun7PE46OTW6b6n2rRDimFVSO4RQBPdhAAQ2yGAObOzOZ3-juvmuL9srgz8PUZweJILvNjOGn8T82WbP6Z_dNT__3T9Ql90Xgf_Yp-VhW9NTPdUHrFTHAwNFntFJWOkklwI3ChjZV0HAtax2jlRubKihFK6dWUAV0scFRDgFAgFJkrCCx4YEYFIbyVzpdkiTh5FRRi9z03sPv3oTExrYfsWJ9XkPEwPMY1A964uutkmP0_fW7ZvEeinMgK93Ef_kuffC7gDYvrxMnbcVbd8FW8Uj8oN15hSnEqJOHn_uYIXBV8BAAD__yTDbdc)
| | | They're not going quietly...
